General_Attitude: Party should take Sri Alam`s service as DCC General Secretary or PCC Secretary.

Reason_for_Interest: If Srikumar Sarkar is not considered for the President post, Then only he want to become President. He considered himself as second best choice for the organization.
Strengths: Dedicated worker.

Reason_for_Interest: Committed to Congress ideology, wants to build a strong organisation by connecting with grass root workers and believes in energizing youth and countering opposition narrative with creditability.
Strengths: Hard working, connects to people and helps them in solving their difficulties, he is always ready to help and has also worked as Human Rights Activists in Palamu district and conducted training programs and camps.
Weaknesses: Did not have much support from very senior leaders
General_Attitude: During my 7-days visit of Palamu district as I wanted to have block level meetings and know the ground reality at the block level, I had requested the District President to organise meetings at all the blocks and expressed my desire to go and meet the block level committee members. If the committees were formed. The District President readily agreed to organise meetings at the block level. I was informed that all the committees were formed at the block level and I was given a copy of all the committee members of the 21 block committees. When we visited the blocks, most members of the block committee were present and we had good interaction on issues of the local area. The block committees were of a strong opinion that the present district president had done very good work and continuously remained in contact with them for whatever issues that came up locally and tried to help them.

Strengths: Has done worked in the field of Education and Health

Strengths: Hard working

Observer_Name: SHRI. PREM SAI THEKAM, EX MINISTER
Reason_for_Interest: छात्र जीवन से ही कांग्रेस संगठन से जुड़ा रहा संगठन का कार्य करने की रुचि रखता है और आर्थिक रूप से मज़बूत है ।

General_Attitude: इनको संगठन चलाने का अनुभव है, वैश्य समाज और व्यापारी संगठन में अच्छी पकड़ है, आर्थिक रूप से मज़बूत हैं, जिले में अच्छी पहचान है, जिले के सभी प्रखंड से इनका नाम डीसीसी हेतु आया है, सभी वरिष्ठ नेताओं का भी सहमति है, झारखंड वैश्य समाज का भी समर्थन पत्र है ।

Observer_Name: SHRI. PREM SAI THEKAM, EX MINISTER

Strengths: मिलनसार प्रवृत्ति, संगठन के विभिन्न पदों पर कार्य करने के कारण काफ़ी अनुभवी हैं ।

Observer_Name: SHRI. PREM SAI THEKAM, EX MINISTER
Reason_for_Interest: वर्तमान में पार्टी के विभिन्न पदों पर रह कर पार्टी का कार्य कर रहे हैं, इस कारण अध्यक्ष पद के लिए अपेक्षा रखते हैं ।

Observer_Name: SHRI. PREM SAI THEKAM, EX MINISTER

Strengths: इनके समाज ( कुर्मी ) की बहुलता ।

Observer_Name: SHRI. PREM SAI THEKAM, EX MINISTER
Reason_for_Interest: युवा कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष , पार्टी के प्रति आस्था रखने के कारण, जिला कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष पद दावेदारी करना चाहता है ।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Education: बीएससी, एलएलबी, एमए, पीएचडी, नेट जेआरएफ
Criminal_Record: विधानसभा चुनाव के समय आचार संहिता उल्लंघन के आरोप में खरसीदाग ओ.पी. में दर्ज वाद में न्यायालय से बेल पर हैं।
Reason_for_Interest: जिलाध्यक्ष के रूप में दूसरे कार्यकाल का मौका दिए जाने पर जिले में पार्टी के संगठन और विचारधारा को मजबूत करने की योजना है।
Strengths: उच्च शिक्षा प्राप्त है। सौम्य और मिलनसार छवी है। जिले में संगठन की अच्छी जानकारी है। कोई गुटबाजी में नहीं है।
Weaknesses: कुर्मी जाति से आते हैं लेकिन कुर्मी कांग्रेस को वोट नहीं देते। कुर्मी जाति पर पकड मजबूत करने की आवश्यकता है।
General_Attitude: किसी भी वरिष्ठ नेता ने यह नहीं कहा कि वर्तमान जिलाध्यक्ष का काम अच्छा नहीं है। सभी ने इनके कार्य की सराहना की है। लेकिन यह बात ज्यादा से ज्यादा आई है कि जिले में आदिवासी को ही जिलाध्यक्ष बनाया जाए। अन्यथा वर्तमान अध्यक्ष को ही रखा जाए।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Reason_for_Interest: विकट परिस्थितियों में भी कांग्रेस पार्टी के साथ खडा रहा। कांके विधानसभा क्षेत्र में संगठन को मजबूत किया है। जिले में जिम्मेदारी मिलेगी तो पूरी निष्ठा से निभाउंगा।
Strengths: जिले में आदिवासियों में बहुत अच्छी पकड है। मुखिया और प्रखण्ड प्रमुख के चुनाव में एकतरफा 90 फीसदी वोट मिले हैं।
Weaknesses: विधानसभा चुनाव में टिकिट मांगा था। लेकिन कारणवश पार्टी ने टिकिट नहीं दिया। उसके बाद से संगठन के कार्यों में भागीदारी बहुत कम है।
General_Attitude: जिले में बडी संख्या में बडे नेताओं से लेकर ब्लॉक कार्यकर्ताओं ने यही कहा है कि जिलाध्यक्ष आदिवासी को बनाया जाए तो सोमनाथ मुण्डा पहली प्राथमिकता है। सरना आदिवासी है जिनकी बडी आबादी है। कांग्रेस का कोर वोटर आदिवासी रहा है लेकिन झामुमो में जा रहा है। पुनः आदिवासी वोट को कांग्रेस की तरफ लाने की जरूरत है।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Reason_for_Interest: कांग्रेस पार्टी के नीति सिद्धांतों के अनुरूप संगठन को मजबूत करना चाहता हूं।
Strengths: युवा कार्यकर्ताओं में पकड मजबूत है। वरिष्ठ नेता श्री बंधु तिर्की और उनकी बेटी मंत्री सुश्री शिल्पी नेता तिर्की का पूरा समर्थन प्राप्त है।
Weaknesses: व्यक्तित्व का विकास नहीं कर पा रहे। तिर्की परिवार से जुडे होने के कारण स्वयं का जनाधार विकसित नहीं कर पाए हैं। खिजरी विधायक श्री राजेश कच्छप को आपत्ति है।
General_Attitude: आदिवासियों में पकड अच्छी है। संगठन के सभी कार्यक्रमों में बढ-चढकर भागीदारी भी लेते हैं। ब्लॉक स्तर पर भी कार्यकर्ताओं ने बहुत रायशुमारी की है। श्री बंधु तिर्की जी से संबंध बहुत अच्छे हैं लेकिन कांग्रेस पार्टी के विधायक श्री राजेश कच्छप और श्री सुरेश कुमार बैठा द्वारा इनके नाम पर सहमति नहीं है।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Reason_for_Interest: कांग्रेस की विचारधारा से प्रेरित। सेवा, समर्पण और त्याग के साथ कांग्रेस पार्टी की विचारधारा को बढाने का प्रयास है।
Strengths: प्रदेश कांग्रेस कमेटी में लम्बे समय तक कार्य का अनुभव है। शालीन और अच्छे वक्ता हैं।
Weaknesses: चूंकि मुख्य संगठन में कार्य का अनुभव रहा है लेकिन जमीनी स्तर पर कार्य का अनुभव नहीं है। ब्लॉक स्तर पर कार्यकर्ताओं से संवाद कार्यक्रम के दौरान कार्यकर्ताओं की पसंद में नाम सामने नहीं आया।
General_Attitude: अच्छे वक्ता और मिलनसार हैं और आदिवासी में उरांव (ईसाई) उपजाति से आते हैं जो कि क्षेत्र का बडा वोटर है। श्री रामेश्वर उरांव, पूर्व अध्यक्ष, राष्ट्र्ीय अनुसूचित जनजाति आयोग द्वारा इनके नाम का समर्थन किया गया है लेकिन किसी अन्य प्रमुख व्यक्ति द्वारा प्राथमिकता से इनका नाम नहीं दिया गया।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Reason_for_Interest: संगठन को मजबूत करना प्राथमिकता रहा है। अंसारी समाज में मजबूत पकड है। यदि अल्पसंख्यक को बनाया जाता है तो अच्छा संदेश जाएगा।
Strengths: जमीनी स्तर के राजनेता। संगठन में काम करने का लम्बा अनुभव। अंसारी समाज से आते हैं तो मुस्लिम समाज की बडी आबादी है और समाज के वोट बैंक पर अच्छी पकड रखते हैं।
Weaknesses: शैक्षणिक योग्यता कम है और आर्थिक स्थिति भी कमजोर है।
General_Attitude: मुस्लिम बाहुल्य इलाकों में बहुत अच्छी पकड है और यहां से इनका नाम प्रमुखता से आया है। संगठन का लम्बा अनुभव भी है। जिले में ब्लॉक स्तर के मुस्लिम नेताओं में बडे नेता माने जाते हैं। संगठन के कार्यक्रमों में बढ चढकर हिस्सेदारी लेते हैं। जिले के संगठन के लिए महत्वपूर्ण व्यक्ति हैं। बडे नेताओं और ब्लॉक के कार्यकर्ताओं से संवाद में कहा गया कि यदि अल्पसंख्यक से बनाएं तो केवल एक ही व्यक्ति योग्य है।

Observer_Name: SMT. PHULO DEVI NETAM, MP MEMBER CWC
Reason_for_Interest: केवल आदिवासी ही नहीं बल्की सभी जातियों में सौहार्दता रखता हूं और हमेंशा लोगों के बीच रहने का प्रयास करता हूं। संगठन को मजबूत करने का कार्य करता हूं।
Strengths: युवा और कांग्रेस पार्टी के प्रति समर्पित नेता। जनाधार बढाने में प्रयासरत रहते हैं।
Weaknesses: संगठन के कार्यों में सहभागिता कम रहती है। क्षेत्र में मेहनत की आवश्यकता है।
General_Attitude: युवा नेता और उर्जा से भरपूर हैं। आदिवासियों में भोक्ता की आबादी कम है, लेकिन ये सभी जाति, उपजाति के लोगों के बीच रहने का प्रयास करते हैं। संगठन सृजन अभियान के दौरान युवाओं ने इनकी भी पैरवी की है। किसी बडे नेता की प्राथमिक शिफारिश नहीं है।

Observer_Name: SHRI PRABHU TOKIA, PRESIDENT TCC D&N HAVELI
Reason_for_Interest: वर्तमान समय में संगठन की स्थिति नाजुक है, संगठन में एसटी, एससी, ओबीसी, और जनरल वर्ग लीडरशिप का अभाव है
Strengths: 40 वर्ष कांग्रेस पार्टी के लिए योगदान,Nsui से लेकर यूथ कांग्रेसी विचारधारा,एग्रेसिव ,जनरल कैटेगरी का होते हुए भी सभी समाज में पकड, सिविल सोसाइटी पसंद करते है. महत्वाकांक्षी, हार्डवर्कर और पार्टी के लिए कुछ करने का जुनून है.साहिबगंज के अलावा संथाल विस्तार में अच्छी पकड़. साहिबगंज विस्तार के झामुमो के बड़े नेता जनरल कैटेगरी के पंकज मिश्रा है. जोकी पुरे संथाल पर अच्छी पकड़ रखता है. उसको भी सीधी चुनौती देता है और  डर-भय नही हैं और कांग्रेसी माइनॉरिटी के बड़े सीनियर नेताओं ने इसे दबा रखा है. बहुत पोटेंशियल व्यक्ति है.nsui और यूथ के समय बड़े आंदोलन, धरना, रैली और अनेक मोर्चे किए हैं.
Weaknesses: थोड़ा एग्रेसिव है, सीनियर नेताओं के साथ ताल मेल करके चलने कि जरूरत है.
General_Attitude:
मेरा मूल्यांकन:
* साहिबगंज जिला और पूरा संथाल विस्तार JMM के सुपर सीएम के नाम से फेमस पंकज मिश्रा जी है. इस विस्तार के JMM के दबंग नेता और ब्राह्मण है. इनके इशारे पर और दबाव में वर्तमान समय में साहिबगंज जिला में कांग्रेस पार्टी चल रही है. 
* कांग्रेस पार्टी को इस जिले में मजबूत करना है तो पंकज मिश्रा को को चुनौती दे सकता है तो सिर्फ अनिल ओझा जी है
* पिछले 20-25 सालों में अनेक आदिवासी कांग्रेसी लीडर थे परंतु उनको साइड ट्रैक किया और महत्व नहीं दिया गया जिसकी वजह से या तो Jmm या भाजपा में गये, या इन एक्टिव हो गए.
* जिस विस्तार में जिस समाज की जितनी बड़ी आबादी,उस समाज की उतनी भागीदारी के हिसाब से माइनॉरिटी के अलावा करीब 75% अन्य जाती समाज के लोगों को संगठन में भागीदारी नहीं मिली है,
* जिला और राज्य स्तर पर 21 बड़े पदों पर सिर्फ माइनॉरिटी,जिला प्रमुख माइनॉरिटी,एनएसयूआई प्रमुख माइनॉरिटी,युवा कांग्रेस माइनॉरिटी,सेवा दल माइनॉरिटी,पीसीसी डेलिगेट्स 06, प्रदेश कार्यकारिणी सदस्य 03, प्रखंड अध्यक्ष  04, साहिबगंज जिला विस्तार में NSUI से युथ और प्रदेश स्तर पर कमिटी मे और एआईसीसी स्तर पर यही व्यक्ति ने कार्य किया है कांग्रेस का लॉयल पर्सन है और केडरबेस कार्यकर्ता है.JMM और बीजेपी के सामने मजबूती से संघर्ष कर सकता है और 40 वर्ष से कांग्रेस पार्टी के साथ सक्रिय और कांग्रेस पार्टी का प्रति योगदान है. इनके लिए माइनॉरिटी समाज के लोग भी पेरवी करने आए, साहिबगंज जिला के सिट( शहर) विस्तार में रहता है.
 Note: अल्पसंख्यक के अलावा दूसरा समाज के अध्यक्ष नहीं बनना चाहिए और अनिल ओझा अध्यक्ष नहीं बने उसके लिए विशेष तौर पर मुजे मिलने आये इस विस्तार के झामुमो के सुपर सीएम श्री पंकज मिश्रा जी. सर्किट हाउस में मिलने आए मुझे ऐसा लगता है कि जिला अध्यक्ष हेतु अनिल ओझा मजबूत दावेदार है. जिसे JMM लीडर भी घबरा रहा है.
* माइनॉरिटी के अलावा दूसरे समाज के कोई भी प्रभावशील लीडर को बनने नहीं दिया गया या और लीडरशिप का अभाव है
* आदिवासी समाज में माइनॉरिटी के प्रति काफी नाराजगी है जिसमें मुख्य बिंदु सामने आए कि आदिवासियों की लड़कियों के साथ मुस्लिम समाज के लोग जबरन शादी करके जमीन हड़प लेना, फिर आदिवासी महिला को चुनाव में प्रतिनिधि बनाकर आरक्षण पर कब्जा करने जैसी गंभीर बातें सामने आई है.
* इनके लिए आम कांग्रेसी कार्यकर्ता जो किसी पद पर ना रहते हुए समर्थन कर रहे हैं
* सभी प्रखंड में अनिल ओझा के नाम का प्रस्ताव आया 
इसलिए मुझे ऐसा लगता है कि एक बार इनको मौका देना चाहिए.

Weaknesses: वर्तमान में जगन्नाथपुर के विधायक हैं। इन्हें बाकी की 4 विधानसभाओं में दौरे करना होंगे और समय देना होगा।
General_Attitude: एसटी हो जाति के होने से सर्वमान्य नेता हैं। चूंकि जिले में मधुकोड़ा गीता कोड़ा के बीजेपी में जाने से उनसे टक्कर लेने वाला एक ही व्यक्ति हैं वह सोनाराम सिंकू वर्तमान में पूरे जिले में कांग्रेस के एक ही विधायक इसलिए प्रशासन पर पूरी पकड़ है। अधिकांश नेता एवं सामाजिक संस्थाएं मानती है कि इनके बनने से कांग्रेस मजबूत होगी।

Observer_Name: SHRI SAJJAN SINGH VERMA, EX. MINISTER
Reason_for_Interest: कई वर्षों से राजनीति कर रहे हैं जनसेवा में विश्वास रखते हैं। पिछले लगभग 2 1/2 वर्षों से जिला कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष हैं। आगे भी कांग्रेस की सेवा करना चाहते हैं
Strengths:
जिला सिंहभूम की पांचों विधानसभा लोकसभा जिला पंचायत जनपद एसटी के लिए आरक्षित है। चूंकि एसपी के अलावा अन्य जातियां भी इस जिले में निवास करती हैं ओबीसी का सबसे बड़ा चेहरा है।
ये पूर्व में पूर्व मुख्यमंत्री मधु कोड़ा जो कि इसी जिले से आते हैं उनके समर्थक माने जाते थे परंतु कोणाजी द्वारा पार्टी बदलने के बाद भी इन्होंने कांग्रेस नहीं छोड़ी। ये दर्शाता है के कांग्रेस के प्रति ये वफादार हैं निर्णय लेने में देर नहीं करते। सभी आदिवासी भाषाओं और अन्य भाषाओं का ज्ञान है। व्यवसायी होने के कारण इनके सबसे मधुर संबंध हैं
Weaknesses: कांग्रेस कार्यालय का सुधार नहीं करवा पाए हैं। चूंकि एसटी बाहुल क्षेत्र में रहते हैं इसलिए निर्णय लेने में थोड़ी देरी करते हैं।
General_Attitude:
एसटी के अलावा सबसे उपयुक्त चेहरा चन्द्रशेखर राय है जो कि ओबीसी वर्ग से आता है। इनका सौम्य स्वभाव और नेताओं के प्रति बातचीत कर रवैया भी सामान्य रहता है।

 अधिकांश नेताओं ने एसटी के बाद ओबीसी वर की पैरवी की है। उसमें चन्द्रशेखर राय के लिए उपयुक्त चेहरा माना गया है

Reason_for_Interest: शुरू से ही कांग्रेस विचारधारा के रहे हैं परंतु मधु कोड़ा एवं गीता कोड़ा की वजह से कांग्रेस छोड़ना पड़ी कोड़ा परिवार और सिंकू परिवार एक ही विधानसभा जगन्नाथपुर के रहने वाले हैं कोड़ा परिवार की वजह से कांग्रेस छोड़ना पड़ी थी। चूंकि वर्तमान में मधु कोड़ा और गीता कोड़ा ने बीजेपी जॉइन कर ली है इसलिए कांग्रेस की सेवा करना चाहता हे पूर्व की भांति जनसेवा का लक्ष्य है

विश्वास कायम करना पड़ेगा कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच संदेश देना होगा कि कांग्रेस नहीं छोड़ेंगे।कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ताओं के सुख दुख में साथ देंगे
General_Attitude:
सनी सिकू की दबंगता पूरे जिले में प्रसिद्ध है। हर कार्यकर्ता इनको सम्मान की दृष्टि से देखता है। कार्यकर्ता काफी हद तक सम्मान करते हैं चूंकि ये दो बार जिला कांग्रेस के अध्यक्ष रह चुके हैं। सभी इलाकों में इनकी पहचान है लोकप्रियता है कार्यकर्ताओं के सुख दुख में शामिल होते हैं
पार्टी के नेता इनको सम्मान की दृष्टि से देखते हैं

Reason_for_Interest: He has been an active and committed member of the Indian National Congress since 2010 with experience at both district and state levels. He has expressed his willingness to take responsibility as President of the District Congress Committee with the objective of strengthening and consolidating the party organization in Churachandpur district. His focus will be on ensuring unity among party leaders and workers and strengthening the booth and block-level structure to effectively face upcoming electoral challenges.
Strengths: He is a senior and dedicated Congress worker with significant organizational experience at the district and state levels. He enjoys good acceptance among district leaders and grassroots workers and is widely considered capable of providing stable, disciplined, and non-factional leadership. He is also financially capable of supporting organizational activities when required. Overall, he is assessed as a potential candidate with the ability to consolidate the party organization and effectively mobilize party cadres for forthcoming elections
General_Attitude: During the course of interactions and consultations with party leaders and workers in the district, many members expressed that he is a well-known and approachable person who maintains polite and helpful relations with everyone. He has been actively participating in party activities for a long time and enjoys a positive reputation among party cadres as well as the general public. His father also served as the former DCC President of Churachandpur, and the family has a good standing and long association with the party.It was also observed that he maintains cordial relations with leaders and members from different communities in the district. Financially, he is capable of supporting organizational activities and is considered a committed party worker. The party’s frontal organizations—Mahila Congress, Youth Congress, and NSUI—have also expressed their support for him.As per my observation, he appears to be a suitable option for the post of DCC President considering his experience in the party, family background, financial capability, and public recognition. Importantly, he belongs to the Gangte community, which is a minority in the district, whereas the Thadou Kuki and Paite communities constitute the majority. In the present social and political context, selecting a candidate from a minority community may help in maintaining balance and ensuring broader support from different sections, as it is often observed that when one major community is given preference, the other may not fully support the party.Therefore, considering these factors, he may be a viable and balanced choice for the position of DCC President.

Reason_for_Interest: He wishes to strengthen the Congress Party and rebuild it as a strong mass-based organization in the district by activating grassroots workers and undertaking organizational and public outreach activities on a war footing
Strengths: he has  connections with grassroots workers and organizational capability. He is committed to strengthening the Congress Party, mobilizing cadres, countering the BJP’s influence, and expanding the party base in the district.
Weaknesses: The candidate’s support base is presently concentrated mainly within the Pate community, while other communities in the district are not extending adequate support. There is a need for him to build stronger relationships and broader acceptance among other tribal communities. Additionally, he needs to be more politically active and visible in other Assembly segments such as Singhat, Henglep, and Saikot to strengthen his overall organizational outreach in the district.
General_Attitude: In Churachandpur Assembly, several party workers and leaders have recommended his name, stating that he is an active and well-spoken person who raises party issues effectively.However, as per my observation, he belongs to the Paite community, and support from other communities appears to be limited. By profession he is a reporter, and there are also some concerns regarding his ability to manage organizational responsibilities and financial capacity.If the party intends to accommodate him, he may be considered for the position of Working President to provide representation to the Paite community.

Reason_for_Interest: Recommendation – District Congress Committee President (Kiphire)The only nomination received for the post of District Congress Committee President is from K. Tsalimong. He joined the party in 2024 and, since then, has shown remarkable energy and commitment towards rebuilding the organisation.Previously, he was associated with regional parties in Nagaland. He worked with the Naga People’s Front and later with the Nationalist Democratic Progressive Party, where he served as a Working President during 2023–24. Despite holding responsible positions in those parties, he chose to leave and join the Congress Party on ideological grounds.It is important to note that when a large section of our party leadership in the district defected to the ruling regional party, he remained committed and stood with the Congress. In the present circumstances, he is the only active and viable leader sustaining the party structure in the district.During one-to-one consultations and interactions across the district, there was unanimous support for his continuation. Everywhere I visited, party workers expressed that at this juncture, he is the only person capable of leading and reorganising the party at the grassroots level.Currently, the organisational condition of the party in both Assembly segments and at the district level is extremely weak. There is no properly structured grassroots network, and the overall situation is very challenging. However, he has a small but dedicated team and has shown willingness to rebuild the organisation systematically.After consultation with:	•	Block Presidents and district office bearers	•	PCC members and observers	•	State leadershipIt has been unanimously opined that he is the most suitable and fit candidate to continue as District President.Recommendation:In view of the prevailing organisational vacuum and the unanimous opinion of the workers and leadership, it is recommended that K. Tsalimong be continued as President of the District Congress Committee to stabilise and strengthen the party in the district.

Reason_for_Interest: Noklak District Congress Committee – Continuation of District PresidentL.MULAI is the present sitting President of the Noklak District Congress Committee. However, he was unable to attend the meeting despite repeated requests. He informed me that he was at the state headquarters in Kohima and could not travel to Noklak due to his wife’s ill health. The PCC President also confirmed the same situation. The MPCC observer who accompanied me was also aware of these circumstances.In his absence, the meeting was organised by the Vice President. All Block Presidents and district office bearers were present. I stayed in the district for three days and made every possible effort to meet each office bearer individually and conduct one-to-one consultations.During discussions, several opinions emerged:	•	Some members felt that a new District President should be identified.	•	Until such a suitable leader is found, the present President should continue.	•	A few suggested that capable individuals from other parties may be identified and brought into the Congress to strengthen the organisation.	•	Others clearly stated that at present there is no suitable alternative candidate, and therefore he should continue.One of the Vice Presidents submitted his nomination/application for the post. However, after detailed consultations with the PCC President, observers, Block Presidents, and district office bearers, the consensus opinion was that L.MULAI should continue as District President until a more stable organisational arrangement is made.The party’s condition in Noklak remains fragile. Financial constraints are a major issue. The district office requires maintenance, rent, and other operational expenses. Due to these practical difficulties, no other leader is presently willing to assume full responsibility.Although there was discussion that the District President is not permanently residing in the district headquarters, the majority view was that, in the interest of the party, continuity of leadership is essential at this critical stage.He is a senior party worker with long-standing experience and remains willing to shoulder the responsibility. The PCC President has also clearly opined that he should be continued, as he is presently the only eligible and acceptable leader capable of managing the organisation.Recommendation:Considering the organisational vacuum, financial constraints, and unanimous consultation feedback, I recommend that L.MULAI be continued as President of the Noklak District Congress Committee for the time being. After the party structure is strengthened and reorganised at the grassroots level, the leadership issue may be reviewed again.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Naba Kumar Mishra has a long-standing association with the Congress Party and a proven record of leadership within the district. Having contested as the Assembly candidate and later served as District President and District Coordinator, he has consistently been involved in strengthening the organization. His interest in continuing as District President stems from his desire to consolidate party unity, mobilize resources effectively, and prepare the organization for upcoming elections. He believes his experience, public connect, and organizational skills place him in a strong position to lead the district committee and deliver results for the party.
Strengths:
Highly experienced, resourceful, financially sound, well-known advocate in Boudh.
Strong public connectivity and acceptance.
Talented, intellectual, proven organizational manager.
During one-to-one discussions, almost all applicants supported his candidature.
Weaknesses: Does not always involve wider cadre in party activities.
General_Attitude:
General Impression of Party Workers:
Party workers and applicants across the district have shown overwhelming support for the candidature of Shri Naba Kumar Mishra. During one-to-one discussions, almost all leaders endorsed his name as the most suitable for DCC President. He is considered resourceful, experienced, and dependable in managing the organization.
Assessment:
A seasoned leader with long association in party politics.
Served as District President since 2020 and presently functioning as District Coordinator, where he has ensured smooth running of the organization.
Financially strong, intellectually capable, and a well-known lawyer, which enhances his public stature and credibility.
Recognized for his ability to connect with people and command respect within the party.
Remarks:
His administrative experience, resource mobilization, and broad acceptance among party workers make him the front-runner candidate for DCC President in Boudh.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Abdul Kalim Khan has been associated with the Congress Party for a long period, serving as Youth Congress Assembly Constituency President and District Minority President. His interest in the DCC President position comes from his desire to represent the minority community within the party structure and to strengthen the Congress organization in Boudh. He believes his long-standing loyalty, public connections, and financial capacity will enable him to mobilize support and resources for the party. By seeking this role, he aims to expand his organizational involvement and contribute more actively to the district’s political and electoral activities.
Strengths:
Strengths – Abdul Kalim Khan
Loyalty to Party: Long association with the Congress Party, known for his consistent loyalty.
Organizational Roles: Experience as Assembly Youth Congress President and District Minority President.
Public Connectivity: Well-connected with people at the grassroots, enjoys goodwill among sections of society.
Financial Capacity: Has sufficient financial resources to support DCC activities.
Listening Ability: Considered approachable and a good listener, which helps in addressing workers’ issues.
Weaknesses:
Inactive in Recent Years: Has not been actively involved in party activities or election campaigns for nearly a decade.
Organizational Weakness: Limited influence in mobilizing party cadres and coordinating large-scale activities.
Poor Rapport with Senior Leaders: Weak connection with former DCC committee members, reducing his acceptance among old leadership.
Communication Skills: Needs improvement in public speaking and articulation to inspire confidence among workers.
Perceptional Risk: His candidature, being from the minority community, may indirectly benefit the BJP due to local political equations.
General_Attitude:
General Impression of Party Workers:
The overall impression of party leaders and workers towards Shri Abdul Kalim Khan is mixed and divided. While some acknowledge his loyalty to the Congress Party, grassroots connectivity, and financial capacity to support organizational activities, a large section of leaders remain skeptical about his effectiveness.
Assessment:
Workers note that he has not been active in party activities or election campaigns for over a decade, which weakens his organizational credibility.
His rapport with senior and former DCC committee members is weak, limiting his support among the old guard.
Though publicly connected, he is considered organizationally weak and lacking in strong leadership qualities.
Some leaders also fear his candidature could indirectly benefit the BJP due to local political dynamics.
Remarks:
While Shri Abdul Kalim Khan’s loyalty, minority representation, and financial backing are seen as positives, the general opinion tilts against his suitability for the DCC President role, as he lacks proven organizational record and broad-based acceptance among party workers.

Reason_for_Interest: Smt. Bindhya Bini Sahu has been an active Mahila Congress leader for many years, holding different portfolios in the State Women’s Wing. Her interest in the DCC President position comes from her desire to elevate women’s leadership within the district party organization and to bring greater participation of women in political and electoral processes. With her financial strength and long experience in organizational work, she seeks this role to expand her influence beyond Mahila Congress activities and contribute to the larger district leadership of the Congress Party.
Strengths:
Long Party Association: Has worked for the Congress Party for many years as a Mahila Congress leader, holding several state-level portfolios.
Experienced Organizer: Known for her activism and commitment, often described as a “one-woman army.”
Financially Sound: Has the capacity to support party activities and organizational expenses.
Women’s Leadership Face: Represents women leaders within the party and can mobilize women workers effectively.
Dedication: Consistently loyal to the Congress Party and vocal in defending party interests.
Weaknesses:
Limited Public Connectivity: Her influence is confined to a small area and she lacks strong outreach across the entire district.
Organizational Doubts: While active in Mahila Congress, her ability to lead and manage the full District Congress Committee is questioned.
Narrow Focus: She tends to restrict herself to women’s issues rather than broader party-building efforts.
Leadership Style: Seen as more of an individual activist rather than a consensus-builder within the party.
General_Attitude:
General Impression of Party Workers:
Party leaders and workers recognize Smt. Bindhya Bini Sahu as an experienced and financially sound Mahila Congress leader with a long record of service in the organization. She is respected for her dedication and activism, particularly in women’s issues, and is often described as hardworking and vocal.
Assessment:
Workers appreciate her long-standing commitment and her role in Mahila Congress activities.
Her financial strength is considered an asset for organizational functioning.
However, many feel she is confined to a limited area and lacks wide public connectivity across the district.
Concerns are also raised about her capacity to manage and lead the entire district organization, as her leadership has so far been largely within the Mahila Congress framework.
Remarks:
Overall, while respected for her loyalty, experience, and financial backing, the general opinion of party workers is that she may not be fully suitable for the demanding role of District President, unless she expands her outreach and demonstrates broader organizational leadership.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Pradeep Kumar Mahananda, an educated SC activist and social organizer, is keen to contest for the DCC President role to strengthen the representation of Scheduled Castes within the Congress Party in Boudh. Having earlier been associated with social movements and later persuaded to join Congress, he wishes to use his organizational skills to mobilize Dalit communities, energize youth workers, and expand the party’s base. His interest is also driven by his commitment to carry forward his family’s involvement in the party and to work closely with district-level leadership in building a stronger Congress organization.
Strengths:
Educated and Articulate: Comes from an educated background, enabling him to communicate effectively with both grassroots workers and higher leadership.
SC Representation: As a member of the Scheduled Caste community, he has natural acceptance among Dalit groups and can help consolidate this vote base for the Congress.
Organizational Skills: Actively engaged in social work and community mobilization, with experience in running campaigns and connecting with local issues.
Youth Connect: Has built rapport with younger workers and is seen as approachable and energetic in organizational matters.
Family Political Background: His family’s association with Congress gives him credibility and recognition within the party.
Clean Image: Considered honest and sincere, with no major controversies attached to his name.
Weaknesses:
Limited Political Experience within Congress: Although active socially, he does not yet have deep experience in the Congress Party’s organizational structure.
Restricted Influence: His acceptance is largely within certain SC-dominated areas, without a strong footprint across the whole district.
Past Association with BJD: Spent around 15 years with BJD before joining Congress, which raises doubts among some party workers about his loyalty and long-term commitment.
Dependency on Family Background: Relies considerably on his family’s Congress association, with his independent political identity still developing.
Resource Constraints: Compared to financially stronger contenders, he may face challenges in supporting district-wide organizational activities.
Leadership Depth: Needs to build stronger skills in consensus-building and handling intra-party conflicts.
General_Attitude:
General Impression of Party Workers:
Party workers view Shri Pradeep Kumar Mahananda as an educated, energetic, and socially active leader who can help mobilize the SC community and youth in Boudh. His sincerity, clean image, and grassroots connect are appreciated.
Assessment:
Many workers acknowledge his dedication and organizational ability, particularly in SC-dominated areas.
His entry into Congress after 15 years with the BJD, however, creates skepticism among senior leaders and long-standing party workers regarding his loyalty and long-term commitment to Congress.
Some feel his influence is still limited geographically and he needs to prove his ability to manage diverse sections of the district organization.
Despite doubts, younger workers consider him approachable and see potential in his leadership if properly guided.
Remarks:
Overall, the general impression is mixed but cautiously positive—while his past with the BJD remains a concern, his energy, social work, and acceptance among SC communities could make him an asset if he demonstrates firm loyalty to the Congress and expands his reach across the district.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Santanu Kumar Mahapatra is interested in the DCC President position to revive and strengthen the Congress organization in Boudh, where he believes the party has lost ground in recent years. Having been a long-time Congress worker, he wishes to use this leadership role to reorganize the cadre, motivate grassroots workers, and expand the party’s influence across the district. His interest also stems from a personal commitment to counter the ruling party’s dominance in the region and to ensure that Congress regains its traditional support base.
Strengths:
xperienced and Long-standing Congress Worker: Has been associated with the Congress party since his youth, actively participating in organizational activities.
Legal Background: A practicing Advocate with good standing in the district, served as President of the Civil and Criminal Courts Bar, which reflects leadership capacity and credibility among professionals.
Congress Family Background: Hails from a traditional Congress family of Boudh, which helps him maintain party identity and loyalty.
Organizational Knowledge: Familiar with district-level structures and internal functioning of the DCC due to long involvement.
Respected Personality: His professional stature as a lawyer provides him a reputation of integrity and knowledge.
Weaknesses:
Age Factor: Considered relatively older, which may limit his ability to actively mobilize youth and grassroots workers.
Financial Limitations: Not financially sound, restricting his capacity to independently mobilize resources for party activities.
Limited Resource Mobilization Skills: Struggles to attract financial and logistical support from external sources.
Leadership Concerns: Observers note that his leadership quality and mass connect need improvement, as he has not been able to significantly expand party influence.
Groupism Allegations: Seen as involved in internal factional politics, which could affect unity within the district organization.
General_Attitude: The general opinion of party workers towards Shri Santanu Kumar Mahapatra is mixed and not strongly favorable. While he is respected as a senior Congress worker from a traditional Congress family and acknowledged for his legal background and experience, many workers feel he lacks the resources, energy, and mass mobilization capacity needed for the District President role. His age and financial limitations are seen as constraints, and some also point out his tendency towards groupism, which could weaken organizational unity. Overall, while he commands respect, the majority of party workers do not see him as the most suitable choice to lead the district.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Maheswar Pradhan is interested in the DCC President position primarily to re-establish his relevance within the party and revive his political career. Having previously served in the Youth Congress and NSUI, he aspires to use this leadership role to gain organizational importance and visibility in district-level politics. His interest also comes from a desire to expand his role beyond youth politics and position himself as a senior leader within the Congress framework.
Strengths:
outh Congress and NSUI Background: Previously worked with NSUI and Youth Congress, giving him early exposure to party activities and organizational functioning.
Past Party Experience: Has experience in handling youth-related political responsibilities, which can help in understanding cadre issues.
Grassroots Familiarity: Known among some local workers due to his earlier involvement in youth politics.
Commitment to Party Identity: Despite inactivity in recent years, he remains associated with the Congress, showing loyalty to the organization.
Weaknesses:
nactive for Over a Decade: Has not discharged any significant party activity in the last 10 years, leading to loss of visibility and relevance.
Suspended from Youth Congress: Currently under suspension due to failure to perform organizational duties.
Lack of Leadership Qualities: Seen as a passive participant who only attends programs individually without taking initiative.
Poor Financial Condition: Not financially sound, limiting his ability to mobilize resources for party programs.
Weak Public Connect: Has not built strong grassroots support or rapport with district-level workers.
Reliability Concerns: Did not attend the one-to-one interaction with observers, creating doubts about his seriousness and commitment.
General_Attitude: The overall impression of party workers towards Shri Maheswar Pradhan is largely negative. While he has prior experience in NSUI and Youth Congress, he has been inactive for over a decade and has not organized or participated meaningfully in party activities during this time. Workers consider him financially weak, lacking leadership skills, and with poor grassroots connect. His current suspension and absence from discussions have further eroded confidence in his ability to lead the district committee. Overall, party leaders do not view him as a suitable candidate for DCC President.

My Opinion Note
 Ramesh Jena, who is a three-time MLA, has strong influence across the district. However, his leadership style is seen as forceful, which has created some opposition within the organization. He had served as District Congress President from 2019, but was removed from the post just three months before the Assembly elections, and this decision also had an impact on the party’s performance in those elections. Even so, in the current situation, it is difficult to ignore his role. If a district president is chosen with his consent,, that person may remain a dummy and may not take independent decisions.

At present, there is no other leader in the district who is well-known across the area or even has strong recognition in his own constituency. Our party also does not have leaders visible in local body elections, nor are there workers doing issue based politics ,In this situation, appointing someone else would make it very difficult for them to work effectively.

Politics in this district also requires resources, and very few people are in a position to manage them. Therefore, giving  Ramesh Jena the responsibility of district president, with a clear set of tasks, seems practical. One important task would be to bring in leaders and workers from the BJD who wish to join the Congress. At the same time, block Congress presidents must be appointed who are capable and independent in their functioning.

The upcoming 2027 local body elections can be given to Ramesh Jena as a special target, with accountability for their outcome. 
If he is sidelined, he may damage party not only in the district but also, to some extent, at the divisional level.

Until the organization is strengthened and some powerful leaders from the BJD are brought in, it appears necessary to give this responsibility to Ramesh Jena. Personally, I do not find this decision fully right from a moral point of view, but as there is no better option available, his name is being put forward out of necessity.

General_Attitude:
Assessment on Sri Natbar Barik, Senior Congress Leader – Jagatsinghpur District
Background and Contributions
Sri Natbar Barik is a senior Congress leader with a long-standing clean track record. Beginning his political career in the student wing NSUI, he went on to serve in multiple important organizational and elected roles including Zilla Parishad Member, Zilla Parishad President, and State Chairman of the Land Development Board. These roles demonstrate his organizational capacity, popularity, and acceptance across the district.
His Gandhian style of politics, loyalty, and consistent presence in the party, even at times when other senior leaders like Shri Chiranjeev Biswal left for BJD or BJP, underline his commitment to Congress ideology. He continues to enjoy respect among party cadres and senior leaders in the district.
Concerns and Limitations
1. Age Factor: At nearly 75 years, his ability to lead dynamic agitations, mass mobilizations, and extensive organizational travel is naturally limited.
2. Electoral Performance: In the 2024 Assembly elections, the party’s performance  even in his own assembly constituency Jagatsinghpur was extremely poor (Pratima Mallick securing only 5,932 votes, i.e., 3.48%). This reflects organizational weakness under his leadership.
3. Organizational Effectiveness: Despite being DCC President since 2018, the party has suffered significant erosion in the district due to defections and lack of robust agitation programs. The present organizational strength remains inadequate to counter rivals.
4. Strategic Importance: At the same time, his stature and influence in Jagatsinghpur politics cannot be ignored. Removing him abruptly may alienate his supporters and create factional issues.
Options Before the Party
Option 1: Continue as DCC President
Retain him as DCC President by emphasizing unity, loyalty, and seniority, even while overlooking age. This will consolidate his supporters and avoid internal rifts, though organizational revival under him remains doubtful.
Option 2: Elevation to PCC / Advisory Role
Provide him a dignified position at the PCC level or as a senior advisor, thereby recognizing his decades of service while enabling the party to appoint a younger, more dynamic leader as DCC President for 2027 local body elections and 2029 assembly elections. This balances respect for his legacy with practical needs for rejuvenation.
Conclusion
Sri Natbar Barik is a respected leader whose integrity, popularity, and loyalty are beyond doubt. However, given the urgent need for energetic organizational strengthening, the party must carefully weigh whether to retain him as DCC President or to honorably shift him to a senior advisory role while preparing new leadership in Jagatsinghpur.
