Reason_for_Interest: G. Shrinivas Rao is interested in the DCC President position to strengthen the Congress organization in Malkangiri with his experience and grassroots connect. Being based at the headquarters and popular among the Bengali community, he feels well-positioned to unify the cadre and expand the party’s reach. His leadership in transport associations and strong rapport with officials give him confidence to deliver results, resolve local issues, and build a stronger Congress for upcoming elections
Strengths:
He is Based at the district headquarters, making him easily accessible to people and party workers.
He is popular and widely accepted among the Bengali community in Malkangiri.
Contested elections and lost by a very narrow margin due to pressure from the BJD government on the business community of Malkangiri. 
He serves as the President of the Lorry Association, giving him strong grassroots influence.
Also leads the Auto Union, Daly Market Association and transport Union, enhancing his organizational reach.
He is in regular touch with officials, ensuring smooth coordination and access.
Popular across Malkangiri district for his problem-solving approach and leadership qualities.
Weaknesses:
He has limited literacy (10th Pass). His educational background is limited, which sometimes restricts his ability to connect with educated urban voters or articulate complex policy matters effectively. This can be seen as a drawback in higher-level political debates and discussions.

Infight with Mangu Khilla and Govind Patra: Ongoing differences with senior leaders like MLA Mangu Khilla and district leader Govind Patra have created internal friction. Such factionalism can weaken the unity of the party at the district level and impact coordination during elections.

Not Well Known in Chitrakonda: While he is popular in Malkangiri headquarters and among the Bengali community, his recognition and organizational base are weaker in Chitrakonda. This lack of presence in a key constituency limits his reach across the entire district.
General_Attitude:
G. Shrinivas Rao is a well-recognized Congress leader from Malkangiri district, with a long track record of active political engagement and organizational responsibilities. Based at the district headquarters, he remains accessible to both officials and the general public, which strengthens his role as a bridge between people and the party. His popularity among the Bengali community gives him a solid community base that the Congress party can leverage for electoral advantage. His leadership of the Lorry Union, Daly market association and Transport Association further broadens his organizational influence and connects him with working-class groups, enhancing his ability to mobilize people and resources.

He has also shown resilience in electoral politics, contesting a municipal election and narrowly losing under the pressure of the BJD government machinery. This experience demonstrates both his competitiveness and his potential to emerge stronger with better organizational support. Known for being in regular touch with officials, Rao has built a reputation as someone capable of getting work done effectively, which adds to his credibility among local citizens. His popularity in Malkangiri headquarters makes him a familiar and approachable leader.

However, certain weaknesses need to be acknowledged. His educational qualification, being only a 10th pass, sometimes limits his appeal among educated sections and may affect his ability to articulate broader policy narratives. Additionally, his ongoing infight with leaders like Mangu Khilla and Govind Patra poses challenges for internal unity within the Congress in Malkangiri. Without resolving such factional differences, the district unit risks being divided during crucial electoral battles. Another limitation is that Rao is not well-known in Chitrakonda, a key constituency, which restricts his influence in the entire district.

Overall, G. Shrinivas Rao combines strong organizational influence, accessibility, and popularity with the need to overcome educational limitations, factionalism, and weak presence in certain areas. If his strengths are consolidated—particularly his community base, official connect, and grassroots leadership—and his weaknesses are managed through teamwork and broader outreach, he can be an effective DCC President who strengthens the Congress in Malkangiri. He was recommended by most of the senior leaders of the party.

Reason_for_Interest: Mangu Khilla is interested in becoming District Congress President as he wants to strengthen the party and unite its cadre in Malkangiri. Coming from a humble background and rising from Sarpanch to MLA, he has also served in Youth Congress, Kissan Congress, and at the zonal level, which gives him strong organizational experience. As a prominent tribal leader with influence over 58% of the tribal vote, his leadership would give the community stronger representation. He also aims to reduce factionalism and act as a unifying force, taking responsibility to revive and expand Congress in the district.
Strengths:
Belongs to the tribal (Community, giving him strong acceptance among tribals.

Recognized as a Tribal Leader, influential over nearly 58% tribal votes in the constituency.

Currently a sitting MLA from Chitrakonda, with proven electoral success.

Political journey from Sarpanch to Zila Panchayat member to MLA, showcasing strong grassroots connect.

Comes from a humble background, making him relatable to ordinary people.

Knows the system well through long political and organizational experience.

Active on the ground, frequently engaging with villagers and addressing issues.

Financially stable, enabling independent spending for public welfare and campaigns.

Holds the position of General Secretary, PCC, giving him organizational strength at the state level.
Weaknesses:
Needs to establish a residence in the district headquarters to improve presence and accessibility.

Restricted mobility due to Naxalism, which limits his ability to reach all interior areas of the constituency.

May face challenges in being fully acceptable in Malkangiri town politics, where other leaders hold stronger influence.

Needs to become more accessible and approachable to party workers and common people beyond his core base.
General_Attitude:
Mangu Khilla is the sitting MLA from Chitrakonda representing the Indian National Congress. He has risen from a humble background, starting his political career as a Sarpanch  steadily climbing the ladder to become an MLA and now holding the position of General Secretary in the Pradesh Congress Committee (PCC). This journey reflects his strong grassroots connection, resilience, and the trust he has earned over the years.

Belonging to the Gadba community, which constitutes a significant portion of the tribal vote base in Malkangiri, Mangu Khilla enjoys natural acceptance among tribals. His position as a tribal leader gives him direct influence over almost 58% of the tribal electorate. This makes him not only a strong candidate in elections but also a unifying figure for a large segment of society.

As a sitting MLA, Mangu Khilla brings both legislative experience and administrative understanding. He knows the system well, which helps him in navigating governance structures and addressing people’s issues effectively. His financial stability further strengthens his position, as he can independently support social activities, election campaigns, and developmental initiatives, making him less dependent on party funds.

One of Mangu Khilla’s biggest strengths is his accessibility and active presence on the ground. He frequently engages with villagers, attends local events, and remains responsive to the needs of the people. His down-to-earth nature, coupled with his tribal roots, ensures that people see him as one of their own rather than a distant leader.

However, there are certain weaknesses that need to be addressed. He does not currently reside in the district headquarters, which sometimes affects his visibility and accessibility in central Malkangiri. The problem of Naxalism also limits his ability to reach every corner of the constituency, particularly remote interior villages. Additionally, while he is highly accepted in Chitrakonda, he may not yet enjoy the same level of influence in Malkangiri town politics, where the dynamics are different. To strengthen his profile further, he also needs to become more accessible to party workers and grassroots functionaries across the district.

Despite these limitations, Mangu Khilla has the qualities of a natural leader who commands respect across tribal belts and has already proven his capabilities as a legislator. His combination of being financially stable, politically experienced, and holding organizational responsibility in the PCC makes him a key asset for the Congress party in Malkangiri.

Given the current factionalism and group rivalries within the party, Mangu Khilla’s stature and acceptance across communities can be effectively used to bring unity. His elevation as a Working President of the District Congress could act as a balancing factor, ensuring coordination among different groups while also giving the tribal community a strong sense of representation. This move would not only strengthen the party structure but also project him as a consensus builder capable of reducing internal divisions.

In conclusion, Mangu Khilla embodies a blend of grassroots connect, tribal leadership, organizational experience, and financial strength. While he must work on improving accessibility and visibility in the headquarters, his overall profile makes him an influential and dependable leader. Assigning him a larger role, such as Working President, could both utilize his strengths and address factional challenges in the party, paving the way for greater unity and effectiveness in Malkangiri.

Reason_for_Interest: Smruti Ranjan is interested in the President role because of his long-standing association with the party and his belief that his experience can strengthen the organization. As a former Panchayat Samiti Chairman and leader of the Samiti Members’ Association, he brings maturity and credibility. With strong official connections, financial stability, and his wife’s influence as District Social Welfare Officer, he feels equipped to guide the party, maintain unity, and mentor younger leaders. At this stage, he sees the role as an opportunity to contribute through organizational leadership rather than electoral politics.
Strengths:
Former Chairman of the Mathili Panchayat Samiti, giving him electoral experience.

Actively engaged in politics since his youth congress days, ensuring long-standing credibility and loyalty towards the party.

Financially sound, capable of supporting political and organizational activities.

A well-known figure in the district, not a new or unfamiliar face.

Maintains strong connections with officials, enabling smooth coordination.

His wife served as the District Social Welfare Officer, further enhancing his influence, administrative reach, and amongst the female voters.
Weaknesses:
At 65 years of age, he may face limitations in terms of energy compared to younger leaders.

Has been away from active electoral politics for a long period, which may weaken his direct voter connect.

Possible generational gap could lead to some disconnect with youth aspirations and modern political strategies.
General_Attitude:
Smruti Ranjan is a seasoned and respected leader who has contributed significantly to the political and social landscape of Malkangiri. Having served as the Panchayat Samiti Chairman of Mathili block, as well as the Chairman of the Samiti Members, he carries with him years of administrative and organizational experience. His leadership at the grassroots level gave him a strong foundation in governance and allowed him to develop a deep understanding of people’s needs.

Active in politics since his youth, Smruti Ranjan has been a constant presence in the party’s activities over decades. This long journey has earned him credibility, loyalty, and recognition both within the organization and among the people. Unlike many emerging leaders, he is not a new or unfamiliar face but a name known for accessibility and dedication.

One of his major strengths lies in his connections with officials and administrators, which provide him with the ability to act quickly on issues. His wife, being the District Social Welfare Officer, also enhances his reach in official circles, allowing him to combine political influence with administrative support. This unique combination has positioned him as a leader who can get things done effectively for his people.

Financial stability is another strength of Smruti Ranjan. Being financially sound, he has the ability to support party activities and social programs without over-dependence on external resources. This allows him to contribute meaningfully during elections, campaigns, and welfare initiatives, further strengthening his standing within the party.


At the same time, there are certain limitations to his profile. At 65 years of age, he may not have the same energy level and long-term political prospects as younger leaders. Additionally, having stayed away from electoral politics for a long time, his direct voter base may not be as active or engaged as before.

Another challenge is the generational gap. With today’s youth forming a large share of the electorate, Smruti Ranjan may face some disconnect in fully understanding or aligning with their aspirations. While his experience is widely respected, bridging this gap with youth-focused initiatives would be necessary for him to remain highly relevant.

Despite these limitations, his experience, maturity, and seniority make him an important pillar of the party. He brings stability, wisdom, and organizational strength that can balance internal dynamics. His role could be especially valuable in guiding younger leaders, strengthening grassroots organization, and maintaining unity within the party.

Overall, Smruti Ranjan represents a blend of experience, accessibility, financial capability, and administrative reach, though with natural challenges of age and distance from electoral politics. If utilized strategically, he can continue to play a crucial role in party affairs, organizational strengthening, and connecting the administration with the people.

Reason_for_Interest: Bhima Barse aspires to become the DCC President because he believes his long-standing grassroots connect and tribal support can strengthen the Congress party in Malkangiri. As a leader who has been elected Sarpanch twice and served as President of the Jila Sarpanch Sangh, he feels prepared to take greater responsibility in shaping the organization. His humble and approachable nature has earned him respect among party workers, and he sees this role as an opportunity to unify the tribal community under the party’s banner. For him, becoming DCC President is about service, representation, and building a stronger Congress base.
Strengths:
Belongs to Koya ST community who are in majority in the district.

Elected Sarpanch twice, showing people’s trust

An acceptable face across the district

Humble and approachable personality

Held position in Jila Sarpanch Sangh, giving him wider outreach throughout the district.
Weaknesses:
Financially Weak – Bhima Barse does not have strong financial backing, which often limits his ability to run large-scale campaigns or manage the expenses that come with modern-day politics.

Not Acceptable in Town Area – While he enjoys wide support in rural and tribal regions, he lacks strong presence and acceptability in urban and town areas, which restricts his overall influence.

No Touch with Government Officials – He does not maintain close relationships with administrative or government officials, which reduces his ability to influence policy decisions or get immediate support for local issues.
General_Attitude:
Bhima Barse is a grassroots leader who has earned credibility and recognition through his long association with the tribal community. Belonging to the Koya sect, which forms the majority population in Malkangiri district, he naturally commands respect and influence among the tribals. His repeated election as Sarpanch twice is evidence of the trust people have placed in him, and his role as the key post holder of the Jila Sarpanch Sangh has given him wider organizational exposure across the district. He is widely accepted in rural and tribal belts as a humble, approachable, and people-centric leader who stands close to the masses.

One of his biggest strengths lies in his acceptability within the Congress party structure. Party workers see him as a simple, down-to-earth leader who is accessible and supportive. His ability to connect with the grassroots makes him an asset for strengthening the organization in remote and rural areas. He is also recognized as a leader who can unify tribal voices and consolidate support for the party.

At the same time, Bhima Barse carries certain limitations. He is financially weak, which restricts his ability to manage the increasing demands of modern electoral politics. His influence is largely confined to rural areas, as he is not widely acceptable in towns and urban centres. Moreover, his lack of strong connections with government officials reduces his administrative leverage, which at times limits his capacity to get work done through official channels.

Despite these weaknesses, Bhima Barse remains a respected and acceptable tribal leader. If the party’s priority is to project a strong tribal face for organizational leadership, he can be considered a suitable candidate for the position of DCC President. His tribal identity, combined with grassroots acceptance and a humble image, would help the party consolidate its base in the majority tribal population of the district. However, his limitations in urban acceptability and financial strength would need to be supplemented by collective support from the party structure.

Reason_for_Interest: Govind Patra is deeply committed to strengthening the Congress party in Malkangiri, especially after he rebuilt the organisation from scratch when many leaders left following Pradeep Manjhi’s exit. Under his leadership, the party won the Chitrakonda seat and secured its highest vote percentage in recent elections. A lawyer by profession, he has always stood by Congress workers, even contesting their cases free of charge. With over 15 years of organisational experience and a strong grassroots connect, he believes he still has the energy, vision, and leadership to guide the party effectively as District Congress Committee President.
Strengths:
Took over the Congress party in Malkangiri after Pradeep Manjhi left, rebuilding it from ground zero.

Lawyer by profession, providing him with legal expertise and credibility.

Over 15 years of experience as DCC President, demonstrating long-term leadership and organisational skills.

Well-known and respected face across the district, with strong local recognition.

He has been the President of the Bar Council, reflecting professional standing and influence.

Fights court cases for Congress workers free of charge, earning trust and goodwill among party members.
Weaknesses:
Age 62, which may limit energy and long-term availability for active leadership.

Cannot dedicate full time to party work due to other commitments.

Belongs to the OBC category, which may limit broader tribal representation in the district.

May face challenges in connecting with younger party members and the youth demographic.

It has been almost 15 years that he has been the District President. Party workers are looking for a change.
General_Attitude:
Govinda Patra is a seasoned political leader in Malkangiri, widely respected for his resilience and dedication to the Congress party. After Pradeep Manjhi left the party, Patra stepped in at a critical time, taking over a district unit that was facing a severe leadership vacuum. He rebuilt the organisation from the ground up, motivating workers, uniting factions, and restoring confidence among the grassroots cadre. His leadership was instrumental in Congress winning the Chitrakonda Assembly seat and securing the highest vote percentage for the party in Malkangiri compared to the last three elections.

A lawyer by profession, Patra brings significant legal expertise to his political role. He was the President of the Bar Council and regularly fights court cases for Congress workers free of charge, earning immense goodwill and loyalty among party members. This combination of legal acumen and political experience makes him a dependable leader who safeguards the interests of his colleagues while ensuring organisational stability.

Patra has over 15 years of experience as DCC President, demonstrating his long-term commitment and strong organisational skills. He is a well-known and respected face in the district, with a deep grassroots connect. His inclusive leadership style and accessibility have helped bridge gaps within the party and strengthen its presence at the district level.

However, Patra’s age of 62 and other professional commitments mean he cannot devote full time to party work, which may limit his day-to-day availability. As an OBC leader, there may be challenges in appealing to all tribal communities across the district. Additionally, connecting with younger party members and the youth demographic could be a challenge, given the generational gap.

Despite these limitations, Patra’s track record speaks for itself. His ability to revive a struggling organisation, guide it to electoral success, and serve party workers with dedication positions him as a reliable and influential leader. His vision, commitment, and deep-rooted connections make him a natural choice for district leadership. Considering his long-term contributions, proven leadership, and organizational capability, Govind Patra should be promoted to the Pradesh Congress Committee, where his experience and insight can benefit the party at the state level.

Reason_for_Interest: Binanti Khillo initially came forward in support of another party member during the ongoing discussions, showing her loyalty and commitment to teamwork within the Congress family. However, after being convinced by senior leaders about her own potential and the need for fresh leadership in the district, she agreed to fill the form for the DCC President post. This reflects her openness to responsibility and her willingness to take on larger roles for the party’s growth. As a young Odia SC leader, she represents both social empowerment and generational change, making her an ideal choice to connect with women, youth, and marginalized communities. Her entry into the contest is not driven by personal ambition but by the belief that she can contribute to strengthening the organization. With proper guidance, she has the potential to emerge as a capable leader and a valuable asset for the Mahila Congress in Malkangiri.
Strengths:
Young and Dynamic: Binanti Khillo is a young female leader. Her youth allows her to connect easily with the younger generation, making her an influential voice among aspiring leaders.
Odia SC Leader: As a member of the Scheduled Caste community, she represents marginalized voices effectively, giving her credibility and acceptance within her community and among socially-conscious voters.
Promising Youth Leader: Her early achievements and active involvement in local governance showcase her potential for higher leadership roles. She is seen as a rising leader amongst the SC community.
Weaknesses:
Geographical Distance: Being based in Chitrakonda (70 km away from Malkangiri), she may face challenges in effectively leading and managing party activities across the entire Malkangiri district. She is situated at the corner of the district touching Andhra border.

New Face in Politics: As a relatively new entrant to the larger political landscape, she lacks the long-standing visibility and recognition that senior leaders enjoy.

Acceptability Issues: While she has support in certain pockets, building widespread acceptance across diverse communities in the district could take time.

Limited Political Background: She does not come from a strong political family or network, which may restrict her access to established party resources and influence.
General_Attitude:
Binanti Khillo is a young leader from the Odia Scheduled Caste community. Her energy, enthusiasm, and fresh perspective make her a promising youth leader, especially in the context of empowering women and marginalized communities. Her early achievements in local governance have already highlighted her potential to take on larger leadership responsibilities, and she is seen as a rising star capable of strengthening the party’s presence among youth and women.

Despite her strengths, Binanti faces certain challenges. Being based in Chitrakonda, she may find it difficult to manage the entire Malkangiri district effectively. As a relatively new face in politics, she does not yet have widespread recognition or a strong political background, and her acceptability across all sections of the district may require time and effort.

Recently, Binanti Khillo came forward to meet the the AICC observer, initially showing support for another member. However, after discussions and convincing, she agreed to fill the form for the DCC President post. This step reflects her willingness to step up and take responsibility, demonstrating her commitment to the party and her readiness for leadership roles.

Given her profile, Binanti has the potential to grow into a strong leader within the Mahila Congress, promoting women’s participation and youth engagement in politics. With proper guidance and exposure, she can emerge as a key figure in the district, representing both the SC community and the aspirations of young women leaders.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Purna Chandra Biswal is aspiring for the DCC President post because he sees it as a natural progression of his political journey, a chance to represent OBCs and other underrepresented communities, an opportunity to revive the organisation with his resources and network, and a way to position himself as the Congress face in Mayurbhanj East.
Strengths:
1. Strong grassroots connect; active in all blocks
2. Broad acceptance across OBC, ST, Minority and General communities
3. Financially stable; capable of sustaining party activities
4. Proven organisational skills; effective in mobilisation & coordination
5. Served as DCC Working President (2018) – experienced in leadership roles
6. Calm, approachable, consensus-oriented leader
7. Loyal Congressman; no cross-party involvement
8. Good support among youth and active workers
9. Clean image; non-controversial and disciplined
10. Aligns with Sangathan Srijan Abhiyan focus on inclusivity & representation
Weaknesses:
1. Limited visibility beyond district-level politics; lacks wider state recognition
2. Needs to sharpen public speaking and mass communication skills
3. May require stronger political assertiveness to counter entrenched leaders
4. Relatively less experience in electoral contests compared to senior rivals
5. Over dependence on personal financial resources could become a strain
6. Needs greater exposure to modern campaign methods (digital outreach, media handling)
7. Requires close guidance from PCC/AICC to maintain organisational discipline and avoid factional pulls
8. Balancing expectations from multiple communities (OBC, ST, Minority, General) could be a challenge
General_Attitude:
As part of the Sangathan Srijan Abhiyan review, it is observed that the Congress organisation in Mayurbhanj (East) requires a leadership that can bridge communities, energise workers, and represent the aspirations of the majority population, especially the OBC and tribal communities who have long been underrepresented.
In this context, Shri Purna Chandra Biswal (OBC) emerges as a strong contender for the post of District Congress Committee President:
Organisational Experience: He has earlier served as Working President (2018) and demonstrated his ability to mobilise cadres and coordinate district-level programmes effectively.
Financial Stability: Being financially sound and a contractor by profession, he is capable of supporting the party organisation independently and sustaining regular political activity.
Community Connect: Maintains strong relations across communities—OBC, ST, Minority, and General Category - which ensures broader acceptance within the district.
Grassroot Acceptability: Enjoys goodwill among Congress workers across blocks, having maintained consistent contact and support at the grassroots level.
Ideological Commitment: A committed Congressman who follows the party’s ideology, he has no history of cross-party involvement or conflicting interests.
Generally regarded as approachable and accessible, maintaining regular contact with workers.
Seen as a loyal Congressman with no history of cross-party dealings, which builds trust.
Enjoys a positive image across blocks, with workers acknowledging his simplicity and inclusive approach.
Considered a non-controversial leader, which makes him acceptable to different factions.
Grassroots cadres, especially OBC and ST workers, view him as a representative voice of underrepresented communities.
Overall, party workers perceive him as a dependable and widely acceptable leader who can strengthen the organisation at the grassroots.

Reason_for_Interest: Arabinda Das aspires to be DCC President to consolidate his long organisational career, leverage youth and factional support, strengthen his family’s political legacy, and position himself as the dominant Congress face in Mayurbhanj East.
Strengths:
1. Long organisational background with roles as NSUI District President, DCC Vice-President, General Secretary, and currently DCC Coordinator
2. Recognised and branded as a committed Congressman in Mayurbhanj
3. Strong youth following and influence among student and young worker groups
4. Known for his aggressive and assertive leadership style, which helps in mobilising cadres during campaigns
5. Entrenched presence in district politics; maintains visibility and involvement in organisational activities
6. Good public speaking and mass contact skills, rooted in his student leadership background
7. Politically ambitious and proactive, willing to take initiative for organisational revival
8. Seen as resourceful and networked, with access to senior leaders at state level
9. Has developed a distinct identity within the Congress organisation despite internal factionalism
Weaknesses:
1. Family legacy carries mixed perception, often linked with opportunism and horse-trading
2. Aggressive leadership style sometimes seen as domineering, which may alienate sections of workers
3. Factional alignment with different senior leaders may create doubts about his independence and consistency
4. Despite youth following, his appeal beyond student/youth circles is limited
5. Needs to broaden connect with OBC and tribal communities, who form the majority in Mayurbhanj East
6. Has not yet demonstrated significant success in electoral contests or wider mass movements
7. Risk of being perceived as too entrenched in old power networks, which may hinder inclusive organisational revival
8. Requires stronger focus on team-building and consensus-building rather than individual projection
General_Attitude: Backed by Shri Niranjan Patnaik and family sometimes, sometimes Ms. Sushila Tiriya and Group. Aggressive, entrenched. Family legacy associated with opportunism and horse-trading. He is currently serving as the District Congress Committee (DCC) Coordinator of Mayurbhanj East District. Earlier, he held several key organizational positions, including District President of the NSUI in Mayurbhanj, Vice-President of the DCC, and General Secretary of the DCC. His political career began during his student days, when he was elected President of the Law College Students` Union.

Criminal_Record: There is one case pending against Sri Jyoti Prakash Rath before the Special Judge, Vigilance, Mayurbhanj T.C. Case No.187/13 (VGR Case No.35/2005) U/s.13(2) read with 13(1)(d) of P.C. Act and U/s.120(B)/420 I.P.C.
Reason_for_Interest: Shri Jyoti Prakash Rath aspires to be DCC President to provide clean, credible, and neutral leadership, unify factions, and strengthen the Congress organisation with dignity and ideological commitment.
Strengths:
Senior advocate with strong social credibility and respect in Mayurbhanj
Known for his clean image, dignity, and mild-speaking nature
Experience as General Secretary of DCC and member of PCC
Non-factional and neutral, acceptable to different groups
Loyal to Congress ideology, no record of cross-party dealings
Commands respect in Baripada Assembly constituency and among educated, professional sections
Seen as approachable and balanced, with a reputation for integrity
Weaknesses:
Financially weak compared to other contenders, limiting ability to fund sustained organisational activities
Less aggressive and assertive, which may reduce his effectiveness in dealing with entrenched factions
Limited mass mobilisation experience beyond professional and urban circles
Relatively low visibility among youth, OBC, and tribal communities who form majority in the district
May require strong support and guidance from PCC/AICC to manage organisational challenges
General_Attitude:
A respected senior advocate from Baripada Assembly constituency, Shri Rath enjoys high social credibility and carries a clean public image. Known for his mild-speaking and dignified nature, he is well-regarded among the people of Mayurbhanj.
He has earlier served as General Secretary of the District Congress Committee (DCC) and as a member of the Pradesh Congress Committee (PCC). Despite being financially weak compared to other contenders, he remains a committed Congressman, loyal to the party’s ideology, and is not aligned with any political faction.
Recommendation: Shri Jyoti Prakash Rath represents a credible and non-controversial leadership option. His social respectability and clean image strengthen his acceptability, though his financial limitations may restrict the scale of organisational activities he can independently sustain.

Criminal_Record:
(i) T.C. No.83/13 (VGR Case No.59/2000) U/s.13(2) read with 13(1)(2) P.C. Act and U/s.120-B and 420 I.P.C. pending before the Court of Special Judge -cum- Vigilance Judge, Mayurbhanj at Baripada. 
(ii) That other 3 to 4 criminal cases are pending against Sri Pravash Kar Mohapatra before the Magistrate First Cass at Baripada District of Mayurbhanj.
Reason_for_Interest: Sees the DCC President post as an opportunity to regain political relevance after repeated electoral defeats. Aspires to consolidate his financial influence and networks into formal organisational authority. Believes his long association with Congress, from NSUI and Youth Congress days, gives him a rightful claim to leadership. Wants to use the position to rebuild personal credibility and reassert himself as a key player in Morada and district politics. Considers the role a platform to strengthen his bid for future electoral opportunities
Strengths:
Long association with Congress, active since student politics
Former President of both NSUI and Youth Congress (district level)
Maintains a recognisable face in Morada Assembly constituency and nearby areas
Strong financial capacity to fund campaigns and organisational activities
Experienced in electioneering, having contested three Assembly elections
Ability to mobilise resources and workers quickly when required
Maintains connections with senior leaders and organisational structures
Weaknesses:
Contested three Assembly elections but lost all, raising doubts about mass appeal
Heavy reliance on money power, sometimes overshadowing ideological commitment
Famously quoted, “First Pravas Kar Congress, then Congress Party” – reflects a perception of self-centric politics
Seen as factional and individualistic, which could deepen internal divides
Limited acceptance among grassroots cadres, especially OBC and tribal workers
Electoral setbacks have weakened his credibility among party workers
Risk of projecting the image of a money-driven leader rather than an ideological Congressman
General_Attitude:
Shri Pravas Kar Mahapatra has been an active Congress leader from the Morada Assembly constituency, where he has contested Assembly elections three times, though unsuccessfully. His political journey began as a grassroots youth leader, having served as President of both the NSUI and the Youth Congress, where he built his early base in student and youth politics.
He is known for operating with strong financial backing and organisational resources, though his over-reliance on money power has often drawn criticism. Famously, he once remarked, “First Pravas Kar Congress, then Congress Party,” a statement that reflects both his self-confidence and the perception of personal dominance in his political style.
Recommendation: While his electoral record remains weak, Shri Pravas Kar Mahapatra continues to hold relevance within the organisation due to his long involvement, financial capacity, and established base. His candidature may be considered with caution, keeping in mind the need for collective leadership and organisational inclusivity.

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Kshirod Chandra Patra (SC) seeks the position of DCC President to further strengthen the Congress organisation in Mayurbhanj (East). Having improved his electoral performance from 9,000 votes (2009, JMM) to nearly 18,000 votes (2024, INC), he believes he has steadily built a support base and enjoys credibility among the people, especially Scheduled Caste communities and youth. His strong oratory skills and ability to connect with common voters make him confident of mobilising grassroots workers. He feels that with organisational backing and recognition, he can expand the Congress’s presence more effectively and consolidate SC support for the party in the district.
Strengths:
1. Electoral Experience – Contested Assembly elections twice (2009 from JMM, 2024 from INC) and improved vote share significantly.
2. Public Connect – Recognised as a strong orator with the ability to engage and inspire the masses.
3. Community Support – Commands goodwill among Scheduled Caste communities and growing acceptance in Baripada region.
4. Consistency – Despite limited resources, has maintained active political presence for over 15 years.
5. Youth Appeal – Known to connect well with younger voters through direct interaction and speeches.
Weaknesses:
1. Resource Constraints – Limited financial and organisational capacity hampers his ability to build a strong grassroots network.
2. Organisational Reach – Influence largely confined to Baripada; has not been able to expand effectively across other blocks.
3. Dependence on Oratory – Relies heavily on speeches and public connect, but lacks a robust organisational team to convert goodwill into structured support.
4. Electoral Record – Though improved, has not yet achieved a winning performance in Assembly elections.
5. Visibility within Party – Compared to senior leaders, his presence and influence at district/state Congress forums remain relatively limited.
General_Attitude: Shri Kshirod Chandra Patra (SC) – An educated and politically active leader with a consistent presence in electoral politics. He first contested the Assembly election in 2009 on a JMM ticket from Baripada and secured close to 9,000 votes, establishing his base in the constituency. In 2024, as the INC candidate from Baripada, he significantly improved his performance, polling nearly 18,000 votes, which reflected growing acceptance among the electorate. He is widely recognised for his sharp oratory skills and ability to connect with common people during public meetings. Despite his popularity and speaking ability, his organisational growth has been constrained due to limited financial and structural resources.

Criminal_Record:
1. Political Case finalised
2. Road Blockage Case Pending
Reason_for_Interest: Shri Dukhi Shyam Murmu (ST) seeks the role of DCC President to strengthen the Congress organisation among the tribal communities, who form a significant part of Mayurbhanj (East). Having contested Assembly elections, he believes his experience and tribal identity give him natural acceptance at the grassroots. He feels that with organisational backing, he can mobilise tribal youth and workers more effectively, expand the party’s reach in remote areas, and ensure greater representation of ST communities in Congress leadership. His aspiration is also driven by the belief that the party must give a stronger role to tribal leadership in the district.
Strengths:
1. Represents the tribal community, providing him with natural social and political connect in the region.
2. Experienced in electoral politics, familiar with campaign dynamics.
3. Recognised as a loyal party worker with consistent political activity.
Weaknesses:
1. Lacks financial and organisational resources to expand his base.
2. Influence remains confined to a limited area; not yet able to build a strong district-wide organisation.
3. Has yet to secure a breakthrough electoral victory.
4. Politically associated with Pravash Kar Mahapatra, which affects his independent leadership projection.
General_Attitude: Active tribal leader with electoral experience, having contested Assembly elections. Known for his presence in local politics but has not yet been able to translate visibility into a winning performance.

Weaknesses: जिले में चार व्यक्ति ऐसे हैं जिसमें विभु मिश्रा कमल साहू हुसैन खान और रंजीत दास यह चार व्यक्ति अगर मिल जाए तो जिले में संगठन को बनते हुए समय नहीं लगेगा

It is also important to point out that because Ghasiram Majhi contested 2024 assembly elections independently without any party affiliation, his INC membership was suspended in 2024, but his suspension was later revoked by current PCC cheif and he has been given the responsibility of DCC coordinator, Nuapada.

Reason_for_Interest: संगठन का कार्यकर्ता होने के नाते बनना चाहता है। राजनीतिक परिवार का व्यक्ति है। इनके चाचा श्री अश्विनी गुरु 1980 से 1985 तक कांग्रेस से विधायक रहे।
Strengths: युवा है नौजवानों में अच्छी पकड़ है।  मेरे जिले में दौरे के दौरान ग्रास रूट के काफ़ी कार्यकर्ताओं ने इनके नाम का सुझाव दिया था। इस जिले में पहले कांग्रेस पार्टी में दो लोग का दबदबा रहा है जिसमे एक आसफ़ अली ख़ान व दूसरे इनके चाचा अश्वनी गुरु। दोनों का जिले में अच्छा प्रभाव है। लेकिन अश्वनी गुरु की मृत्यु हो चुकी है। ये अमित गुरु उनके भतीजे है। इन्होंने युवाओ में अच्छी पैठ बनायी है। आर्थिक रूप से भी समृद्ध है। लंबे समय से पार्टी संगठन में काम कर रहे है। अगर आसफ़ अली ख़ान नहीं बनते है तो युवा के नाते ये ठीक है और अगर आसफ़ अली ख़ान को बनाया जाता है तो अमित गुरु को कार्यकारी जिला अध्यक्ष बनाया जाना पार्टी हित में होगा। इससे ये दोनों ग्रुप बैलेंस हो जाएँगे। और वरिष्ठ और युवा का अच्छा सामंजस्य भी हो जाएगा।
Weaknesses: पुरानी गुटबाजी होने से आसफ़ अली को स्वीकार्य नहीं होगा। वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने किसी ने अभी तक इनका नाम आगे नहीं बढ़ाया। वरिष्ठ नेताओं से सामंजस्य बढ़ाना होगा। गुटबाजी से दूर रहना होगा।
General_Attitude: युवा व ब्लॉक स्तरीय कार्यकर्ताओं में इनको लेकर अच्छी राय रही। युवा है मेहनत करके पार्टी को मजबूत कर सकते है। अभी पार्टी की यहाँ अच्छे हालत नहीं है मेहनत करके पार्टी कार्यकर्ताओं में जोश ला सकते है। आसफ़ अली व दुर्गा पाड़ी से सामंजस्य ठीक नहीं है। बाक़ी दो विधानसभा उम्मीदवार की दूसरी वरीयता इसको लेकर है। पार्टी के लिए नया विकल्प हो सकता है।

Reason_for_Interest: लंबे समय तक पार्टी संगठन में काम किया है। विधानसभा चुनाव लड़ा है। इसलिए आगे सक्रिय रहने के लिए।
Strengths: इसी शहर के रहने वाले है। पुराने पार्टी कार्यकर्ता होने के कारण पहचान का अभाव नहीं है। संगठन का लंबा अनुभव है। आसफ़ ख़ान का पूरा समर्थन इनको है वो इनको ही बनाना चाहते है। पुराने लोगो को लगता है की इनको बनाने से पार्टी को फ़ायदा होगा। आर्थिक रूप से मजबूत है। लोगो में पैठ अच्छी है।
Weaknesses: गुटबाजी से दूर रहना होगा। सिर्फ एक नेता आसफ़ का ठप्पा लगा हुआ है। उनसे बाहर निकलकर सभी को साथ लेना होगा। थोड़ा गर्म मिजाज के आदमी है इसलिए स्वभाव में बदलाव लाना होगा। अभी ज़्यादा मेहनत नहीं की संगठन को खड़ा करने के लिए और मेहनत करनी होगी।
General_Attitude: अभी इस जिले में आसफ़ अली ख़ान सबसे मज़बूत नेता है उनकी प्राथमिकता इनको बनाने की है। वरिष्ठ नेताओ में इनका प्रभाव ठीक है लेकिन युवाओ में मामला ठीक नहीं है। लोगो में इनकी इमेज अच्छी है। लेकिन सक्रियता में कमी है। अगर आसफ़ अली अच्छे से साथ लगकर मेहनत कर ले तो अच्छा काम कर सकते है।

Domicile_District: 8 गोविन्द तोला पो. धनपाली सम्बलपुर उडीसा
Reason_for_Interest: पार्टी में काम करके आगे बढ़ना चाहता है। विचारधारा का मजबूत सिपाही है।
Strengths: धरातल से जुड़ा हुआ मजबूत कार्यकर्ता है। OBC का चेहरा है जिले में। कार्यकर्ताओं में पहचान अच्छी है। मेरे दौरे के दौरान ब्लॉक स्तरीय मीटिंग में कार्यकर्ताओं ने काफ़ी तादात में इनको बनाने की बात मुझे कही। ज़्यादा विवाद में नहीं है। साधारण कार्यकर्ता की छवि है। संगठन का अनुभव है।
Weaknesses: चुनावी राजनीति में बूथ मैनेजमेंट की बहुत ज़्यादा जानकारी नहीं है। आर्थिक पक्ष ज़्यादा मजबूत नहीं है।
General_Attitude: वैसे कार्यकर्ता अच्छा है लेकिन पहले से यहाँ दो ग्रुप है। अब इसमें दोनों ही बाते है ये बिना विवाद वाला व्यक्ति भी अच्छा विकल्प हो सकता है। लेकिन अगर दोनों ग्रुपों ने सपोर्ट नहीं किया तो समस्या हो सकती है।

Criminal_Record: 2 राजनीतिक मुकदमे व पारिवारिक मुकदमे
Reason_for_Interest: महिला होने के कारण आधी आबादी का प्रतिनिधित्व के नाते पार्टी को मजबूत करना चाहती है। संगठन के कार्यो में रुचि है।
Strengths: पार्टी स्तर पर बहुत सक्रिय महिला है। शहर में महिलाओं का अच्छा प्रतिनिधित्व करती है। NGO भी चलाती है इससे काफ़ी लोग जुड़े हुए है। वक्ता अच्छी है। शिक्षित महिला होने से महिलाओं को पार्टी से ज़्यादा जोड़ सकती है।
Weaknesses: जिले के वरिष्ठ नेताओं में स्वीकार्यता की कमी। में  नेताओं व कार्यकर्ताओं से संवाद बढ़ाने की आवश्यकता है। शहर से बाहर भी जनता में पैठ बनाने की जरूरत है।
General_Attitude: मेहनती महिला है। NGO के माध्यम से काफ़ी महिलाओं से जुड़ी हुई है। पार्टी के प्रति समर्पित है।  लेकिन जिले के वरिष्ठ नेताओ से सामंजस्य नहीं होने के कारण समस्या आएगी।

Reason_for_Interest: Wants to build a grassroot effective Congress organisation, which can work independently from the clutches of senior leaders who have been sabotaging the party interests over the years.
Strengths:
1. Though only 58 years old, over the last 4 decades he has earned a rich experience both organisationally and electorally.
2. Having contested assembly elections from both the assembly segments falling under district Subarnapur, he is the only one who has a respectable public and worker connect in all the 6 blocks of the district.
3. He carries an acceptable, mature, clean image among majority of the people and workers. 
4. Even after the electoral losses, he has maintained a public connect over the years. He is available to resolve their day to day issues through administration. 
5. Has the knack to manage resources needed to run the organisation. 
6. Has a relatively mature head, who could take everybody along in the interest of the growth of the party in the district.
7. District has a sizeable SC population of around 25%, majority of which relatively still favours the Congress. He comes from the Ganda caste, which is around 70% of the SC population. He is considered to be a leader within the community. Would act as a strong foundation to build an organisation from the scratch in the district. 
8. Based on the worker feedback and public sentiment, if his assembly ticket wasn’t unfairly cut in 2024, he was a strong contender to win the seat for the Congress party. 2029 maybe would be his last chance to contest and win the assembly elections. As a result, to achieve that end, i believe he would seriously, sincerely work towards strengthening the party in the district.
9. Due to undue control and sabotaging from a senior leader of the area, Congress organisation has considerably weakened and become highly compromised over the years. Among all the applicants, Binod Patra has the experience and will to take it out of the clutches of select few and make it more effective and organised. 
10. Even with prevalent groupism in the district, he has the knack and experience to ensure order in the meetings.
Weaknesses:
1. Undue interference from senior leader from adjoining district, Balangir. Some of his loyalists may try to disrupt the functioning, to some extent. 
2. During the last assembly elections, when denied an assembly ticket, he for a brief period had left the party. Though, after the election was reinducted in the party by the then PCC President. It’s worth noting, Mr. Pradeep Sethi, who was given ticket at the last moment in place of Binod Patra, secured only 12.7% vote which was roughly 12% lower than what Binod Patra had secured in 2019.
General_Attitude:
Due to his seriousness and connect over the years, even during the tough times for the party, Cong workers of the district have a positive outlook towards Binod Patra. Most feel he is the best suited person to lead and rebuild the party in the district for the crucial 2029 Assembly / Loksabha elections. 

PS : FOR REFERENCE, WITH THE MEETING ATTENDANCE SHEETS, HAVE ATTACHED ONE ON ONE WORKER / LEADER FEEDBACKS OF ALL THE MEETINGS CONDUCTED.

Occupation: Decent Farming Landholding / Big joint family in varied occupations who also support
Reason_for_Interest: Actively devote time to revive the party in the district. Would use it as a platform for his own future electoral interest too.
Strengths:
1. He has won 4 local body elections continuously, from Sarpanch to PS to ZP. Has consistent ground level connect and knack to manage people and elections. He is the only Congress ZP member in the district.
2. He has been relatively politically astute. Has been active for last two decades, having worked on varied organisational positions. 
3. He comes from OBC category, which is in majority in the district. 
4. He is relatively able to maintain balance between the various fractions in the district. 
5. He is relatively resourceful to manage the affairs of the organisation in the district effectively.
Weaknesses:
1. Lacks the complete makings of an organisational man, with his focus limited overtly to his own ambition to maybe contest the next assembly election. 
2. Doesn’t have the acceptability across all blocks like a Binod Patra. 
3. He is keen on working and spending his resources only in the 3 blocks which may come under his prospective assembly seat. Hence, maybe more suited to the responsibility of VP, DCC with Binod Patra (SC) as President.
General_Attitude: In general workers feel he has management skills to win local elections.  In doing so may sometimes overlook party interests over his personal interests. Maintains his acceptable balance among the various groups.

Criminal_Record: 8 political cases exist, all political due to agitation. List is attached with the biodata, which I am attaching in the document segment.
Reason_for_Interest: To revive the organisation as per vision of Rahul ji, so party can win both MLA and MP seats falling within the district in 2029.
Strengths:
1. Rich, diverse, relevant organisational experience including YC, SM cell, INTUC.
2. Has professional understanding and experience of handling social media campaigns for the party in the state.
3. Comes from the OBC category, which is in majority in the district. 
4. Electoral experience of contesting in recent assembly elections, hence has gained some visibility within the district.
Weaknesses:
1. Divisive figure, may lead to groupism and status quo functioning in the district, with it being remote controlled by senior leader from Balangir District. 
2. Tends to lose patience. Lacks the political maturity to carry everyone together. 
3. Doesn’t have ground level acceptance in most blocks of the district. 
4. Recent drubbing in the assembly elections may not act as motivating factor for most workers, if he is made the president.
General_Attitude:
Workers feel he doesnt at the moment have the leadership skills or quality to run a district. Some have complained about his egoistic behaviour.

PS : My understanding is, for this term he is better suited to work at PCC Level for the SM Dept. His expertise and experience would surely come handy there.

Reason_for_Interest: He desires to actively revive the organisation at the ground level, as per the vision of Sh. Rahul Gandhi Ji. At the moment doesn’t have any electoral ambitions.
Strengths:
1. He has the capacity to organise people for meetings and events. 
2. He has reasonable political acumen to run the district level organisation.
3. Has a reasonably good working relationship with workers. 
4. He is resourceful enough to support the needs of district organisation. 
5. He high on energy and passion when it comes to organisation work.
Weaknesses:
1. Doesn’t have the acceptance and appeal across all blocks. Limited exposure.
2. Can act impatient at times, due to exuberance of youth. 
3. Lacks the rich organisational experience of a Binod Patra or the electoral experience of a Laba Kumar Sahu.
General_Attitude:
Workers feel he an active asset to the party locally. In tandem with Binod Patra he could be effective. Still needs some grooming. 

PS : As per my understanding he could serve as an effective VP, DCC under Binod Patra as President, DCC

Reason_for_Interest: To revitalise the congress in the district, especially focusing on OBCs, while taking others along.
Strengths:
1. Being an active INTUC OB, has a deep rooted connect with labour class in the district. 
2. Is from the majority OBC community of the district. 
3. Can bring masses to the party events and programs. 
4. Because of his involvement with women through INTUC work, has decent support base among women from the lower strata.
Weaknesses:
1. Doesn’t have the overall acceptance among people suited to the calibre of a DCC President. 
2. Finances and resources would be a relative challenge for him. 
3. Has been more active in labour union work than party organisational work.
General_Attitude: Party supporters feel he can bring people to the events. However, he doesn’t have an appeal of a leader to create traction for the party in the area.

Reason_for_Interest: To build a strong, more accountable organisation and use the platform to advance social issues.
Strengths:
1. Ability to organise women in her area.
2. Relative proactiveness as woman congress worker.
Weaknesses:
1. Lacks any relevant organisational or electoral experience.
2. Very limited exposure and resources to be to handle the position of district president.
General_Attitude: Out of all the women I met during my interactions, she did still have some drive and protectiveness to participate politically. Should be encouraged at some level to be further groomed as a local woman leader.

Reason_for_Interest: He is the District Coordinator and a prominent face of the OBC community. He is working in congress Since 1985. He has been associated with the party for a very long time, working in the organization. He has a good image, strong organizational capacity. Lok Sabha candidate Janardan Dewri, MLA candidate Devendra Bhitiria, Sundargarh Assembly candidate Sudha Rani Rawdia, Raghunathpali Assembly candidate Gopaldas, and Rajgangpur MLA Dr. C.M. Rajan Ikka-all have strongly recommended the name of Nirmal Chand Nayak. They say that he has organizational ability, and the party will benefit if he is appointed. Senior leaders like Kishore Chandra Patel (former minister), Rajkishore Sarangi (former district president), Benu Madhav Tripathi (former district president), Janardan Dewri (former district president), and Berofina Topno (former district panchayat president have given their first preference recommendation for Nirmal Chand Nayak. Former MLA Ramesh Kerkitta has expressed disagreement with his name. The heads of frontal organizations- Youth, NSUI, Seva Dal, ST Cell, Minority Department, and Kisan Congress-have all recommended his name.
Strengths: Hard Working
Weaknesses: Aggressive
General_Attitude:
In Sundargarh district, 8 applications were received for the post of District President. I personally conducted one-to-one discussions in every assembly constituency, in which most of the party leaders recommended Shri Nirmal Chand Nayak for the position. Even John Barua, Archbishop of the Roman Catholic Church, extended his support for making Shri Nirmal Chand Nayak the president. 
All 3 PCC Observers- 
1-Shakuntla Laguri (Ex-MP)
2-Santosh Bhol
3-Prasanta Ku.Rout
I Asked All Three Observers separately and 
All 3-Recommend the Name of Shri Nirmal Chand Naik 

In my opinion, in the interest of the organization, Shri Nirmal Chand Nayak is the only applicant who enjoys support from people of all communities. He has strong organizational abilities, does not intend to contest elections, and thus can devote full time to the organization. He is loyal to the party, free from group pressures, comes from the OBC community, and has the ability to unite all communities.

Therefore, appointing Shri Nirmal Chand Nayak as District President will be in the interest of the party.

Observer_Name: SHRI ANIL CHAUDHARY, EX PCC PRESIDENT
Reason_for_Interest:
Arshdeep Singh Gagowal comes from a Congress family and currently serves as the President of the District Congress Committee.
However, local political dynamics and strategic calculations have made his candidature less favorable for the upcoming Assembly election, leading to him being considered a more suitable choice for an alternative role.
Strengths:
Arshdeep Singh Gagowal belongs to a well-known political family and has prior experience as an elected representative. Appointed as District Congress President during the post-COVID period and under the AAP government, he successfully steered the party organization through challenging times.
Over the past three years, his maturity as a leader has grown significantly. He has effectively overcome his earlier weaknesses and strengthened his connection with the youth — one of his key assets. Known for his simple nature, inclusive approach, and ability to work harmoniously with all sections of the party, he learned the ability to work despite Factionalism and minimized factionalism significantly , Arshdeep has demonstrated strong organizational and leadership skills, making him a capable and dependable District Congress President.
Weaknesses: Owing to his relatively young age and early entry into politics, he sometimes faces challenges in handling complex political negotiations. Despite his efforts, factionalism within the party remains an unresolved issue even after three years of his tenure as District President.
General_Attitude:
After multiple rounds of consultations and discussions — including one-on-one interactions with party leaders and grassroots workers — the overall assessment indicates that Arshdeep Singh Gagowal enjoys a generally positive image among party members.
He is widely regarded as a dedicated and approachable leader who remains consistently accessible to workers. Despite facing challenges, his sincere efforts to reduce factionalism have been acknowledged and appreciated, both directly and indirectly, by party workers and senior leaders alike. His political lineage and family background command respect within the organization, while his courteous and respectful attitude toward senior leaders and colleagues further strengthens his acceptance and credibility within the party.
Concerns about his potential candidature are mainly concentrated within the Sidhu Moosewala camp and its supporters, which forms the primary basis of opposition from certain workers and leaders.

Observer_Name: SHRI ANIL CHAUDHARY, EX PCC PRESIDENT
Reason_for_Interest: Gurpreet Singh Siddhu (Vicky) believes that Arshdeep Singh has already served three years as president and shares a good rapport with him. If he is not selected, he could still be considered for the role. His candidature could be  primarily justified by his extensive long-term experience in organizational work and the upcoming 2027 Assembly elections and panchayat election.
Strengths: Experienced, held significant positions, including President of the District Youth Congress (DYC) and Acting President of the District Congress Committee (DCC) Mansa. He has also served in various capacities within the Punjab Pradesh Congress Committee (PPCC). Coming from a family with a long-standing association with the Congress Party, he brings both experience and political lineage to his role.
Weaknesses: He has been involved in multiple controversies, including past incidents like the 2017 protest following the denial of an MLA ticket. He lacks strong organizational skills and tends to work effectively mainly as a candidate focused on getting elected.
General_Attitude:
Party workers supporting him generally view Gurpreet Singh Siddhu (Vicky) as a dedicated and energetic leader with strong organizational skills. Appreciates his long-term experience in party work and his efforts to engage with and mobilize grassroots workers. Many respect his commitment to strengthening the DCC structure and preparing the district for upcoming elections.
However, some workers feel that his dependence on family legacy and past protests against the party could occasionally affect his image. 
Overall, he is regarded as a capable and trusted figure within the district Congress cadre.

Observer_Name: SHRI ANIL CHAUDHARY, EX PCC PRESIDENT
Criminal_Record: He faced corruption charges filed by the CBI in the Patiala Court, where he was convicted under IPC Sections 420B and 120B and sentenced to seven years of imprisonment. Following his conviction, he was jailed but later obtained a stay on the CBI court’s verdict from a higher court.
Reason_for_Interest: He is a senior and dedicated Congress member with a longstanding record of service. Actively contributed to the party’s organizational elections as PRO (IYC) and APRO (AICC) and was elected as a Municipal Councillor in 1998. With his extensive experience and strong grassroots presence, he stands out as the only leader representing the Vaishya (trader) community in Mansa district.
Strengths: Kulawant Rai Singla is a seasoned politician. He has experience of  working in several positions. He was  elected as a Municipal Councillor in 1998. Additionally, he holds a unique position as the sole representative of the Vaishya (trader) community in Mansa district, giving him a strong community connection.
Weaknesses: Limited influence particularly in the Budhlada Assembly constituency, No significant presence  in other constituencies of the district. No Clean image, Faced 7yr conviction in CBI Cases by lower court, Currently conviction stays by higher court but, these legal issues have posed reputational and political challenges.
General_Attitude: Known by most workers in Buldhlada Assembly, but having Less connected with workers of  other assembly constituencies .  Among workers he has a reputational issue due to the ongoing Corruption case, Most workers feel embarrassment due to his past corruption related issues, leaders of the districts also have hesitation due to ongoing cases, which can turn either ways.

Criminal_Record:

Reason_for_Interest: Bikram Singh Mofar hails from the Sardulgarh Assembly constituency. His father, Ajit Inder Singh Mofar, served as an MLA from Sardulgarh three times. Bikram Mofar himself served as the District Congress Committee President of Mansa from 2014 to 2017 and later as the Chairman of the Mansa Zila Parishad from 2018 to 2023. He claims to have a strong influence in the Sardulgarh Assembly area.
Strengths: Father Shri Ajit Inder Singh Mofar, served as an MLA from Sardulgarh three times. Bikram Mofar himself served as the District Congress Committee President of Mansa from 2014 to 2017 and later as the Chairman of the Mansa Zila Parishad from 2018 to 2023. Strong influence in the Sardulgarh Assembly area.
Weaknesses: Highly engaged as a prominent political faction, political profile is affected by multiple legal cases. It is very difficult to build consensus in his leadership.
General_Attitude:
Party workers have noted his domineering nature, highlighting his tendency to use muscle power to assert control over political matters. This perception has created a negative image, making it challenging for many to view him as a suitable candidate for the DCC President role. During his previous tenure as District President, he was similarly criticized for attempting to exert unilateral control.

Concerns also exist among leaders that  his loyalty to the party, particularly since his brother-in-law, Ravneet Singh Bittu, left the Congress to join the BJP, where he now serves as Minister of State for Railways.

Most party workers and leaders in the district feel that appointing Vikram Mofar as District President ahead of elections could harm the party’s prospects. While he may still be considered as a candidate from the Sardulgarh Assembly constituency, entrusting him with the highly sensitive and organizationally critical post of District President is deemed inadvisable.

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार जमीनी स्तर पर पार्टी को सांगठनिक मजबूती प्रदान करने की इच्छा से ज़िला अध्यक्ष पद में रुचि रखता है।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार वैचारिक रूप से पार्टी के प्रति प्रतिबद्ध है। चुनावी राजनीति में हिस्सेदार नहीं होने के कारण इनके ऊपर कोई नकारात्मक भार  नहीं है। अपनी उम्र के कारण युवाओं और बुजुर्गों के बीच के समन्वय बनाने में सक्षम हैं। जिले की स्थानीय समस्याओं और मुद्दों की बेहतर समझ है। लंबे समय से संगठन में सक्रिय होने के कारण कार्यकर्ताओं से अच्छा संपर्क है। ये संगठन मे युवा कांग्रेस के जिला अध्यक्ष से लेकर प्रदेश कांग्रेस कमेटी मे विभिन्न पदों पर रह चूकें हैं। चुनावी आकांक्षा न होने के कारण जिला संगठन में बतौर सांगठनिक नेता इनकी स्वीकार्यता है।
Weaknesses: आर्थिक रूप से अन्य उम्मीदवारों की तुलना में अपेक्षाकृत कम सशक्त हैं।
General_Attitude: इस उम्मीदवार के नाम को लेकर मोगा जिले के कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ताओं और स्थानीय वरिष्ठ नेताओं की अच्छी  राय है और अधिकांश कार्यकर्ताओं और वरिष्ठ नेताओं में इस उम्मीदवार की स्वीकार्यता है। हरी सिंह खाई की जिले के दबाब समूहों और दूसरे गुट के नेताओं में भी स्वीकृति है । उनका मानना है कि उम्मीदवार लगातार संगठन के काम से जुड़ा है और समन्वय बनाकर चलने में सक्षम है। हरि सिंह खाई चुनाव लड़ने के इच्छुक नहीं हैं। संगठन को लेकर इनकी गहरी समझ है ।

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार बूथ स्तर तक पार्टी की सांगठनिक मजबूती के लिए काम करने को इच्छुक है। ये स्थानीय स्तर पर संगठन की गुटबाजी को खत्म करना चाहते हैं।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार को युवा कांग्रेस और कांग्रेस संगठन में विभिन्न पदों पर काम करने का अनुभव है। उम्मीदवार जमीनी और जुझारू कार्यकर्ता है। इन्होंने युवाओं को युवा कांग्रेस से जोड़ने में अच्छा काम किया था। पार्टी से विधानसभा चुनाव में टिकट न मिलने पर इन्होंने पार्टी छोड़कर  निर्दलीय चुनाव लड़ा।  हालांकि पार्टी छोड़ने के बाद ये किसी दूसरी पार्टी में नहीं गए। म्युनिसिपल कॉर्पोरेशन चुनाव में ये एकमात्र कांग्रेसी उम्मीदवार थे  जिन्होंने  जीत हासिल की थी।
Weaknesses: विधानसभा चुनाव, 2017 में टिकट न मिलने पर पार्टी छोड़ी। लेकिन इनका कहना है कि पार्टी के खिलाफ यह पहली और अंतिम बगावत थी। हालांकि मेयर के खिलाफ आए अविश्वास प्रस्ताव पर भी इनकी भूमिका संधिगध होने के आरोप लगे है ।
General_Attitude: उम्मीदवार के बारे में स्थानीय कार्यकर्ताओं और नेताओं की राय सकारात्मक है। युवा कार्यकर्ताओं में इनकी अच्छी स्वीकार्यता है। विशेषतः इन्हें संगठन के SC सेल का समर्थन हासिल है। स्थानीय नेताओं की राय में ये जमीनी और जुझारू कार्यकर्ता होने के कारण जी–जान लगाकर काम करते हैं। हालांकि ये पार्टी से बगावत करके 2017 मे विधानसभा का  निर्दलीय चुनाव लड़ चुके है । हाल मे ही मेयर के खिलाफ आम आदमी पार्टी के तरफ से लाए गए अविश्वास प्रस्ताव मे भी इनकी भूमिका संदिग्ध रही । मेयर नीतिका भल्ला और मोगा विधान सभा प्रत्याशी मालविका सूद दोनों ने इन पर असहयोग का आरोप लगाया है ।

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार अध्यक्ष बनकर जमीनी स्तर पर पार्टी को विस्तार देना चाहते हैं और पारदर्शी जन–केंद्रित नेतृत्व देना चाहते हैं। इनकी इच्छा कांग्रेस के टिकट पर भविष्य में विधानसभा चुनाव लड़ने की है।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार परिश्रमी युवा हैं और कानूनी पेशे से जुड़े हैं। इनकी पारिवारिक पृष्ठभूमि राजनीतिक है। इनके पिताजी श्री जगरूप सिंह तख्तूपुरा स्थानीय राजनीतिक और सामाजिक जीवन में प्रभावी व्यक्ति हैं। वर्तमान समय में जिला परिषद के सदस्य भी हैं । इन्हे ट्रांसपोर्ट यूनियन और स्थानीय बार एसोसिएशन का मजबूत समर्थन भी प्राप्त है।
Weaknesses: इनके पिताजी कांग्रेस छोड़कर 2013 मे अकाली दल में शामिल हो गए थे और 2018 मे सरकार बनने के बाद पार्टी पुनः जॉइन की ।  इन्होंने स्वयं पार्टी की अवमानना करके बतौर स्वतंत्र उम्मीदवार म्युनिसिपल काउंसलर का चुनाव लड़ा था, हालांकि इनका दावा है कि बाद में इन्होंने कांग्रेस के अधिकृत उम्मीदवार को समर्थन दे दिया था। आम आदमी पार्टी के वर्तमान विधायक इनके व्यावसायिक साझेदार हैं।
General_Attitude: इनकी राजनीतिक सक्रियता और आर्थिक रूप से  संपन्न होने के कारण स्थानीय कार्यकर्ताओं और नेताओं का अच्छा समर्थन इनके पास है।

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार स्थानीय स्तर पर कांग्रेस की नीतियों और धर्मनिरपेक्ष चरित्र से प्रभावित हैं। समाज को सुरक्षित और पार्टी को सुदृढ़ बनाने की इच्छा से अध्यक्ष बनना चाहते हैं। आगामी विधानसभा चुनाव में कांग्रेस के टिकट पर मोगा विधानसभा से चुनाव लड़ने के इच्छुक हैं।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार तेजतर्रार युवा हैं और 14 वर्षों से स्थानीय राजनीति में सक्रिय हैं। जमीनी स्तर पर लोगों से इनका जुड़ाव है। इनके पास इनके व्यक्तिगत सहयोगियों/कार्यकर्ताओं की टीम है। राजनीति में इनकी मजबूत पारिवारिक पृष्ठभूमि है।इनके दादा जी लोकसभा सदस्य और इनके पिता जी विधानसभा सदस्य और जिला कांग्रेस कमेटी,मोगा के अध्यक्ष रह चूकें हैं।
Weaknesses: इनके पिताजी कांग्रेस छोड़कर अकाली दल से MLA बने थे और फिर उन्होंने 10 साल बाद कांग्रेस में वापसी की थी। 2024 में पंजाब कांग्रेस कमेटी के बिना अनुमति और जिला कांग्रेस कमेटी को बिना विश्वास मे लिए कांग्रेस नेता नवजोत सिंह सिद्धू की जनसभा कराने के बाद  इन्हें और इनके पिताजी को कांग्रेस से निलंबित किया गया था। हालांकि इन्हे फिर वापस ले लिया गया है।
General_Attitude: इनके पास कांग्रेस की विरासत है, इसलिए अकाली दल में जाने के बावजूद कुछ स्थानीय कार्यकर्ता और नेता इनके प्रति सॉफ्टकॉर्नर रखते हैं। इन्हें मौजूदा DCC अध्यक्ष का समर्थन हासिल है। मौजूदा PCC अध्यक्ष से इनके संबंध अच्छे नहीं हैं।

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार स्थानीय स्तर पर संगठन को मजबूत करने और बढ़ाने के उद्देश्य से अध्यक्ष बनना चाहती हैं। ये संगठन में महिलाओं की भागीदारी बढ़ाने की इच्छुक हैं।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार स्थानीय  शिक्षित महिला नेत्री हैं और मोगा जिले की पहली महिला मेयर थीं । आम आदमी पार्टी की सरकार आने के उपरांत विरोधी पार्टी के द्वारा इनके खिलाफ अविश्वास प्रस्ताव लाकर इनको पदमुक्त कर दिया गया।
Weaknesses: ये पार्टी में कम सक्रिय हैं। मेयर के कार्यकाल के दौरान इनके पति द्वारा पद के दुरुपयोग की चर्चा सुनी गई।

	•	श्री कार्तिक वाधेरा युवा कांग्रेस से जुड़े रहे हैं और संगठनात्मक कार्यों में सक्रिय भूमिका निभा चुके हैं।
	•	उन्होंने सरकार में मंडल उपाध्यक्ष के रूप में भी कार्य किया है।
	•	वित्तीय रूप से सक्षम हैं, परंतु संसाधनों के उपयोग में संयमित (संकोची) माने जाते हैं।
	•	Punjabi Khatri समुदाय से हैं और शहरी क्षेत्रों में उनका संपर्क नेटवर्क सीमित किंतु सक्रिय है।
	•	जिले के विभिन्न ब्लॉकों से सीमित लेकिन सकारात्मक प्रतिक्रिया (thoda-thoda pratisad) उनके पक्ष में प्राप्त हुई है।

वरिष्ठ नेतृत्व का समर्थन:
	•	प्रताप सिंह बाजवा (Leader of Opposition) और अरुणा चौधरी (Deputy CLP Leader)
— दोनों वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने कार्तिक वाधेरा के नाम का समर्थन किया है।
	•	उनका मानना है कि कार्तिक वाधेरा युवा वर्ग का प्रतिनिधित्व करने वाले, संगठित और ऊर्जावान चेहरा हैं।

विश्लेषण:
	•	वर्तमान में प्रताप सिंह बाजवा समूह से संबद्ध हैं।
	•	संगठन में युवा सोच और नई ऊर्जा ला सकते हैं, परंतु गुटीय राजनीति से ऊपर उठकर
सर्वगुटीय संवाद और व्यापक स्वीकृति की दिशा में कार्य करना आवश्यक है।
	•	वित्तीय स्थिति मज़बूत है और संगठनात्मक ज्ञान अच्छा है।

निष्कर्ष:
युवा नेतृत्व, वरिष्ठ समर्थन और वित्तीय स्थिरता को देखते हुए
श्री कार्तिक वाधेरा को तृतीय प्राथमिकता के रूप में विचार योग्य माना जाता है।
वे भविष्य में कांग्रेस संगठन के युवा और आधुनिक नेतृत्व के रूप में विकसित हो सकते हैं।

	•	श्री अनिल दारा महाजन समुदाय से हैं, जो पठानकोट जिले की सबसे बड़ी और प्रभावशाली व्यापारिक-सामाजिक इकाई है।
	•	वे लंबे समय से कांग्रेस संगठन से जुड़े हुए हैं और शहरी व्यापारिक वर्ग में उनकी अच्छी पकड़ है।
	•	वित्तीय रूप से सशक्त, व्यवहारिक और संतुलित नेतृत्व क्षमता वाले नेता हैं।
	•	संगठन के भीतर प्रताप सिंह बाजवा समूह से संबद्ध हैं, परंतु सभी वर्गों और नेताओं से उनका संवाद संतुलित रहा है।

वरिष्ठ नेतृत्व का समर्थन:
	•	प्रताप सिंह बाजवा (Leader of Opposition, Punjab Assembly),
अरुणा चौधरी (Deputy CLP Leader) और
बरिंदर सिंह छोटेपुर (PPCC Observer)
— इन तीनों वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने सीधे तौर पर श्री अनिल दारा के नाम का समर्थन किया है।
	•	इसके साथ ही महाजन समुदाय के प्रतिनिधिमंडल तथा शहर के वरिष्ठ कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ताओं ने भी
औपचारिक रूप से उनके पक्ष में समर्थन दर्ज कराया है।

विश्लेषण:
	•	वे एक संवादशील, समन्वयकारी और व्यावहारिक सोच वाले नेता हैं।
	•	संगठनात्मक दृष्टि से सक्रिय और आर्थिक रूप से सक्षम हैं, जो जिला इकाई को स्थिरता और संसाधन प्रदान कर सकते हैं।
	•	महाजन समुदाय में उनका प्रभाव संगठन को सामाजिक आधार देने में सहायक होगा।

निष्कर्ष:
सामाजिक प्रतिनिधित्व (महाजन वर्ग), वरिष्ठ नेतृत्व के स्पष्ट समर्थन और संगठनात्मक संतुलन को ध्यान में रखते हुए
श्री अनिल दारा को जिला कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष पद के लिए द्वितीय प्राथमिकता के रूप में अनुशंसित किया जाता है।
उनके नेतृत्व में संगठन को स्थिरता, संसाधन और शहरी वर्ग का सशक्त सहयोग मिल सकता है।

विधानसभा क्षेत्र: Sujanpur
समुदाय: Jat Sikh
आयु: लगभग 45 वर्ष
स्थिति: महिला नेतृत्व श्रेणी में विशेष अनुशंसा
	•	श्रीमती हरसिमरन कौर बाजवा पिछले 20 वर्षों से कांग्रेस संगठन में सक्रिय भूमिका निभा रही हैं।
	•	उन्होंने Indian Youth Congress (IYC) में निर्वाचित सचिव (Elected Secretary) और Punjab Youth Congress (PYC) में राज्य महासचिव (State General Secretary) के रूप में कार्य किया है।
	•	वर्तमान में वे महिला कांग्रेस (Punjab Mahila Congress) में सक्रिय रूप से कार्यरत हैं और संगठन विस्तार, महिला सशक्तिकरण तथा बूथ-स्तर नेटवर्क निर्माण में निरंतर लगी हुई हैं।
	•	Jat Sikh समुदाय से हैं, जो पठानकोट जिले और सुजानपुर क्षेत्र का एक प्रभावशाली सामाजिक वर्ग है।
	•	उनका संगठनात्मक अनुभव, क्षेत्रीय सक्रियता और महिला कार्यकर्ताओं में गहरी पकड़ उल्लेखनीय है।

कानूनी स्थिति:
	•	उनके पति पर पूर्व में हत्या (murder) से संबंधित मामला दर्ज था,
जो अब पूरी तरह से निपट चुका है (legally resolved) और मामला समाप्त हो गया है।
	•	वर्तमान में दोनों की सामाजिक व राजनीतिक स्थिति सामान्य और स्थिर है।

वरिष्ठ नेतृत्व का समर्थन:
	•	प्रदेश कांग्रेस अध्यक्ष राजा वड़िंग,
पूर्व उपमुख्यमंत्री सुखजिंदर सिंह रंधावा,
और विधायक अमित विज —
इन तीनों वरिष्ठ नेताओं ने श्रीमती हरसिमरन कौर बाजवा के नाम की स्पष्ट अनुशंसा (direct recommendation) की है।
	•	नेतृत्व का मत है कि हरसिमरन कौर बाजवा एक समर्पित, अनुशासित और प्रभावशाली महिला नेता हैं,
जो संगठन में महिला सशक्तिकरण और सामाजिक प्रतिनिधित्व दोनों को मज़बूती प्रदान कर सकती हैं।

विश्लेषण:
	•	वे पार्टी के युवा, महिला और सामाजिक वर्गों के बीच सक्रिय और स्वीकार्य चेहरा हैं।
	•	संगठनात्मक अनुभव और जमीनी जुड़ाव उन्हें महिला कांग्रेस में एक मज़बूत स्तंभ बनाता है।
	•	वित्तीय स्थिति मध्यम है, परंतु राजनीतिक प्रतिबद्धता और सक्रियता उनकी सबसे बड़ी ताकत है।

निष्कर्ष:
यदि पार्टी महिला नेतृत्व सशक्तिकरण और Jat Sikh वर्ग में प्रतिनिधित्व को प्राथमिकता देना चाहे,
तो श्रीमती हरसिमरन कौर बाजवा एक अनुभवी, संतुलित और सक्रिय नेता के रूप में अत्यंत उपयुक्त विकल्प हैं।
उनकी नियुक्ति से महिला कांग्रेस के ढांचे और संगठनात्मक विस्तार — दोनों को मज़बूती प्राप्त होगी।

	•	श्री जोगिंदर सिंह पाल कांग्रेस के पूर्व विधायक (Ex-MLA, Bhoa Constituency) रह चुके हैं और पार्टी में एक अनुभवी, स्थिर एवं सम्मानित नेता के रूप में जाने जाते हैं।
	•	उनका SC समुदाय में मजबूत प्रभाव है तथा वे सामाजिक न्याय और जनसेवा के मुद्दों पर सक्रिय रहे हैं।
	•	वित्तीय रूप से सक्षम हैं और अपने क्षेत्र में संगठन को लंबे समय से सहयोग देते आए हैं।
	•	2022 के विधानसभा चुनाव में उन्होंने बहुत कम मतों के अंतर से पराजय का सामना किया,
जिससे यह स्पष्ट होता है कि उनका जनाधार अब भी मजबूत और सजीव है।

स्वास्थ्य स्थिति:
	•	पिछले वर्ष उनका हार्ट ट्रांसप्लांट हुआ था।
हालांकि, हाल ही में उनसे मुलाकात के दौरान यह पाया गया कि वे पूर्णतः स्वस्थ, ऊर्जावान और राजनीतिक रूप से सक्रिय हैं।
	•	उनकी ऊर्जा, स्मृति और सार्वजनिक भागीदारी सामान्य हैं, जो उन्हें फिर से संगठनात्मक भूमिका के लिए सक्षम बनाती हैं।

विश्लेषण:
	•	संगठन में उनका योगदान लंबे समय से निरंतर रहा है।
	•	वे अपने क्षेत्र में SC समुदाय के प्रभावशाली प्रतिनिधि हैं और ग्रामीण कार्यकर्ताओं व बूथ-स्तर के नेताओं से गहरा जुड़ाव रखते हैं।
	•	उनका स्वभाव शांत, अनुशासित और सुलझा हुआ है, जिससे वे संगठन के भीतर सर्वगुटीय स्वीकार्यता रखते हैं।

निष्कर्ष:
यदि पार्टी SC समुदाय के नेतृत्व और सामाजिक प्रतिनिधित्व को सशक्त करना चाहती है,
तो श्री जोगिंदर सिंह पाल एक अनुभवी, संतुलित और भरोसेमंद नेता के रूप में उपयुक्त विकल्प हैं।
उनका चयन संगठन को सामाजिक संतुलन, अनुभव और जनाधार — तीनों दृष्टियों से मजबूती प्रदान करेगा।

Reason_for_Interest: I wish to become DCC President not as a matter of position, but as a continuation of my commitment to rebuild the Congress organisation at the grassroots. Having travelled through every level of organisational structure— from student politics to the Youth Congress and now to the assembly level—I strongly believe that the Congress can only be strengthened through a bottom-up approach, where every worker feels empowered, respected, and heard.  1. To Rebuild the Grassroots Network  In both the elections I contested, one clear lesson was that organisational gaps and monopolisation weakened our collective effort. I want to correct that. My vision is to create an inclusive, participative, and decentralised Congress in Ropar—where decision-making, opportunities, and responsibilities are shared, not concentrated. The DCC should function as a collective leadership platform, not as a camp or faction.   2. To Channel Youth Energy and Organisational Discipline  My experience as Punjab Youth Congress President taught me how to mobilise, organise, and discipline cadres. I want to bring that same energy and spirit of activism into the district organisation—reviving the culture of programmes, protests, and people connect. By integrating youth workers, senior leaders, and experienced grassroots cadres, we can rebuild the Congress as a visible, fighting organisation that stands with the people against the failures of the AAP government.   3. To Prepare the Organisation for 2027  The coming two years are critical for Congress in Punjab. The DCC must lead from the front—raising local issues, exposing the government’s failures, and re-establishing the Congress as the natural choice of the people. My experience in agitation-based politics, event organisation, and mass mobilisation will help create a proactive and responsive DCC that sets an example for other districts.  4. A Vision of Collective Leadership  I want to ensure that no worker, leader, or faction feels excluded. The Congress has always thrived when its organisation reflected unity in diversity. My aim is to make the DCC a model of coordination, inclusion, and teamwork—where our collective strength becomes our biggest asset.  Conclusion  In essence, my reason to seek this responsibility is not ambition but renewal. I want to use my years of experience—from Panjab University to Youth Congress and Vidhan Sabha elections—to rebuild the organisational foundation of Ropar Congress. I see this as an opportunity to serve the party, strengthen the structure, and inspire the next generation of Congress workers to rise from the grassroots once again.

अपनी सक्रियता को और गति देने की आवश्यकता है।

ये बात पता चली कि बड़ी सादड़ी से खुद दावेदार थे लेकिन जब टिकट नहीं मिला तो उम्मीदवार के पक्ष में नहीं उतरे।

अन्य नेताओं के प्रभाव में हैं। 

खुद का स्टैंड नहीं है। 

मना करने के बावजूद चितौड़गढ़ ग्रामीण व शहरी बैठकों को कांग्रेस कार्यालय की बजाय वाटिका में रखा, जिसके लिए आपत्ति दर्ज की गई। 

कार्यकर्ताओं ने भी इसकी शिकायत की कि उन्हें बैठकों की सूचना नहीं मिलती।

कई बार यह पाया गया कि यह पूर्व पदाधिकारियों को वर्तमान बताकर प्रस्तुत करते हैं।
