किसी भी गुट या नेता ने इनकी खिलाफत नहीं की पर इन्हें व्यक्तिगत रूप से आक्रामक होने की जरूरत है, साथ ही प्रभावशाली नहीं है। बिल्कुल सुरेंद्र सिंह जड़ावत जी के कंट्रोल में दिखे। पार्टी से जुड़े कार्यक्रमों को जमीनी स्तर तक नहीं ले जाते। 

हालांकि यदि हमें सामान्य वर्ग से उम्मीदवार नहीं देना तो हमारे पास ओबीसी समुदाय से इनके अलावा भी विकल्प हैं।

Weaknesses:
दूसरे गुटों से तालमेल बिठाकर संगठन के प्रति एकजुटता से काम करना होगा। 

* बड़े नेता हैं ऐसे में यह सीधे तौर पर जमीन पर नहीं जा सकते अर्थात किसी न किसी को वह इसकी जिम्मेदारी सौंपेंगे।

* अति आत्मविश्वासी थे कि मैं चाहूं तो अध्यक्ष पद आसानी से प्राप्त कर सकता हूं। 

* सूचना के बावजूद नेताओं के साथ 1 टू 1 बैठक में सम्मिलित नहीं हुए।

Reason_for_Interest: युवाओं और आम कार्यकताओं को संगठन से जोड़ कर उन्हें सशक्त बनाना चाहते हैं।
Strengths: बड़ी सादड़ी में लोकप्रिय युवा नेता हैं, आम कार्यकर्ताओं और ओबीसी समाज में अच्छी पकड़ रखते है। विगत विधानसभा चुनाव में हार के बावजूद अच्छा प्रदर्शन रहा है। इनका जनाधार बढ़िया है और अपने संसाधनों से भी संगठन को मजबूती देने में सक्षम हैं।
Weaknesses:
अध्यक्ष पद के लिए शुरुआत में उदय लाल आंजना जी को समर्थन देते रहे लेकिन अंदरखाने खुद भी अध्यक्ष बनने की चाह रखते हैं। 

आंजना गुट की नजर में नहीं आना चाहते कि वह अध्यक्ष पद के लिए दावेदारी कर रहे हैं जो कि इनके डर को दर्शाता है।
General_Attitude:
बैठकों के आगाज के प्रथम दिन से ही उदय लाल आंजना को समर्थन देने का काम किया। आंजना गुट की नजरों से बचते बचाते चुपचाप अंत में अपनी दावेदारी पेश की।

यह उनके डर को प्रदर्शित करता है कि वह एक गुट विशेष से भयभीत हैं।

Reason_for_Interest:
Believes in the ideology and principles of Indian National Congress. Purpose is to strengthen the organization on the ground level and involve participation of all the Karykartas and solve the issues of the public.
The applicant intension is to form a strong and active organization at the district level so that the public will have confidence in the Congress Party. Main intension is to have participation of Youth, Women, Farmers, Dalits in the organization so that the district Congress may be come the voice of the people.
Strengths: The applicant is an experienced leader and has strong skills of taking everyone together in building the organization and raising the voice of the people on the ground. He is a very responsible citizen and social worker and is visible on the ground.
Weaknesses: Need strong back up support.
General_Attitude:
He has been MLA once and has a long tenure as a party worker in the Indian National Congress since 1998.
He is a real worker cum leader on the ground and has immense backing from the OBC specially the Jaat community. Several senior leaders proposed his name as DCC President both in public meetings as well as one to one meetings. 
He looked very humble and very warm in approach to both the people of Deedwana and issues of Deedwana.
His experience as a grass root leader, his continues presence on the ground and his continues involvement with the Jaat community for social causes was notable.
He appeared to be a very strong leader of the Jaat community.
However, I have strongly observed that there was total absence of Women leaders, women karykartas and women participation. 
There was hardly any Mahila present in the Town Hall meeting, Block level meetings and one to one meetings.
Hence, a strong leadership is necessary at the district level to see that there is women participation in the party.

Reason_for_Interest: Believes in the Congress Party`s ideology and wants to take this ideology to the people on the ground in order to make the party victorious. Believes in keeping all the sections of society together.
Strengths: Strong presence on the ground, is continuously with the people and their issues. Been DCC President from 2016 till date that is DCC President of Nagaur District till Deedwana became a separate new District in 2023. Continuously is on the ground and takes up issues of the people in the Legislative Assembly.
Weaknesses: Could not be successful to create Mahila Sangathan and young workers group despite being in leadership position.
General_Attitude:
He appeared to be a very strong leader from the Minority community. His presence on the ground and his organizing capability of keeping everyone together was not worthy. 
His work as DCC President was evident as could be seen from the opinions given by several leaders on the ground. 
He has tremendous support in the district not only from his community but also from other communities as could be seen from the one to one meetings I had with senior leaders and the people of Deedwana.
As Deedwana is a new district, his experienced of the past may certainly help build a strong district organization. 
However, I have strongly observed that there was total absence of Women leaders, women karykartas and women participation. 
There was hardly any Mahila present in the Town Hall meeting, Block level meetings and one to one meetings.
Hence, a strong leadership is necessary at the district level to see that there is women participation in the party.

Reason_for_Interest: The candidates feels that he has been working for the party with great devotion for over three decades and since he has not got any recognition he should be given an opportunity to strengthen the INC and that he will be acceptable to all the communities besides sending a strong message amongst the minority community.
Strengths:
He is a person of high integrity and absolutely non-controversial.  Worked closely with both Shri Brijender Singh Ola, MP and, earlier, for a longer time with his father, Shri Shishram Ola, 
former Union Minister, who was the face of Jhunjhunu for over four decades. Hence, he is familiar with the District like back of his hand and would be able to do justice to his assignment with the willing cooperation of the workers and the leaders most of whom find him a suitable candidate.
Weaknesses: He does not appear to be financially strong, but is confident that he will be able to manage the resources from within his own community and the cooperation of senior leaders of the District. He may face slight non-cooperation from some of the minority leaders who themselves are aspirants for the post.
General_Attitude: Since Jhunjhunu has over 10% Muslim votes and the community has always stood with the Congress, it is high time that a Muslim is chosen this time. In the last byelection to Jhunjhunu assembly seat the Muslims were expecting a candidate from their own community, but since it didn`t happen, and the son of the sitting MP was fielded, the entire community turned against the Congress for the first time in many decades. Selecting Khalil Ali will therefore be a wise step that will not only see the return of Muslim vote enbloc to the INC, but will also be welcomed by other communities because Khalil Ali enjoys a good reputation as a sincere, loyal and dedicated soldier of the Party for over three decades, since 1990. Strongly recommended as his choice will send a strong message to the Muslim community not only in the Shekawati belt - Jhunjhunu, Churu, Sikar - but perhaps in the entire State which has 6.22 million Muslims ( over 9 %) .

Reason_for_Interest: Initially, when I met him, he was not at all interested but later on he changes his mind after I told him that there may be a possibility of selecting somebody from any of the weaker sections of society. But now he is willing to accept responsibility and is expecting support from the MP Shri Brijender Singh Ola.
Strengths: As a former Dy. Director Education Dept is connected with all the schools and education institutions in the District. Soon after retirement he was elected as MLA and won with a comfortable margin of 17872 votes. His humility and willingness to redress the grievances of people endears him to own and all.
Weaknesses: As he is newcomer to the party may not get willing cooperation from senior leaders of his community like Randhir Singh Meghwal who is also an aspirant and was overlooked as a candidate in last elections.
General_Attitude: As the SC/ST community has got a substantial population of 18.8%, the community will stand solidly behind the INC but may have a slight adverse effect on the support of other communities. His stature as MLA will be an added advantage, but it cannot be said with certainty how the other dominant castes like Jats and Rajputs will react to his appointment. However, itis certainly a risk worth taking. Should he not be able to perform, a change can be affected after 2 years, well before the next Assembly elections.

Education: MA Political science and English), MBA
Reason_for_Interest: She feels that since she hails from a renowned Congress background (her father Ram Narayan Chaudhary was a former PCC President, 7 times MLA and State Cabinet Minister) and must continue the legacy of her illustrious father. Is confident of revitalising and strengthening the INC in the District.
Strengths: As a third term MLA and daughter of an eminent Congress leader she enjoys high stature in the district. With her experience and background, she is fully conversant with the political environment and problems facing the party. She is popular amongst the people cutting across community and gender divides.
Weaknesses: The Jat community, loyal to the Member of Parliament Shri Brijender Singh Ola, is unlikely to cooperate with her and this will be her biggest challenge. Her responsibilities as MLA will also cut into her time required for duties as DCC President.
General_Attitude: Initially a bit hesitant, she applied for the post almost in the last stage, perhaps to counter the influence of MP Shri Brijender Singh Ola. Though she is a popular leader her appointment may increase factionalism in the District as the Ola family and their loyalists will resist all efforts to undermine their influence. However, there is no better Jat and Woman leader in the District who scores over her as she hails from a renowned Congress background-her father was PCC President and Cabinet Minister in the State.

Reason_for_Interest: As she has held the post of Zila Pramukh for five years and is a Member of Zila Parisad in which capacity she continues for the last five years. she has excellent grassroot connect. She has participated and organised many camps on women empowerment- education, young women leadership etc. She feels that her appointment will give a tremendous boost to the activity for participation of women in politics and social welfare. This will also ensure greater representation to women and youth in public life.
Strengths: Being a product of Panchayati Raj institutions for the last 15 years she enjoys a good reputation in the villages as she has devoted a great deal of time words the rural activities aimed at rural uplift and empowerment of women. He performance as Zila Pramukh for five years from 2015 to 2020 was commendable and therefore her name has been recommended by not only some senior leaders but also a large number of party workers especially women of all age groups.
Weaknesses: She is strongly opposed by many senior leaders including a few MLAs and those who are opposed to the faction led by the sitting MP. Making her acceptable to all workers cutting across community and gender divides will be a big challenge.
General_Attitude: Though she has strong support of the sitting MP and some MLAs she is equally opposed by other sections which makes it difficult for her to emerge as a consensus candidate. At 36 she has age on her side and can be considered again whenever there is a change next, or even later. Her popularity amongst the women should be exploited by the Party even if she is not chosen as the President this time. Being free from legislative responsibility she can devote full time to the Party, and hence is a suitable candidate.

Reason_for_Interest: He feels that he has performed extremely well in the post since he took over in 2023. He has conducted successfully all the programmes given to him the PCC he also claims he has a large following amongst the youth, cutting across party lines and enjoys a great deal of respect in his community. He must therefore continue in the larger interest of the Party even though there are some senior leaders oppose to him. But he will be able to pacify them if he is re-appointed.
Strengths: His biggest strength is the resources at his command. He has given a portion of his house to be use as the DCC office. Being young at 43 he possesses a lot of drive and energy and goes out of his way to implement programmes of the PCC.  He also keeps regularly attending grievances of the people.
Weaknesses: His biggest opponent in the District politics is Shri Rajkumar Sharma, MLA as they both are contenders of NAwalgarh Assembly seat in the last elections. Rajkumar Sharma who lost the seat in the last elections accuses his of working against him and feels he lost because of stiff opposition from Dinesh Sunda. Baring many other senior leaders also feels he must not continue as, in their opinion, he is arrogant and does not give respect to them.
General_Attitude: Though there is opposition to his candidature in many quarters he may be considered for re-nomination on the basis of his caste, young age and material resources. In the event of his not being chosen, he can be elevated to the PCC as a General Secretary and given charge of Districts where Jats are predominant. It will be in the Party interest if his services are utilised outside the District to which he can always comeback whenever there is a change next time, or even later. He must however be considered as a candidate from Nawalgarh in the next Assembly elections, as his rival, Rajkumar Sharma indulged in an act unbecoming of a Congressman during the SSA meeting in Mukandgarh block on 7 Oct 2025 in the presence of the AICC observer.

Reason_for_Interest: Since the number of Rajputs in the districts are nearly 2 lakhs and selecting a Rajput as a District President will send a powerful message to the Rajput community and other forward communities like Brahmins and Baniyas it will also wean away the Rajputs from the BJP which has traditionally benefited from Rajputs votes as the INC has not given representation to the Rajputs in this area. As there are many competitors from other communities a Rajput will be the best compromise choice.
Strengths: He is highly educated MSc (IT), LLB, IIM (K) and possesses a presentable personality. Belongs to a community which has not been represented in the District for long. As spokesman of the PCC and earlier Secretary PCC has the requisite stature to make a good DCC President who may be acceptable to all the communities.
Weaknesses: The Jats and other OBCs communities may not be comfortable with a Rajput as leader in an area which has been traditionally Jat dominated. It is also likely that Muslims and SCs/STs may not extend their wholehearted cooperation but that cannot be said with certainty.
General_Attitude: With his pleasing manners and personality he gives an impression that he is cut for this job. His educational qualification as also stature as the spokesman of the PCC are favourable advantages. However, the other communities especially Jats and OBCs are unlikely to extend their support. But selecting him can be a risk worth taking. In case he does not make the grade he should be considered for the post whenever there is a change of the guard in a couple of years, or later. Meanwhile his services can be utilised as General Secretary in the PCC incharge of the Districts where Rajputs are dominant.

Reason_for_Interest:

Reason_for_Interest: Shri Kripal Singh Meena, after working for a long time in the front organization, aims to play a pivotal role in mainstream politics in the district. Drawing on his extensive political experience, he is poised to make the party and organization more active and dynamic. With strong potential for leadership in the district, he is well-equipped to engage in larger political deliberations and drive meaningful change.
Strengths:
Shri Kripal Singh Meena has been working with unwavering dedication in the party for the last three decades.
He has experience of working in NSUI and Youth Congress at state and national levels across various states.
Ideological commitment to the party and a dedicated worker.
Weaknesses:
Shri Kripal Singh Meena is not very acceptable in the district and among party workers.
Lack of resources.
General_Attitude:
Due to Shri Kripal Singh Meena`s work in the party for the last three decades, the general opinion is that people who work with dedication in the party organisation should be given due recognition.
There is a lack of leadership from the educated and youth segment in the SC-ST category, and the number of such youths in this category is very low. Those who have organisational  experience, are dedicated to the party, educated, and young should be given opportunities.

Reason_for_Interest:
Shri Haji Rukhsar Ahmed is a very well-known and respected figure of the minority community in the district.
Lok Sabha and Vidhan Sabha seats are reserved for SC-ST, so people from the community can only work within the organization.
The minority community fully votes for Congress, but they do not receive any significant positions in the organization.
A face from the minority community who is also highly acceptable among the majority community.
Strengths:
Shri Hai Rukhsar Ahmed has been working for the party with unwavering dedication for the last three decades.
A highly respected face of the minority community in the district.
All seats in the Lok Sabha and Vidhan Sabha in the district are reserved for the SC-ST category.
The minority community votes one-sidedly for Congress, yet there is no participation in the organization in the district.
A highly acceptable face in other sections of society.
Weaknesses:
Shri Haji Rukhsar Ahmed is more active during elections, but lack of political activity on normal days.

Lack of day to day involvement with workers.
General_Attitude:
Until a few years ago, the position of DCC president was held by a representative of the minority community.
There is a demand in the district that the minority community is fully dedicated to the party, and since there is no possibility of contesting elections, they should be given a place in the organization.
Shri Haji Rukhsar Ahmed is a highly acceptable figure in both the minority and majority communities.

Reason_for_Interest:

Due to seat reservations, the OBC community’s participation in electoral politics is limited, making the organisation the only viable path.

Acceptability among workers due to long-term work in the party organisation.

Lack of resources.

Shri Sheeshram Khatana has been serving as a party worker for many decades, which is why he enjoys acceptability not only among party workers but also in other sections of society.

Reason_for_Interest:

The district president position has never been given to a woman; if the party provides this opportunity, it will honour half the population, ensure their participation, and strengthen the connection of women voters with the party.

Lack of female leadership from the ST community, which can be addressed.
She is resourceful.

Opposition among workers due to involvement in group politics in the district.
General_Attitude:

Working with dedication for the party.
Due to a lack of political stature, managing the organization at the district level is a challenging task.

His interest in the District President position stems from his desire to strengthen grassroots connections and enhance the party`s organizational strength at the district level.

Financially strong and popular among youth and grassroots party workers, with national-level organizational exposure.

Faces challenges in expanding influence beyond core youth and grassroots segments.

May need to enhance cross-community outreach and coalition-building skills to strengthen district-level support.
General_Attitude: The general impression of party workers towards Balram Yadav is predominantly positive. He is respected for his dedication, long-standing involvement, and active participation in party activities at both grassroots and national levels. Party leaders appreciate his strong organizational skills and popularity among youth and grassroots cadres. However, some leaders feel there is room for improvement in expanding his appeal across diverse community groups for stronger district-wide cohesion. Overall, he is considered a loyal and capable leader with potential to strengthen the party organization at the district level.

Reason_for_Interest: interested in the District President role to leverage his long-standing experience in various leadership capacities and to strengthen the party`s presence across diverse communities in the district. He aims to promote greater party cohesion by balancing his business acumen with grassroots mobilization efforts.
Strengths:

Financially stable and well-respected businessman, popular across castes in the district.
Weaknesses:
Primarily focused on business interests, which limits his active presence in grassroots party mobilization and local activities.

Limited engagement in day-to-day organizational activities may affect responsiveness to cadre needs.
General_Attitude: Party workers respect Girish Datta for his honesty, loyalty, and financial support to party activities. Reason_for_Interest: To be able to bring all factions together, to collectively make the Congress organisation more effective in the district.
Strengths:
1. Has a maturity, experience and sensibility to be able to make the DCC functional even with the varied factions at play. 
2. Current DCC President would support him in all ways. Kamal Singh Gujjar has also worked closely with Ex MLA Ramlal Meena during his assembly elections. Considered to be instrumental in victory of the Ex MLA Ramlal Meena in 2018. Hence, eventually he could ensure an effective working relationship with the Ex MLA as well. 
3. Is resourceful and being an advocate and Ex Block President of Pratapgarh has reasonable connect among the Cong. cadre of the district. 
4. Relatively young, hence more energetic and driven to fulfil the responsibilities of the post, especially keeping in mind the emergence and attraction of BAP party in the tribal youth of the area.
5. Has rich experience of being Dist. President of Gujjar Samaj for 20yrs, Ex Dist. President of OBC cell, Ex Dist President of Kissan Cell. 
6. After ST community, OBCs are in good numbers in both Pratapgarh and Salumber Dist. So could also have a message of OBC representation.
Weaknesses: 1. Presently, lack of connect with the Ex MLA Ramlal Meena, who tries to wield his personal influence in the Pratapgarh assembly especially.
General_Attitude: Overall, the leaders or workers across district didn’t have any particular reservation about his name. Hence, could prove to do an effective balancing act.

Reason_for_Interest: During his previous tenures as district president has been able to revive the confidence in the cadre, enough to help win the Pratapgarh assembly seat in 2018 after a gap of many years. Wants to continue for another term to further strengthen the organisation, more so since under the new system district president may have more power and responsibility.
Strengths:
1. Carries a clean imagine. Has acceptability across various cross sections of the society. 
2. Being a local royalty, is able to resolve problems of people and Cong. workers even in the BJP rule. 
3. Is resourceful to run the unit independently. 
4. Has no nonsense image and is able to maintain discipline, even with the deep intrenched factions. 
5. Has a rich organisational experience, has been continuously been progressing from one organisational position to another in the district Cong unit since last 40yrs.
Weaknesses:
1. Has the baggage of continuously being district president for last 14 years. Some within the party yearn for a change and a fresh face. 
2. With a long innings at the helm of district organisation, may not be as driven to actively work at the grassroot, to revive the party especially in the hardcore tribal segments, where likes of BAP is raising its head.
3. Though was instrumental in bring Ex MLA, Ramlal Meena into the party fold and supporting him to win the election, presently there is a deep distrust towards the Ex MLA. 
4. Having an attitude, tone of a royalty; some in the present day and age may find difficult to connect with him.
General_Attitude:
Apart from the Ramlal Meena faction, most believe Bhanu Pratap has handled the party well during his tenure as district president. Generally , people feel he carries a clean image, who is available to people from all castes and walks of life to help resolve their problems. He carries the weight to ensure discipline within the local organisational units. His presence, gives party cadre a sense of security and assurance. 
His detractors feel he has been the president for way too long now and has developed a disconnect from the people. Also, some feel his body language and attitude is somewhat rough, which may not be conducive to bring fresh blood in the organisation.

Reason_for_Interest: He is being projected primarily by Ramlal Meena, Ex MLA to ensure the current DCC President isn’t made president again. Being a block president, desires to progress to the post of district president, so he could run the organisation in unison with the Ex MLA Ramlal Meena.
Strengths:
1. Has the support of many currently nominated local cong OBs. 
2. Has a rich organisational experience of around 20 years, most recently being made block president.
Weaknesses:
1. Rather than being a candidate in his own right, he is simply promoted by Ramlal Meena, Ex MLA to fulfil agenda; so much so couple of meetings it was Ramlal Meena instead of him who was asking everyone for show of strength for him. In such a scenario he may run the organisation more on the whims and fancies of Ex MLA, rather than keeping the larger interest of the party in mind and taking everyone along. 
2. Has some accusations of him unduly being hand in glove with local administration to see monetary benefits to resolve cases related to NDPS.
General_Attitude: Basically support base of Ramlal Meena, Ex MLA supported him. There were some voices of discontent about his image, especially speculations regarding his involvement in putting false cases of NDPS on people and then asking for money to have them resolved.

Reason_for_Interest:
1. Feels he has the maturity to overcome the groupism and revitalise the district congress, which according to him has become ineffective. 
2. He claims he had sacrificed his opportunity last time in favour of the current DCC president. Considering his experience and long innings with the party, he should be given the opportunity.
Strengths:
1. Vast experience in the political space of the district, both in the Cong. organisation and local body elections. Has twice served as the Chairman of the Pratapgarh Nagar Palika.
2. Resourceful and isn’t restricted to one group.
Weaknesses:
1. At 74 he may not have what it takes to actively build the party on the grassroot level, especially in the vast tribal rural belt. 
2. His exposure seems to be focused and limited to the town area. 
3. Some people have given a feedback, that he has been continuously been successful in the nagar palika elections by aligning with the long term BJP Ex MLA. As a result, been sabotaging the Cong. for his personal gains, something which is reflected by the fact that till 2018 Cong hadn’t won the Pratapgarh assembly election in many previous elections.
General_Attitude: He does have a rich political experience and social standing but his age and speculation of his always internally sabotaging Cong. assembly candidates in Pratapgarh assembly doesn’t fit well for him to be given the important DCC President’s post.

Reason_for_Interest: Wants the opportunity to be given to a youth so he can actively take the programs of the party to the ground and attract more youth.
Strengths:
1. Has good experience of working in the NSUI and Youth Cong. 
2. Has the resources and manpower to help with the organisational work. Committed to contribute personal funds to the tune of 25 lakhs to immediately setup a new cong. office in the district.
Weaknesses: Lacks the maturity and experience, important post like DCC President requires. At the moment doesn’t have strong ground connect or vast acceptance among the workers.
General_Attitude: Limited backing from the supporters. Can be groomed for the future. Should be considered for the post of a block president when organisation is revamped at that level in the near future.

Reason_for_Interest: To use her experience in Mahila Cong to revitalise the organisation at district level.

General_Attitude: Should be utilised in her current position in State Mahila Cong.

Reason_for_Interest: Salumber is a new district. Wants to use his experience to build a strong foundation for the party in the district.
Strengths:
1. Being a respected, senior advocate, has an acceptable image in the area among people from all communities. 
2. He is very resourceful to run the affairs of the district Cong. Organisation. 
3. Has a good mix of local body, cooperative and Cong. Organisation experience. Among others he has also been Director of the Saras Dairy Cooperative for Udaipur Division from 1995 to 2008. 
4. He has the maturity and leadership quality to run the district organisation marred by factionalism. 
5. He is considered to be a good orator.
Weaknesses: Not the best working relationship with senior leader and Ex MP / Ex CWC member Raghuveer Meena ji.
General_Attitude: He is a well respected, politically aware and resourceful, good organiser. If he is able to strike a balance with the other faction in the district, he can be an effective president.

Reason_for_Interest: To strengthen the connect of the OBCs with the Cong. in the district.
Strengths:
1. Comes from OBC Patel / Dangi community. Population wise, they are numerically second largest in the district after the ST population. 
2. Has significant experience working in the dairy board, which has deep rooted connect in each village, especially with the OBC community.
Weaknesses:
1. Seems to lack the organisational leadership quality and acumen to strengthen the support base of the party in the challenging tribal area. 
2. His experience as far as Cong. organisation is very limited, most of his time spent working in the cooperative movement. 
3. At 68 he doesn’t seem to have the fire in the belly to deliver what maybe expected of a DCC President of the future.
General_Attitude:
Has good connect with the OBC Patel /Dangi community, hence maybe he would be instrumental in building some connect with them, who otherwise have been supporting BJP. 
However, he seems to lack the skill and leadership to run district cong unit. Having been long in the cooperative movement, which is dominated by OBC community, he may be carrying a baggage as well, with strong likes and dislikes.

Reason_for_Interest: As a youth, work towards attracting more youth within the party fold.
Strengths:
1. Has good NSUI / YC experience
2. Party needs more youth participation in this belt. Being an active Youth with organisational experience, he could be instrumental in doing this. 
3. Not aligned strongly to any one group.
Weaknesses: At the moment, lacks the stature and senior cong experience for an important position like DCC President.
General_Attitude:
Can bring freshness within the organisation bring more youth into the fold. But still needs more acceptability and experience for the post of DCC President. 
Non the less, should be supported and motivated by assigning important responsibility.

Education: MA. Poltical Science and Public Administration
Reason_for_Interest: Wants to revive the local Congress by doing fresh recruitment into the party.
Strengths:
1. Educated woman with leadership capabilities. 
2. Rich experience of success in local body elections for last 20 years.
Weaknesses:
1) Since, in this district almost all elected positions like MLA, MP and most of the positions in local bodies are reserved for STs; imp. positions like DCC president should be given to other communities to ensure they don’t feel alienated and are accommodated. Hence, keeping in consideration this norm, her candidature as ST doesn’t suit. 
2. Due to her own interest to contest assembly election, has friction with the senior leader Raghuveer Meena ji. This would create a roadblock in the working of the organisation. 
3. Still lacks the organisational experience. Plus recent big loss in assembly bye-election also wouldn’t give confidence to the workers of the area.
General_Attitude: She mainly applied thinking if a woman would be considered for the post then she could be a candidate. Otherwise her support is for Parmanand Mehta.

Strengths: Long time active association with the party.
Weaknesses: No relevant experience, stature, connect or acceptance for this imp. role.
General_Attitude: He is not a serious contender. He himself supports Jagaram Patel for the post.

Reason_for_Interest:
संगठन को जिला मे मजबूत करना चाहता है, जिला मे संगठन का विस्तार करना चाहता है,

पार्टी के विचारधारा को घर घर तक पहुंचाना चाहता है, कुल मिलाकर जिला कांग्रेस कमिटी को पूरी तरह मजबूत कर हर वर्ग हर समाज को पार्टी से जोड़ना चाहता है,

A. Abdul Hameed Babu, applying for
President of the District Congress Committee (DCC) in Thiruvallur (Avadi),
states his vision is to strengthen the Congress party at the district level. He also has electoral politics experience .His long-term commitment since joining in 1984 and extensive roles, including
Town Congress Committee President from 2005-2021, underpin this ambition.​
Strengths:
Hameed Babu highlights his dedication
through multiple imprisonments (3 times in Central Jail, 2 in Vellore, and 2 in
Thiruvallur sub-jail) for party protests, such as naming a railway station
after Kamarajar. He served as Ward Councillor for 20 years (1996-2016), winning

Additional strengths include organizing social activities, such as securing a

General_Attitude: Report on A. Abdul Hameed (Hameed Babu)A. Abdul Hameed, popularly known as Hameed Babu, aged 54, belongs to the Muslim community and is a strong grassroots leader with deep ideological commitment. He deeply respects, believes in, and lives by the values of the Gandhi–Nehru family.He joined the Congress Party in 1984 and has served at various levels of the organisation. Beginning as Youth Congress Ward President in 1985, he went on to hold several important positions such as Circle President, AYC President, DCC Vice President, President of the Town Congress Committee, and District Sevadal President.A full-time politician and dedicated social worker, he also runs a tea shop and is engaged in small real estate activities. His political strength is reflected in his electoral record—he has been elected as Councillor four times till 1996 to 2016 , including twice when the Indian National Congress contested independently without alliances. This demonstrates his strong grassroots connect and his unwavering commitment to serving the public.Although he briefly left the party and joined TNC in 1996, he returned and has since remained loyal. Known for his simplicity and relative honesty compared to many elected representatives, he maintains good relations with all leaders and does not belong to any faction. While he acknowledges that resources may pose a challenge in managing the DCC, I am confident that if given the opportunity, he will prove his capability and strengthen the organisation by taking everyone along. His extensive experience—from grassroots to district-level organisational roles and four terms as an elected representative—makes him a valuable asset.He has actively organised and participated in numerous protests and has been imprisoned seven times for party-led agitations.Given the sizeable minority population and the cosmopolitan character of Avadi city—with significant poor, working-class, and middle-class communities—he would be a good choice for President

General_Attitude: Shri Victory Mohan, aged 63 years, belongs to the SC community Adi Dravida and is a well-known and influential personality in Avadi. Reason_for_Interest:
Er. N. Prabhakar,
with an unbroken 34 years of loyalty to the Congress, is interested in the
District President position to strengthen the organisation in Karur through
disciplined cadre-building, inclusive leadership, and transparent
administration. He represents the SC–Devendra Kula Vellalar community, which
forms a significant share of Karur’s population, giving him a natural social
base while still being respected by all communities due to his inclusive
approach. His deep grassroots connections, clean public image, and ability to
mobilise youth and working-class groups position him to unify diverse social
sections and rebuild the party structure from the booth level upward. His
aspiration is driven by both political commitment and personal legacy, with a
clear intention to restore the Congress as a strong and trusted force in Karur
district.
Strengths:
Loyalty to the
Congress, grassroots connections, and  cadre-mobilisation skills demonstrated through
major padayatras, conventions, and membership drives. He represents the
SC–Devendra Kula Vellalar community, providing a strong social base while
maintaining wide acceptance across all communities due to his inclusive and
approachable nature. administrative experience as a municipal councillor,
leadership in the lorry transport association, and proven commitment to constitutional
values further enhance his credibility. Additionally, his Youth Congress
background, strong rapport with working-class groups, and ability to energise
young cadres for rebuilding the party structure from the booth level upward.
Weaknesses:
Main weaknesses
include limited political visibility beyond his own Assembly constituency,
which affects his recognition at the district and zone levels. His independent,
non-factional style—while principled—can sometimes slow his progress in an
environment where factional support often influences leadership decisions. He
also has relatively limited engagement with elected representatives, which
restricts the wider projection of his work and reduces opportunities to connect
with emerging voter groups. Additionally, his many years of intensive
grassroots involvement leave him with less time for high-level networking and
strategic visibility, which may affect his broader organisational influence.
General_Attitude:
The general
impression of party workers toward the proposed candidate is highly positive.
He is widely regarded as a hard-working, and accessible leader with a connection
to grassroots cadres. Many party workers appreciate him, inclusive approach,
and consistent presence during organisational activities. His ability to
mobilise people, maintain good relations across communities, and work without
factional biases has earned him broad respect within the district. Overall,
party cadres view him as a capable choice for the Congress organisation in
Karur.

He believes that as District President, he can expand the party’s reach, activate every block, and make Congress more visible among the public.

Weaknesses: Limited district-wide visibility beyond Aravakurichi and Karur West; needs broader recognition across all Assembly segments.No prior electoral experience, so his political strength as a candidate is yet to be tested.Requires deeper engagement with senior leaders and elected representatives to build wider organisational acceptance.Leadership exposure mostly at block level; needs more experience in district-level political planning and coordination.Limited resources compared to senior leaders, which may affect large-scale mobilisation without organisational support.

Party workers generally view the him
as a disciplined, hardworking and non-controversial organiser with a clean
image. His consistent activity and accessibility have earned him goodwill,

sincerity and commitment, they also note that he needs wider district-level
visibility and stronger engagement across all segments. Overall, the impression

Reason_for_Interest:
In the words of Mr. Pandiyan “I am hailing from a traditional Congress family. My father and grandfather are freedom fighters and are also associated with the Farmers’ Association. My father served as a District Board Member and Municipal Councillor. I have also been involved in party activities from my student days. I am now a Municipal Councillor of Ramanathapuram Municipality and I am serving as a member of the District Heritage Committee. 
Since there has been no DCC President in the past three years, I have been solely supporting - including financially - the party functions, programmes and agitations. I will work hard to build a strong base for our party in the district, coordinating all cadres and office bearers in the district.”﻿
Strengths:
Long association with the Congress party and proven loyalty to the organisation.
Strong organisational skills – as DCC Treasurer and member of the coordination committee he has toured all blocks, helped form village, town panchayat and block Congress committees, and identified office bearers at multiple levels.
Enjoys broad support among party workers, block presidents and youth leaders, who see him as accessible and responsive to their concerns.
Comes from a respected traditional Congress family with a legacy of freedom fighters and elected representatives, which gives him natural credibility among cadres and the public.
Good experience in local body governance as a sitting municipal councillor, with a practical understanding of people’s issues and government schemes.
Demonstrated ability to mobilise workers and resources for party programmes, agitations and elections, including financial contribution from his own side.
Represents the Maravar (Backward Class) community, which helps strengthen the party’s social base and inclusiveness in the district.
Weaknesses:
Strong grassroots base sometimes leads to perceptions of being aligned with one group or faction, and he will need to consciously take all sections along in a leadership role.


Has focused mainly on organisational work within the district and has relatively limited exposure national-level forums.
General_Attitude:
Profile and Organisational Work
Rajaram Pandiyan has served as Treasurer of the District Congress Committee (DCC) for three years during the tenure of former President Chelladurai Abdullah. When Chelladurai Abdullah resigned on personal grounds and a coordination committee was formed, Rajaram was included as a member of this committee. The former President has also formally recommended his name for the post of District Congress President.
During this period, Rajaram toured all districts and played a key role in setting up village and town panchayat Congress committees, as well as block committees. He was personally involved in identifying Presidents and Vice Presidents for these block committees. Because of this groundwork, he now enjoys strong support from a majority of office bearers. In interactions and meetings with block office bearers, members and Presidents, it was consistently observed that Rajaram commands a solid and visible support base, especially among the youth. The MLA and the other observers who accompanied me also expressed the view that he is currently the strongest candidate for the District Congress President role.
Social Background and Family Legacy
Rajaram Pandiyan belongs to the Maravar community (Backward Class). His family has a long-standing association with the Congress party and is known locally for its political engagement and service. His wife has been elected councillor three times and is currently a sitting councillor; Rajaram himself is a councillor, and his brother is a former TP councillor. His grandfather and father were freedom fighters. His elder brother has served in multiple key positions - Congress Town President, District Vice President, PCC member and Assembly in-charge - reinforcing the family’s deep roots in the party.
Political Career and Current Role
At 49, Rajaram combines organisational experience with energy. He has served as Youth Congress District Vice President, Town Congress General Secretary, and District Coordinator of the Indian National Congress Seva Dal. He is presently working as in-charge of the District Congress Committee, in addition to his role as Ramanathapuram Municipality Councillor. Over the last three years, he has consistently invested his own time and resources in party-building activities and is seen as a hardworking, accessible leader by local cadres.
Overall Assessment
Given his organisational capabilities, proven track record in building and strengthening party structures, broad support among youth and office bearers, and the backing of the former DCC President, Rajaram Pandiyan emerges as a particularly strong and capable candidate for the position of District Congress President.

Reason_for_Interest: in the words of the candidate: “I have been serving the party for the past 31 years, rising from basic responsibilities, having held various positions during this journey. I firmly believe that I can function effectively as the President of the District Congress Committee.Regarding Ramanathapuram district, I have a two-pronged vision for the party’s growth:Organizational: Appointing and effectively managing office bearers from the grassroots level up to the district level.Electoral: Securing power and representation from the local body level up to the Legislative Assembly.My electoral goal is to secure at least 40% representation - whether contesting alone or in an alliance - thereby strengthening our fundamental infrastructure. To achieve this, my first focus is on 100% organizational completion. I aim to appoint Booth Committees, Village Committees, Block Committees, District Committees, and committees for all Frontal Organizations (Wings) across the entire district.If we execute these organizational tasks with 100% efficiency and achieve our 40% electoral target, we can establish the Congress movement as an indispensable force in the district - creating a scenario where no one can win without us.If entrusted with the role of District President, I will focus deeply on these strategies, embrace all party workers, and, by the grace of God, successfully execute these tasks.“My political journey began in the Student Congress (NSUI), continued as Town President, and today I serve as the State Vice President of the Minority Department. I firmly believe that this unbroken 31-year journey qualifies me for the responsibility of District President.I took charge as Town President in 2014, a critical and difficult time for the party. Since then, I have stood at the forefront of every agitation - from the anti-CAA protests to the demonstrations condemning the arrest of our leader Rahul Gandhi. I have faced numerous legal cases and hardships for the movement, yet I have remained steadfast.I have always been transparent and truthful in my views, both inside and outside the party.For the past 53 years, the post of District President has been held exclusively by members of the same community. However, Ramanathapuram is home to large populations of the Islamic community. Historically, this district sees frequent tensions between two specific communities, and unfortunately, this friction has seeped into our party. As a Muslim, I am in a unique position to serve as a neutral unifying force, embracing all communities without bias.The Islamic community, with over 2.5 lakh voters, is the decisive factor in this district. While they have consistently placed their trust in Congress, they have never been granted the District President post. This is not a request based solely on religion, but a request on behalf of the crores of Muslims who back the Congress movement.If you grant me this opportunity based on minority representation, I accept it with gratitude. However, I assure you that I will function as a President for all communities. I am confident that I can lead without any communal bias or conflict. Beyond these reasons, I reiterate my commitment to the Organizational and Electoral vision I outlined earlier. I pledge to execute those tasks to perfection.”
Strengths: Members of Jamaat are very firm on a Muslim President. Over 30 years in the Congress, has risen through different positions (Student Congress/NSUI, Town President, now State Vice President – Minority Department).Has been at  key agitations (anti-CAA, protests over Rahul Gandhi’s arrest), even facing legal cases and remaining steadfast.
Weaknesses: Very few people came forward to propose his name during opinion gathering.
General_Attitude: There is no other opportunity available for the Muslim community in the district. He feels and has specified along with other members of the community, that they should not be taken for granted as default voters of the Congress. Ramanathapuram district is absolutely the only place where they have a real opportunity to become District President.For the information of the party- The immediate past president is a Muslim (Chelladurai Abdullah). He enjoys a very good reputation.

Reason_for_Interest:
Interested
in the District President position because, after serving the Congress party
for more than 40 years, believe this role will allow him to effectively
strengthen the organisation at the grassroots level. With long administrative
experience, strong connection with the majority Muthuraja community, and proven
record of uniting and motivating party workers, confident that he can build a
disciplined, energetic, and people-centered organisation in Trichy South. This
position will enable to coordinate more closely with the public, empower youth,
address local issues efficiently, and prepare a strong team for upcoming
elections, thereby contributing significantly to the growth and success of the
Congress party in the district.
Strengths:
Mr.
R. Rajalingam brings over four decades of continuous experience in the Congress
party, giving him deep organisational understanding, strong loyalty, and
long-term commitment. His proven administrative leadership as a two-time
elected Chairman of Sirugamani Town Panchayat demonstrates his ability to
deliver effective governance with strong public support. 

He
has held several key organisational roles, including Youth Motivator, AICC
Member, Joint Secretary of Trichy, District Vice President, PCC Member, and
currently serves as State Secretary of the TNCC, reflecting his versatility and
trusted position within the party. He enjoys a strong grassroots connection, is
widely respected among cadres, and has consistently worked to unite and
motivate party workers. As a senior member of the majority Muthuraja community,
he commands broad social influence in the district. His clean public image,
involvement in social service activities such as the Lions Club, and his
ability to build disciplined, energetic teams further strengthen his
suitability for the District President role. His successful electoral track
record and strong acceptance among the people make him a credible and capable
leader for advancing the party’s growth in Trichy South.
Weaknesses:
Despite
his long and dedicated service to the Congress party, Mr. R. Rajalingam has not
always received the organisational elevation he deserved, which may create a
perception of under-recognition within the party. His naturally humble and
soft-spoken personality, while respected by the public, sometimes limits his
visibility and assertiveness in internal political competition. In the past, he
has also faced setbacks due to last-minute high-level decisions that denied him
opportunities such as MLA candidature and district-level leadership roles,
affecting momentum and morale among his supporters. Additionally, his deep
involvement at the local level, though a strength, may sometimes limit exposure
to emerging political strategies used by younger, more aggressive leaders.
General_Attitude:
The
overall impression of party workers toward Mr. R. Rajalingam is highly
positive. They view him as a committed and dependable leader with a
long-standing history of service to the Congress party. His accessibility,
humility, and strong grassroots connection have earned him the trust and
confidence of cadres across different blocks. Many workers appreciate his
consistent support during organisational and electoral activities, as well as
his ability to unite diverse groups within the party. His clean public image,
administrative experience, and influence within the majority community further
strengthen their belief that he is capable of revitalizing the party at the
district level. Overall, party leaders and workers broadly endorse his
candidature and consider him a strong and effective choice for the District
President position.

Reason_for_Interest:
After
interacting with the candidate, it is clear that his interest in the District
President position comes from a genuine commitment to strengthening the
Congress Party at the grassroots level. He believes that his long experience in
NSUI, Youth Congress, and PCC positions has given him a clear understanding of
organisational gaps and the needs of cadres across the district. He expressed a
strong desire to bring more youth and women into leadership, improve
coordination between booth, block, and assembly units, and make the party more
visible through active public engagement. He also emphasised that his years of
social service—supporting students, farmers, the poor, and vulnerable
groups—have motivated him to take up a larger organisational responsibility
where he can convert public expectations into party strength. Overall, he sees
this role as an opportunity to provide disciplined, energetic, and
people-centered leadership to rebuild the party’s influence in Trichy South.
Strengths:
He
has been consistently active in the Congress Party since 1996 and has risen
through every organisational level, giving him strong institutional knowledge
and a clear understanding of cadre dynamics. His leadership record includes
serving as NSUI District General Secretary, District NSUI President, Parliament
Youth Congress President, State General Secretary of Youth Congress, and
currently a State Secretary of the TNCC, which reflects steady progression and
trust from the organisation. He also has an extensive background in social
service, having supported students, farmers, the elderly, and vulnerable
communities, and has successfully led public welfare initiatives and
issue-based protests—all of which demonstrate his ability to mobilize people
and connect with the public. He maintains a clean record with no criminal
cases, enjoys grassroots acceptance, and shows strong commitment, discipline,
and the ability to motivate youth and workers.
Weaknesses:
A
few areas may pose challenges to the candidate’s performance. Mr. J. Ramesh
Kumar has not previously contested any election, which limits his direct
electoral experience and may affect his ability to independently navigate
large-scale campaigns. Although he has extensive social service exposure, his
political influence is still developing, particularly in regions where
traditional community leadership continues to shape voting behaviour. His long
association with student and youth wings means that much of his experience has
been organisational rather than administrative, and he may need time to adapt
to district-level responsibilities that require broader political strategy,
negotiation, and conflict management. Additionally, Tamil Nadu politics often
operates on strong follower and group-based dynamics; as he is associated with
one dominant group, members of other factions may initially resist or hesitate
to accept his candidature. His ambition to introduce reforms and expand youth
participation will also require establishing stronger coordination with senior
leaders and aligning with existing party structures, which may present initial
challenges.
General_Attitude:
The
general impression of party workers toward Mr. J. Ramesh Kumar is mixed. While
many youth cadres appreciate his energy, accessibility, and long involvement in
NSUI and Youth Congress, some senior functionaries express concerns regarding
groupism within the district. A section of party workers feel that his
association with a particular faction may create resistance from other groups,
which could pose challenges in unifying the organisation. Additionally, his
rapport with certain elected MPs, Ex MPs and senior leaders is perceived to be
limited, which may affect coordination and decision-making at critical moments.
Some cadres also feel that his lack of electoral experience could make it
difficult for him to assert authority or navigate complex political situations
within the district. He may face challenges in managing internal differences,
balancing factional interests, and establishing strong relationships with
senior leadership if appointed.

Reason_for_Interest:
The
candidate is deeply interested in the District President role because he
believes the Congress Party needs stronger organisational restructuring, better
unity among cadres, and a modern, disciplined approach to leadership. With 40
years of uninterrupted loyalty to the party and rich experience as Secretary,
Vice President, District In-charge, and an elected local body representative,
he feels a responsibility to strengthen the party’s presence at the grassroots.
His goal is to rebuild booth committees with engineering precision, expand
youth participation, and ensure that the Congress Party becomes a more visible
and effective force across the district.

He
is also motivated by his ability to contribute significantly through his
administrative experience, technocratic background, and financial independence.
With the support of labour unions and a proven record of electoral success, he
believes he can provide strong, stable leadership to the party. His commitment
to Congress ideology and his desire to empower workers at every organisational
level form the core of his interest in taking up the District President
position.
Strengths: His extensive 40 years of experience as District Secretary, General Secretary, Vice President, District In-charge, and elected local body representative has equipped him with strong administrative capability and proven leadership skills. As a civil engineer and successful Class-1 contractor, he brings a technocratic, data-driven approach to restructuring party systems and strengthening grassroots organisation. He enjoys broad acceptance across communities, particularly among Udayar/Nathaman, Mutharaiyar, SC, and minority groups, and has consistently demonstrated the ability to unite diverse factions within the party. He is also closely associated with several trade union groups, and during recent field visits, many union representatives have expressed their support for his candidature and requested that he be considered for the District Congress Committee President position
Weaknesses:
In
the political context, the candidate’s long-standing association with senior
leadership sometimes leads certain local groups to perceive him as more aligned
with the established structure than with emerging aspirants, which can create
occasional resistance from smaller factions. Additionally, a few local leaders
expect more frequent direct interaction from him, especially during internal
negotiations and alliance-related coordination. These political sensitivities
occasionally limit unanimous support, though the candidate is actively working
to increase ground-level engagement, improve factional communication, and build
broader consensus across all sections of the party and alliance.
General_Attitude:
The
overall impression of the candidate among party workers is broadly positive,
especially regarding his long-standing loyalty, administrative experience, and
ability to handle organisational responsibilities with discipline. Many trade union
workers appreciate his accessibility. His acceptance across Udayar,
Mutharaiyar, SC, and minority groups has further enhanced his credibility on
the ground. At the same time, a section of workers notes that stronger
visibility in certain pockets and more active engagement with emerging local
aspirants would help consolidate his support base further. Despite these
expectations, the majority opinion recognises him as a capable, experienced,
and dependable leader whose appointment would likely bring stability, unity,
and improved organisational functioning within the district.

Reason_for_Interest:
As
the present District Congress Committee President, I wish to continue serving
in this position to further strengthen the Congress organisation in
Tiruchirappalli District. My focus is to deepen the party’s reach at the
grassroots level by taking Congress policies, principles and programmes to
every household, village, town and urban division.

I
aim to expand the party’s influence by conducting continuous public meetings,
membership drives, awareness programmes and people’s movements so that the
Congress remains active and visible throughout the district.

By
building strong booth-level structures, empowering grassroots workers and
maintaining consistent coordination between district leadership and cadres, I
intend to make the DCC a vibrant, disciplined and dynamic organisation that
reflects people’s concerns and strengthens the Congress at all levels.
Strengths:
Has
successfully led district-level party structures, strengthened booth
committees, and coordinated cadres across both rural and urban areas. Maintains
continuous contact with voters, workers, and local leaders, ensuring that
ground-level issues are understood and addressed promptly. Brings over 18 years
of active involvement in party programmes, elections, campaigns, and
organisational development. Maintains smooth communication with higher-level
leadership, ensuring timely execution of organisational decisions and effective
implementation of political strategies.
Weaknesses:
The
workload across regions occasionally requires careful prioritisation, which can
delay attention to less urgent organisational matters. Additionally, high
expectations from party cadres and voters create pressure to deliver results
quickly, sometimes leading the candidate to take on more responsibilities
personally rather than delegating them.

As
the DCC President, his visits to other Assembly segments are sometimes viewed
as unfavourable by local functionaries, creating occasional misunderstandings.
Furthermore, because he also devotes time to his advocacy practice, some party
workers feel he is not always able to give the level of continuous presence
they expect. The candidate recognises these concerns and is working to address
them through improved time management and increased coordination with
district-level teams.
General_Attitude:
The
general opinion of block Presidents towards the proposed candidate is largely
positive, recognising his long experience, organisational capability, and
proven commitment to strengthening the party structure in the district. Many
cadres appreciate his accessibility, field presence, and ability to coordinate
teams during elections and major party programmes.

However,
some workers have expressed concerns regarding his availability due to
professional commitments and limited visits to certain Assembly segments.
Despite these reservations, the overall sentiment remains that he is a capable,
experienced, and dedicated leader who has contributed significantly to
district-level organisational work. With improved time management and broader
engagement across all segments, party workers believe he can continue to serve
effectively in this role.

Dr. Naresh Jadav emerges as a strong and deserving candidate for the District Congress Committee (DCC) President position. He has been actively involved in the party’s organizational activities through his dedicated work with the NSUI, Youth Congress, and under the guidance of senior Congress leaders. His long-standing association and loyalty to the Congress Party reflect his deep commitment to its ideology and principles.

Dr. Jadav also brings valuable electoral experience, having contested the 2014 Lok Sabha elections, and possesses the educational and financial background and leadership qualities necessary to guide the party effectively at the district level.

Importantly, he hails from the ST Lambada community, which holds a significant presence and influence in the Adilabad Parliamentary constituency. His appointment as DCC President would not only strengthen the Congress’s social base but also enhance the party’s electoral prospects in the region.

Overall, Dr. Naresh Jadav represents a balanced blend of experience, loyalty, and social representation, making him a highly suitable choice for the District Congress Committee President post.

1.	Medipally Sathyam
Profile Summary
Medipally Sathyam, MLA from Choppadandi (SC-Reserved), belongs to the SC-Mala community, which forms a substantial portion of the electorate across the Karimnagar Rural region. A committed Congressman since 1999, he has earlier served as PCC Secretary and PCC Spokesperson. Though he briefly left the party in 2014, he re-joined in 2017and has since been one of the most active district-level leaders representing the Congress.
Political Background and Standing
Sathyam enjoys wide acceptance across all three assemblies of Karimnagar Rural — Choppadandi, Manakondur (SC), and Huzurabad. His political journey reflects long-standing engagement with Dalit, backward, and agrarian communities. Given that Karimnagar Rural has a large Scheduled Caste population, his leadership provides both social representation and strong grassroots resonance.
Currently, the DCC President hails from the SC-Madiga community and represents Manakondur Assembly. Hence, assigning the Rural DCC leadership to the SC-Mala community through Sathyam would bring social balance and inclusivity within the district’s leadership structure.
Strengths & Strategic Recommendation
•	Sitting MLA with legislative and organisational experience.
•	Cross-constituency coordination across Choppadandi, Manakondur, and Huzurabad.
•	Deep grassroots connect and influence among SC voters.
•	Proven party loyalty and effective communication across cadres.
Given his stature, representational balance, and organisational depth, Medipally Sathyam is best suited to lead Karimnagar Rural DCC, strengthen rural structures, and improve cohesion among the three assembly units.
Recommendation: Strongly recommended as first preference for Karimnagar Rural DCC President.

2.	Balmuri Venkat
Profile Summary
Balmuri Venkat, Member of Legislative Council (MLC) and Vice President, Telangana Pradesh Congress Committee, hails from the Velama community, which holds a strong political presence across Karimnagar district. His roots trace back to Choppadandi Assembly Constituency, his father’s native seat. Presently, as Vice President of TPCC and in-charge of Nizamabad district, he supervises organisational programmes and cadre mobilisation across multiple regions. Known as a strong orator and aggressive organiser, he combines youth energy with strategic clarity.
Though based in Hyderabad, Venkat’s consistent engagement with Karimnagar politics, coupled with his community roots and credibility among youth, position him as a leader capable of energising the district organisation.
Strengths & Strategic Recommendation
•	Velama community linkage, vital for Congress revival in Karimnagar Rural.
•	Strong organisational grounding from NSUI to PCC levels.
•	Aggressive, disciplined, and media-savvy leadership style.
•	High loyalty quotient — lifelong Congressman, no factional record.
•	Ability to connect with youth and professional cadres through modern organisational methods.
Given his stature, oratory, and proven organisational record, Balmuri Venkat can provide high-energy, structured leadership to Karimnagar Rural DCC and help the party consolidate forward-caste and youth support bases.
Recommendation: Recommended as second preference for Karimnagar Rural DCC President.

1.	Velichala Rajender Rao
Profile Summary
Velichala Rajender Rao hails from the Velama community, one of the most influential in Karimnagar. He is the son of late Sri Velichala Jagapati Rao, a respected Congress veteran who served as MLA and MLC from Karimnagar. Rajender Rao contested the 2024 Lok Sabha elections and earlier served as Chairman of the Single Window and Chairman, Agricultural Market Committee (AMC), Karimnagar).
Political Background and Standing
Coming from a Congress legacy family, he enjoys wide recognition and credibility across the district. Rajender Rao rejoined the Congress in 2017 after a brief break, reaffirming his long-standing association with the party. His Lok Sabha contest demonstrated strong organisational ability and personal appeal — mobilising around 3.6 lakh votes within just 14 days of campaign time.
At present, Karimnagar Urban demands assertive and dynamic leadership to counter the political aggression of Bandi Sanjay Kumar (BJP MP) and Gangula Kamalakar (BRS MLA). Rajender Rao has both the political temperament and leadership strength to take them head-on and re-establish Congress’ visibility in this crucial urban centre.
Strengths & Strategic Recommendation
Rajender Rao combines legacy goodwill, administrative experience, and strong community influence. He maintains goodwill across Velama, minority, and SC segments and possesses the organisational and financial capacity to rebuild local structures. His clean image, composed yet assertive leadership style, and multilingual fluency make him a natural choice to lead the city unit effectively.
It is ideal to carve out Karimnagar Urban as a separate DCC, comprising 66 wards and 2 mandals, since the region already functions as a municipal corporation with over 4 lakh voters. Post-delimitation, Karimnagar is expected to have two Assembly segments, making it even more logical to form a distinct urban DCC with a strong, high-visibility leader like Velichala Rajender Rao at its helm.
Recommendation: Strongly recommended for Karimnagar Urban DCC President.

Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is currently serving as the DCC President of Medak, and he is interested in the District President position to serve the community, address local issues and strengthen the party at the grassroots level.
Strengths:
- Shivannagari Anjaneyulu Goud has been an active and loyal member of the Congress Party since 1992, serving the organization with commitment for over three decades. His consistent presence in the party demonstrates his dedication and ideological alignment with the Congress principles.

- He has held several important positions within the organization, including roles in NSUI, Youth Congress, and TPCC, which have provided him with deep insight into party functioning and grassroots mobilization. His wide experience enables him to manage and coordinate organizational activities effectively.

- As an elected MPTC member from Kajipet (2020) with a remarkable 70% vote share, he has demonstrated strong public connect and leadership capabilities. This victory reflects the trust and goodwill he enjoys among the local electorate.

- Although he was an aspirant for the 2023 Assembly Elections from Narsapur, he continued to work actively for the party even after not receiving the ticket. His dedication during the campaign period earned him respect among party workers and senior leaders alike.

- He maintains a cordial working relationship with the local MLA and senior leadership, which helps in ensuring coordination and alignment between the district organization and elected representatives.
Weaknesses: While Shivannagari Anjaneyulu Goud enjoys strong coordination with the local MLA and Minister, his partial financial dependency on them at times influences his independent decision-making. However, this also reflects his ability to maintain healthy working relations with senior leadership.
General_Attitude: Senior leaders and grassroot workers of the Congress Party, along with the Medak MLA, have expressed strong support for Shivannagari Anjaneyulu Goud. His long association with the party, approachable nature, and proven organizational experience have earned him credibility among workers. He is widely regarded as a loyal, hard-working, and cooperative leader capable of strengthening the party structure across the district.

Reason_for_Interest: Aavula Raji Reddy wants to become the DCC President to further strengthen the Congress organization and deepen it`s connect with the people. He has focused on uniting cadres and expanding the reach through initiatives like Namaste Marsapur, Job Melas and community welface programs.
Strengths:
- Aavula Raji Reddy is known for his effective leadership abilities and close connect with people at the grassroots level. His accessibility and responsiveness have earned him strong support across different sections of society.

- He enjoys high regard and trust within both the Congress Party cadre and the general public. His balanced approach and cooperative nature make him a respected figure among senior leaders as well as local workers.

- Having contested the Assembly elections and losing by a narrow margin of around 8,000 votes, he has demonstrated significant electoral strength and public acceptance. This performance reflects his potential to consolidate party presence further in the district.
Weaknesses:
- Aavula Raji Reddy has been associated with the Congress Party organization for the last seven years, which provides him relatively less organizational exposure compared to senior leaders with longer tenures.

- He has not yet held any major post within the party structure, which limits his experience in internal organizational management and coordination at the district level.

- As a recent Assembly election candidate, his political focus may remain inclined toward preparing for the 2028 Assembly elections, which could affect his long-term continuity in district-level organizational responsibilities.
General_Attitude: Aavula Raji Reddy has a strong connect with the public and demonstrates effective leadership qualities. He enjoys good support from the party cadre and senior leaders, including contested MP Neelam Madhu. His popularity and grassroots presence make him a capable and promising leader for strengthening the party’s base in the district.

Recommendation: Recommended as first preference for Sircilla DCC President, provided that sufficient delegation or structural support is created to balance his legislative responsibilities.

Having coordinated several Assembly and Parliamentary election campaigns, he understands the **organizational challenges** on the ground and believes that with structured teamwork, youth leadership, and inclusion of both senior and junior leaders, the party can regain its strength in Sangareddy district.

His core motivation is to **rebuild the Congress organization from the ground up**, empower workers and youth. and contribute toward the larger national mission of making Shri Rahul Gandhi the Prime Minister.
Strengths:
Unquestionable Loyalty and Commitment: A serious and disciplined Congress worker, unwavering in loyalty since 1998, standing firm through every political tide.

Grassroots Power & Mass Connect: Deep roots among trade unions and labor organizations with statewide influence and presence, commanding respect across industries and worker groups.

Proven Leadership During Adversity: Worked tirelessly even under the TRS government, leading protests and dharnas on workers’ and public issues, earning credibility as a fearless voice of the people.

Inclusive & Approachable: Known to be easily accessible to cadre and citizens alike, respected for humility, sincerity, and hands-on problem solving.

Voice of Telangana Movement: Actively participated in the Telangana movement, symbolizing his commitment to both people’s rights and regional development.

Organizational Depth: Experienced in coordination and conflict resolution within the labor sector and Congress framework, capable of uniting senior and grassroots leaders under one vision.
Weaknesses:
Seen as a Threat by Senior Leaders: His growing popularity and mass acceptance sometimes make senior leaders cautious — a testament to his independent influence and strong following.

Non-Dynastic Background: Does not come from a political family, which instead makes him a self-made leader, respected for earning his position purely through hard work and dedication.

Assertive Style: His strong voice for worker rights and accountability can appear confrontational to some, but it reflects his uncompromising integrity and courage to speak truth to power.
General_Attitude:
There is a strong and positive sentiment among party workers in favor of **K. Narasimha Reddy**. Workers see in him a **fresh and credible face** who represents the real spirit of the organization rather than the politics of hierarchy. The general perception at the ground level is that **senior leaders and ministers usually decide** the DCC name, and whatever they propose eventually becomes final — leaving workers disillusioned and detached from the process. Many cadres have expressed that the **Sangathan Srijan Abhiyan** should not become *another symbolic exercise or betrayal* where a “parachute candidate” is imposed again.

To **revive organizational trust** and **motivate the cadre**, they strongly believe that only a **loyal, hardworking, and competent grassroots leader** like K. Narasimha Reddy should be chosen. His appointment would bring a **fresh approach**, restore **faith in internal democracy**, and serve as a **symbolic example** that the Congress Party truly values its workers and rewards commitment over convenience.

Note- A Candidate Arshad Ali has withdrawan his form to support K. Narsimha Reddy.

वे जमीनी कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच सक्रिय और लोकप्रिय हैं।

अल्मोड़ा जिला पहाड़ी विस्तार में है, जहाँ मकान अलग-अलग क्षेत्रों में फैले हुए हैं। इस स्थिति में भी वे सभी कार्यकर्ताओं को साथ लेकर काम करते हैं।
वे अपने खर्चे से कांग्रेस कार्यालय चला रहे हैं और संगठन में सभी लीडरों को साथ लेकर चलने का हौसला रखते हैं।
यदि उन्हें जिला अध्यक्ष बनाया जाए तो इसके अच्छे परिणाम सामने आ सकते हैं।

Reason_for_Interest: १९९८ से NSUI यूथ कांग्रेस, जिल्ला कांग्रेस कमिटी, प्रदेश कांग्रेस कमिटी, में विभिन्न पदों पर पार्टीने दिए गए दायित्व को निर्वहन किया गया है. अगर पार्टी द्वारा जिल्ला अध्यक्ष बनाया जाये तो पार्टी के प्रति निष्ठापूर्वक मजबूत करने का कम करेगे.
Strengths: अनुभवी है
Weaknesses:
अच्छे व्यक्त नहीं है 
युवनों पर पकड़ नहीं है
