Observer_Name: SMT. SANGEETA BENIWAL, EX. MP CANDIDATE
Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is a young person aged 30 years and he is an active member of Indian National Congress for past more than 14 years now.  The candidate belives in the ideology of Indian National Congress and he is the "go to person" for the local masses for redressal of their grievances. The candidate has shown zeal and dedication to serve the party and he can be an asset for the party in years to come.
Strengths: During the visit of the observer the feed back of the people more particularly the youth supported the candidature of Chirag for appointment as District President. He is actively engaged in raising the issues of public masses on public platforms and so also before State Authorities. Though the sitting local MLA does not support him but in the overall assessment of the observer he is a fit candidate for the post under consideration. The credentials of the candidate has been good and people of the district have direct connect with him. The candidate has good command over local language and his legal background gives him an upper edge while dealing with officials of the State Govt.
Weaknesses: The candidate being young in age might find it difficult in initial phase to win the confidence of all the local leaders because they might be elder to him but with passage of time things can take a good shape which will eventually benefit the party at District level and so also at State level.
General_Attitude:
1. The youth of the District across the board supported the candidature of Chirag Singh Fartyal. 
2. The local MLA Khushal Singh Adhikari and Chirag Singh belong to the same community and there are differences between them but in the considered opinion of the observer Chirag Singh is a fit candidate to be appointed as District President. The observer has been informed though in confidential terms that local MLA does not raise his voice or protest against the ruling BJP regime owing to the fact that he himself is a contractor and hence aligned with the State administration. 
3. During the visit of the observer though many meetings were convened and different persons organised such meetings but the energy and exuberance shown by the youth in the meeting conducted by Chirag Singh was commendable. There was ready acceptability of the leadership of Chirag Singh and hence his name is recommended as the most suitable candidate for the post of District President.

Observer_Name: SMT. SANGEETA BENIWAL, EX. MP CANDIDATE
Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is attached to the party since her birth. She belongs to a family (both on maternal side and in-laws side) who have supported the party for past many decades now. The candidate wants to serve the party and being a women candidate might give her an added advantage to align more women votes to the party.
Strengths: The candidate is a sports Coach and she has a direct conenct with the young student fraternity of District Champawat. She has good command over local language and she has been attached to NSUI since her college days. Recently she has won election also. She is a party worker rendering her service at grass root level.
Weaknesses: The candidate being a female might find it difficult to handle the office of District President.
General_Attitude: The candidate is a decent women and she actively participated in all the meetings which were conducted during the stay of the observer at District Champawat. She has good connect with the local masses and if the party decides to consider a women candidate for the post under consideration then she can be a good choice. The women and young girls of the area vouched for the candidature of the candidate.

Observer_Name: SMT. SANGEETA BENIWAL, EX. MP CANDIDATE
Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is handling the election affairs of the party for past five Legislative Assembly and Parliament elections. He has good hold over the persons who are working at booth level across the district. He has shown keen interest to serve the party.
Strengths: The candidate is a grass root level worker and he is serving the party for past more than two and half decades. He has good connectivity with the local masses and he can deliver good result if saddled with the responsibility of the post of District President.
Weaknesses: The candidate belong to a humble background which can make it difficult for him to seek involvement of the entire party cadre of District Champawat. The candidate might find it difficult to make the financial ends meet.
General_Attitude: The candidate is a dedicated worker of Indian National Congress Party and he has good connect with the people working at Booth Level all across District Champawat.

Observer_Name: SMT. SANGEETA BENIWAL, EX. MP CANDIDATE
Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is attached with the party for past more than two decades. He is a ground level worker and has been actively engaged to raise the cause and concern of the people of Champawat with the State Administration and local officials.
Strengths: The candidate hails from rural area of District Champawat. He is attached with the party since long. The candidate is a contractor by profession and he has held many positions on different platforms since 2006-07 to till today.
Weaknesses: The candidate does not have a direct connect with the people living in urban area. The task to run the office of District President might prove to be a difficult affair for the candidate as he will be required to remain present in the district head office on daily basis.
General_Attitude: The name of the candidate was put forward to the observer by people who came from rural area of District Champawat. In fact significant number of women met the observer and requested her to consider the name of the canditate for the post of District President. The candidate is a ground level worker who has a good connect with the people living in rural areas. The candidate has been an active participant to redress the dificulties of rural public be it be issuance of NREGA card, getting the pension released to elderly people or for that matter rendering a helping hand to avail medical facilities.

Observer_Name: SMT. SANGEETA BENIWAL, EX. MP CANDIDATE
Criminal_Record: 323/506/504 case disposed off in 2017
Reason_for_Interest: The candidate is attached to the Indian National Congress Party since year 2000. The candidate is a ground level worker and has served the party at various positions since 2008.
Strengths: The candidate is a ground level worker who intends to serve the party. The candidate is highly qualified that gives him an edge over other candidates.
Weaknesses: The candidate does not have very firm bond or connect with the leaders of district Champawat. He might find it difficult to run the office of District President.
General_Attitude: The candidate is highly educated and sincere. He is a well behaved person who might prove to be an asset for the party in the long life.

Observer_Name: CAPTAIN AJAY YADAV, EX. CHAIRMAN OBC DEPT
Reason_for_Interest: He wants to propagate the Congress ideology of Sh. Mallikarjun Kharge, Smt. Sonia Gandhi, Sh. Rahul Gandhi to achieve the goal of strong and vibrant Constitution. He also support Cast Census and also would contribute his full energy to save Constitution of India. He also help SC/OBC in getting their full right and to free the Uttrakhand from the misrule of the BJP government.
Strengths: He has been a grassroots worker for the Congress Party, he has actively participated in social movements, from student welfare to social movements. He has been the president of Haldwani District Bar Association six times. Currently, he is the president of Haldwani Mahanagar Congress Committee and can fulfill his responsibilities with better coordination with party officials and workers in the 2027 assembly elections.
Weaknesses: ​I didn`t notice any major Weaknesses in Govind Singh Bisht, but I advised him to work even better in the future. He should appoint officials at the booth level and ward level so that the party can perform better in the upcoming 2027 Uttarakhand elections. He needs to prepare and work harder than before.
General_Attitude: Almost 65% of people have suggested Govind Singh Bisht`s name to be made the Haldwani Mahanagar president. He is a very decent man and works in coordination with everyone. Being a lawyer, he also fights the cases of poor people for free. He handles all the political programs of the Congress Party and organizes all the protests against the government, informing everyone.

Observer_Name: CAPTAIN AJAY YADAV, EX. CHAIRMAN OBC DEPT
Reason_for_Interest: Khazan Pandey is old congress man. Every congress leader and worker know him very well. He wants to use his experience and network to rebuild and strengthen the party at the grassroots.
Strengths: Almost 15% of people have suggested Khajan Pandey`s name to be made the Haldwani Mahanagar President, He is a very old Congress leader. All the Communities people had come in his favour.
Weaknesses: Khajan Pandey is 63 years old; not all Congress leaders and workers are in his favour. Only a few people are in his favour. He comes from Brahmin caste while Sumit Hardayesh MLA from Haldwani Mahanagar is also Brahmin, making Khajan Pandey the district president would not be fruitful for the Congress party. Therefore, I put forth my suggestion for him at number two.
General_Attitude: He is a very old Congress leader. Known face but Only a few people are in his favour.

Observer_Name: CAPTAIN AJAY YADAV, EX. CHAIRMAN OBC DEPT
Reason_for_Interest: Vinod Arya has been a member of the Congress party for the past 20 years. He has made significant contributions over the years and strongly believes in the party’s values.
Strengths:
Mr. Vinod Arya is well-regarded by the Scheduled Caste members of the Congress party.
His supporters believe that his appointment would provide an opportunity for the Scheduled Caste community to have their voices heard and their concerns addressed within the party.
Weaknesses: Only 10% of the people are in his favor to become the district president. The Scheduled Caste community has only 45,000 votes, and there are many other contenders for the position.
General_Attitude: After considering all the facts, Vinod Arya has a few strong points, like the support of some community members and his experience. But, there are also some challenges, like only having a small number of votes and not having the support of all the leaders. It`s important to think about all of this before making a decision. Given his strengths and weaknesses, I would rank him 3rd for this position. While he has potential, the limited support and other factors make him a less ideal candidate compared to others.

Observer_Name: CAPTAIN AJAY YADAV, EX. CHAIRMAN OBC DEPT

Weaknesses: only 5% of people support him, with no major leaders backing his candidacy. Additionally, the Sikh community, from which he belongs , has only 5 to 6 thousand votes.
General_Attitude: Considering these factors, I am recommending his name in fourth position for the District President.

Community involvement (President of Kashipur Agrawal Samaj)
Family background
Financial condition
Weaknesses:

Allegations that he is visible at Agrawal Samaj community functions with BJP leaders

Over 80 per cent workers interacted with during the visit suggested his name.
These include most of our senior leaders and NGOs also.
As president of Agrawal Samaj, having good influence amongst the urban votes. It must be noted that Kashipur is an urban seat. It must be pointed out that a few Congressmen-women pointed out that his pictures that depicted him sharing stage with local BJP leaders were doing rounds but it was revealed that this was the Agrawal Community function and not political function.

Besides this, he has vast experience in different aspects of the Organisation. However, he had remarkably low number of reccommendations compared to Manoj Agrawal.

Reason_for_Interest: He wants to spread the ideology of the Congress and contribute in making a new, better India.

Weak financial background of Mushraf Hussain also has been deemed responsible for him not being able to solidify the party. Most of the elected corporators allege some financial irregularties by him.

Strengths:

General_Attitude: If Party wants to appoint a Muslim and a new face, he should be given a chance. However, it must be noted that we will have to muster more support for him from leaders and senior workers.

Reason_for_Interest: She is PCC Secretary and VP Mahila Congress. She believes that she can contribute significantly to the rejuvenation and connect masses, OBC to the party.

However, she does not come highly recommended by any party workers and leaders. There are two groups active in Kashipur. She is associated with the faction supporting the current DCC president Mushraf Husain.

Reason_for_Interest: He is young and the active District Youth President, stepping forward because he believes he can plan and execute winning strategies, unite the organisation, and lead the Party into its next phase of growth. For the last 15 years, he has been present in every major party meeting—learning, coordinating, and delivering on the ground. He carries a clean, respected image—known for honesty, problem-solving, and keeping his word. His strength is a deep ground network of booth workers, youth, women, advocates, traders, and village committees—people he meets every day. He communicates clearly, has a working relationship with local media, and knows how to turn issues into campaigns that connect with voters. Most importantly, he is a loyal Congress worker who wants to work with everyone and bridge factions so our energy goes into programs—not parallel shows.
Strengths:
Strong ground connect: Deep, daily contact with local public and booth networks; known face across wards.
Proven loyalty: Longstanding commitment to the Party; consistent presence in key meetings.
Unifier and growth-focused: Ability to bring groups together and keep organisation focused on expansion.
Planner and executor: Can plan and implement party functions, rallies, and structured programmes.
Issues-based campaigning: Builds clear campaigns that connect with people and the organisation; has led drives exposing BJP/opposition failures.
Respected image: Earned public respect for honesty, problem-solving and approachable conduct.
Young, energetic, aggressive when needed: Fearless—has confronted the ruling party (black-flag protests, etc.); can mobilise youth and general public.
Media-ready and politically savvy: Understands local politics and messaging; comfortable engaging press.
Weaknesses:
New to this role 
Will depend financially on others 
Will need seniors support
General_Attitude:
I am recommending Vijay Rawat because he embodies what the Congress party wants today: constitutional values, social justice, secular unity, and accountable governance—translated into on-ground organisation. People feel, He is young, energetic, and aggressive, yet inclusive and respectful to seniors. He takes initiative, guides teams, and delivers results—the kind of issue-based, people-centric leadership that strengthens our fight for jobs, education, health, women’s safety, and rights of the poor and marginalised. He communicates clearly, and keeps the cadre focused on service, compassion, and duty.
Vijay has a deep grassroots network—booth workers, youth, women,—built over 15 years of consistent party work. He is loyal, non-controversial, approachable, and hard-working. Crucially, he is disturbed by the current division and is committed to one calendar, one message, one team—exactly what our Sangathan SRIJAN Abhiyan demands. As a new face rooted in Congress values, he will unite groups, mobilise youth, and run issue-driven programmes on roads, drainage, health, and other issues. 
workers and local stakeholders see him as someone who can unite everyone, is non-controversial, and will work aggressively on the ground to deliver

Reason_for_Interest: He is stepping forward to end groupism and rebuild a united organisation. Because of his approachable nature and good conduct, he can speak to every camp and take all groups together. He is available 24×7 for the Party and has been active for 23 years—deeply loyal and eager to give back. His priority is booth-building: energising workers, bringing loyal Congress people to the front, and turning our natural support into organised booth strength. He participated in the Bharat Jodo Yatra, and carries that spirit of unity and service into daily work.
Strengths:
Well-behaved, approachable, 24×7 available — easy access for all workers and groups
Loyal to the Party — 23 years of active work; participated in Bharat Jodo Yatra
Unifier mindset — explicitly focused on ending groupism and taking everyone together
Booth-first organiser — wants to strengthen booth committees, energise workers, bring loyal Congress karyakartas forward
Clean conduct and good public behaviour — comfortable engaging diverse stakeholders
Weaknesses:
Not very aggressive — may need a proactive campaign/agitational wing alongside him
Electoral setbacks — has lost two councillor elections; requires strong team performance metrics
Limited financial capacity
General_Attitude: Several workers have conveyed that Rakesh Sharma can end groupism, is loyal to the Party, and is ready to work full-time on organisation and booths. They believe he will get support from senior leaders, helping align both camps under one calendar and one message. They also point out that he is young, approachable, and well-behaved, which can energise workers, bring loyal Congress karyakartas to the front, and restore unity on the ground.

Reason_for_Interest: She has been associated with NSUI since her student life and, inspired by freedom fighter Late Shri Vishnu Singh Rawat Ji, has worked to uphold and strengthen Congress values. As former District President of Mahila Congress, she successfully built the organization up to the booth level and actively participated in training camps, gaining valuable experience. She now seeks to serve as Mahanagar President to further strengthen the party
Strengths:
Congress grooming from student life (NSUI): rooted in party ideology and organisation.

Legacy connect: inspired by freedom fighter Late Shri Vishnu Singh Rawat ji; projects Congress values.

Fighter’s mindset: strong-headed, resilient; willing to take tough assignments.

Hard-working mobiliser: can energise women/youth and convert issues into programmes.

Aspirational leadership: seeking Mahanagar President to strengthen city unit cadence.

Can support party financially
Weaknesses:
Absent on ground (2018–2023): long gap from field activities; perceived as opportunistic.

Shift to Lansdowne and MLA pitch (2022): sought MLA ticket there; returned to city only in 2023 after new DCC president (Vinod Dabral) took charge.

Factionalism charge: viewed as deliberately fuelling infighting by siding with the district office against Mahanagar.

Cadre connect: struggles to gather loyal Congress workers and build a stable core team.

Consensus risk: needs clear bridge-building with city unit to avoid a “camp” tag and regain trust.
General_Attitude: In Kotdwar there was a clear split—the district president Vinod Dabral’s group openly favoured Ranjana Rawat and Balbir Singh Rawat, and she also aspired for a future MLA ticket. On the other side, Surendra Singh Negi’s group opposed her, pointing to her opportunistic shifts and not staying with the Party at all times. I acknowledge that she is a hard worker, but the priority now is to unite voters and workers, not divide them. Our organisation must run with one calendar, one message, one team—whoever leads must bridge factions, not deepen them.

Criminal_Record: A case was registered under section 307 of the IPC which is resolved, and IPC 341 is pending.
Reason_for_Interest: From his point of view, the party is divided into two groups and he wishes to become the President and bring unity to the party.
Strengths:
Want to unite and strengthen the Congress party so that we can form the government in 2027. 
Unifying Leadership: Committed to bringing both groups together.
Clear Vision: Focused on preparing the party to form the government in 2027.
Consensus Builder: Skilled at resolving internal differences and motivating workers.
Weaknesses: Less Aggressive
General_Attitude: Demonstrates strong leadership qualities with a clear vision and effective decision-making. Maintains deep grassroots-level connection, earning trust and respect of common people.

Reason_for_Interest: He believes in the Congress ideology and is a follower of it. He will work for the party and will make a strong group with youths, ex-army with common men and women of different groups to work for the party and will work to empower the SC and OBC of the community.
Strengths:
High Credibility: Respected retired teacher with strong goodwill among elders and civil society.

Dedicated Worker: Known for sincerity and commitment to tasks.

Organized and Detail-Oriented: Strong in documentation, record-keeping, and ensuring accuracy in reports.
Weaknesses:
Overdependence on personal networks: May limit wider cadre participation and fresh talent.

Youth connect gap: Retired profile makes it harder to attract a strong youth face.

Financial constraints: Not financially strong; programmes may need external backing.

Factional alignment: Seen as aligned to the District President, favouring district activities over Mahanagar work in Kotdwar.

Likely bloc politics: Along with Ranjana Rawat, could remain district-office aligned and deepen groupism in Kotdwar.
General_Attitude: Balbir ji is a hard-working organiser, respected as a retired teacher, and is particular about reporting and documentation—qualities that help keep an organisation disciplined. He can mobilise cadres . However, he is not a street-level fighter, has a limited youth connect, and financial constraints could slow programmes. Most importantly, his alignment with the district office—often favouring district activities over Mahanagar—risks deepening groupism in Kotdwar, especially alongside Ranjana Rawat. My view: unless there is a clear, public commitment to one joint calendar (City + District), a youth bench, and shared decision-making with the Mahanagar team, elevating him now could widen the divide. Our priority must be unity, booth strength, and issue-based campaigns.

Reason_for_Interest: She has been actively serving the Congress since 2007, led as District SC Cell Head, and has consistently resolved public issues. During COVID-19, she organised relief—food, medicines, and essential services—for people in need. She comes from a Congress family; with her husband (retired DFO) and children settled, she is fully independent to devote time to the party. She has also expressed readiness to extend financial support for organisational work. Known for her mixing, inclusive nature, she tells that gets along with all groups and can bridge divides in Kotdwar.
Strengths:
Respected Background: Comes from a good family, earning natural respect in society.

Dignified and Non-Controversial: Maintains a clean image and commands respect.

Positive & Supportive: Brings a constructive attitude and is financially supportive of party activities.
Weaknesses:
Not a good listener (needs to improve feedback intake)
Not tested in a top leadership position (limited track record at the helm)
General_Attitude: On the ground, many party workers feel Meena Devi hasn’t yet held a frontline leadership post and that there wasn’t much lobbying for her, and we must also factor that Kotdwar is Rajput-dominated with a high caste sentiment; even so, I see a real spark—discipline, a clean and non-controversial image, an inclusive temperament, and the willingness to work full-time and even fund programmes.

Criminal_Record:
Chanchal Bora has always stood firmly on public issues that matter. His leadership was visible when he led protests demanding better conditions and accountability for the Didihat Community Hospital, highlighting the government’s neglect towards basic healthcare infrastructure in the region. The protest drew attention to the urgent need for improvements, resonating deeply with the local population.

Similarly, he actively opposed the controversial Agniveer recruitment scheme, which many saw as a threat to the aspirations and rights of local youth. His vocal stand reflected widespread public discontent over a policy seen as short-sighted and detrimental to long-term employment opportunities.

Because of his active role in these movements, cases have been registered in his name, a situation that speaks volumes about the political pressure faced by those who dare to challenge systemic negligence and flawed policies.

Far from deterring him, these challenges have only reinforced his image as a leader who stands with the people, fights injustice, and is unafraid to raise his voice, even when the establishment tries to silence him. This is the kind of bold and committed leadership that the role of District President demands.
Reason_for_Interest:
Chanchal Bora’s popularity in the entire district is no small achievement. Across every social class, and especially among the youth, his name carries respect. Recently, in the local body elections, his wife won the BDC election, marking a historic moment – after 35 years, a Congress member has been elected as the senior leader (ज्येष्ठ प्रमुख) in the region.

This is being seen as a major breakthrough for the Congress in Didihat, a sign of renewed strength and trust at the grassroots level. Chanchal Bora doesn’t just have personal influence; he has built a solid network of Gram Pradhans and BDC members over time, which today stands as a powerful political asset.

We have collected and uploaded verified data from him, showcasing this network and the real political ground-level strength Congress holds here. In a region where political battles are tough, this achievement reflects not just personal success but the growing confidence of the people in a changing political landscape.
Strengths:
-Strong Popularity Across All Social Groups
-Youth Connectivity
-Proven Electoral Success
-Grassroots Politics Understanding
-Extensive Grassroots Network
-Leadership and Organizational Skills
-Deep Understanding of Local Issues
-Commitment to Party Ideals
General_Attitude:
The overall impression of party workers and leaders towards the proposed name is highly positive. Didihat district consists of two assembly constituencies – Didihat and Dharchula. Didihat has been represented by a BJP MLA for the past seven consecutive elections. Both the former Congress candidate from Didihat and the current Congress MLA from Dharchula strongly believe that if we want to challenge BJP’s stronghold and win Didihat, the district president must come from Didihat itself.

In this context, Chanchal Bora emerges as the most suitable candidate. His widespread popularity across all social groups, especially among the youth, gives him a distinct advantage. His recent success in helping his wife win the BDC election – the first time in 35 years that a Congress member has become a senior leader in the region – reflects his growing influence and credibility at the grassroots level.

Beyond personal popularity, Chanchal Bora has built a well-established network of Gram Pradhans and BDC members, which is a significant political asset for the party’s organizational strength. Given these factors, party workers view him as the strongest and most capable candidate to lead the district Congress unit and to play a pivotal role in reviving the party’s prospects in Didihat.

Reason_for_Interest:
My interest in the District Congress President position comes from a deep-rooted commitment to the party’s values and a long journey in grassroots politics. I started my political career in the student movement, joining NSUI as Joint Secretary. I contested and won student union elections, first as Vice President and later as President, where I learned how to organize, lead, and represent diverse voices.

Building on that foundation, I contested the District Panchayat Member election and won by a narrow margin of 65 votes, at a time when Congress didn’t even have an official symbol in the area. I then served two terms as Block Congress Committee President, followed by a role as PCC member. In 2023, I was entrusted with the responsibility of leading the District Congress Committee as its President.

What drives me is the belief that strong leadership at the district level can rebuild the party’s connect with the people, solve local problems, and strengthen democratic participation. I see this role not as a position of power, but as a responsibility to unite workers, resolve internal challenges, and build a focused strategy that takes Congress’s mission of social justice and development to every corner of the district.
Strengths:
Grassroots Experience – Began political journey with NSUI, rose through student leadership, and later contested and won local body elections, giving him a strong connect with youth, villagers, and ordinary workers.

Proven Leadership – Served two terms as Block Congress Committee President, PCC member, and currently as District Congress Committee President, demonstrating organizational ability and continuity in leadership.

Electoral Credibility – Successfully contested multiple elections, including District Panchayat, with close contests that built resilience, strategy, and a strong voter base.

Organizational Skills – Experienced in managing booth-level structures, handling factional disputes, and coordinating between grassroots workers and higher party leadership.

Commitment to Congress Ideology – Long-standing loyalty to the party, with a consistent focus on social justice, equality, and development.

Ability to Unite and Mobilize – Known for bridging differences among workers, energizing youth and women, and leading issue-based campaigns effectively.
Weaknesses: Managing Internal Factions – In a district with multiple caste and community dynamics, managing competing ambitions and factionalism remains a constant challenge.
General_Attitude:
The general impression of party workers towards Manohar Tolia as the proposed District President is overwhelmingly positive. He is widely seen as a dedicated, hardworking leader with deep roots in the party’s ideology and grassroots structure. His long political journey – starting from student politics, winning local elections, and serving in key organizational roles – has earned him respect across communities and party workers.

Manohar is known for his ability to connect with every section of society, especially marginalized groups, and for his consistent focus on social justice and development. His leadership is viewed as inclusive, with strong representation of Dalits, Tribals (Manohar himself belongs to the ST community), women, and youth. Party workers believe that his experience, combined with his calm but firm approach to resolving internal differences, makes him the right choice to strengthen the party’s base and lead the district forward.

He is a resident of Kimsar village, Yamkeshwar Tehsil coming under Kotdwar DCC. He has been associated with Congress for last 24 years. He was National Coordinator of NSUI from 2017 to 2019, State General Secretary of Youth Congress from 2019 to 2021. He wishes to strengthen the party by forming a layered structure of bodies down to the grassroots level.
1.	Formation of District Executive Committee
• Formation of an effective District Executive Committee by including senior Congress leaders, youth, dedicated colleagues, and women workers.
• Monthly meetings of District Congress Committee and monthly review of party programmes
2.	Reorganization at Assembly and Block Level
• Reorganization of all Block Committees under two Assembly constituencies of the district.
• Ensuring representation of all age groups and social sections.
• Mandatory monthly meetings of each Block Congress Committee.
• Appointment of one senior District General Secretary as in-charge of each Block to monitor organizational and movement-related programmes.
3.	Formation of Frontal Organizations and Cells
• Formation of all frontal organizations and cells at district and block levels.
• Regular monitoring and review of their activities.
4.	Responsibility and Meeting System
• Ensuring monthly meetings of District and Block Congress Committees.
• Appointment of one District Vice President/General Secretary as in-charge for each Block.
• Mandatory presence of in-charge in Block meetings and submission of action reports to District Committee.

Reason_for_Interest: कोई पारिवारिक जिम्मेदारी नहीं हैं पूरी तरह राजनीति में व्यस्त हैं। मात्र ढाई वर्ष का कार्यकाल मिला हैं। संगठन को मजबूत करने के लिए और कुछ समय का कार्यकाल इन्हे मिले, कोई चुनाव लड़ने की मंशा नहीं हैं,  इसलिए संगठन में इसे काम करने का मौका मिले ।
Strengths: जिला अध्यक्ष उम्मीदवार राहुल छीमवाल अविवाहित हैं,पूरा समय कांग्रेस संगठन के लिए समर्पित हैं । ढाई वर्ष का कार्यकाल सकारात्मक रहा, ए.आई.सी.सी एवं पी.सी.सी द्वारा जो भी कार्यक्रम दिए गए उसे अच्छे से उसके द्वारा किए गए । जिले के स्थानीय मुद्दों पर आक्रामक था, जनपद एवं जिले के सभी नेताओं एवं कार्यकर्ताओं के साथ बेहतर समन्वय बनाकर काम किया । और इनके नेतृत्व में नगर पालिका एवं पंचायत चुनाव में कांग्रेस पार्टी का बेहतर प्रदर्शन रहा ।
Weaknesses: पूर्व जिला अध्यक्ष श्री सतीश नैनवाल के प्रभाव में काम करते हैं,आर्थिक दृष्टि से कमजोर होने के कारण, विधान सभा वार नेताओं के प्रभाव में काम करता हैं और पीसीसी में ज्यादा से ज्यादा दलित और राजपूत समुदाय के लोगों को प्रतिनिधित्व देने की आवश्यकता । ग्राम स्तर पर संगठन को और मजबूत करने की आवश्यकता हैं ।
General_Attitude: जिला अध्यक्ष पद उम्मीदवार राहुल छीमवाल के प्रति जिले एवं प्रदेश के मुख्य नेताओं व पार्टी पदाधिकारियों द्वारा इनके स्वभाव पार्टी के प्रति निष्ठा और संगठन के प्रति समर्पण भाव की तारीफ की गई। नॉन कॉन्ट्रोवर्सिएल छवि प्रमुख नेताओं पदाधिकारियों एवं कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच में देखी गयी । नैनीताल जिले के सभी ब्लॉकों में सामूहिक बैठक लेकर एवं व्यक्तिगत प्रत्येक कार्यकर्ताओं से मिलकर उनकी व्यक्तिगत राय सुमारी की गयी । जिसमें 80 % प्रतिशत जिले के कार्यकर्ताओं एवं पदाधिकारियों ने श्री राहुल छिमवाल के पक्ष में अपनी राय प्रदान की । चूँकि केवल उत्तराखण्ड राज्य में डेढ़ वर्ष बाद विधान सभा चुनाव होने वाले हैं ऐसे में श्री राहुल छिमवाल को ही यथावत जिला अध्यक्ष रखना उचित होगा ।

Reason_for_Interest: उम्मीदवार संजय सिंह किरौला आर्थिक स्थिति से काफी मजबूत हैं, जिले की सहकारी समितियों से लगातार कई वर्षों से जुड़ा हैं, जैस दूध उत्पादक सहकारी संघ, उत्तराखंड डेहरी फेडरेशन राज्य मंत्री स्तर , राष्ट्रीय डेयरी विकास बोर्ड गुजरात, जिला सहकारी बैंक नैनीताल डायरेक्टर जैसे जनता से जुड़े पदों पर रहा है । जिनके कारण समाज सेवा की भावना नज़र आती है ।
Strengths: उम्मीदवार संजय सिंह किरौला निष्ठावान कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ता हैं, विभिन्न सरकारी एवं गैर सरकारी संगठनों में कार्य करने का अनुभव हैं, जैसे दूधसंघ फेडरेशन एवं जिला सहकारी ऑपरेटिव बैंक के अध्यक्ष पदों पर निर्विरोध निर्वाचित हुए हैं, युवा एवं जोशीलें जातिगत समीकरण भी इनके पक्ष में हैं ।
Weaknesses: जनपद एवं जिले के वरिष्ठ कांग्रेस जनों का समर्थन नहीं हैं, पर्वतीय क्षेत्र की विधानसभाओं में पर्याप्त संपर्क नहीं हैं और नाही पहचान हैं, कांग्रेस के कुछ गुट इनका विरोध करते हैं ।
General_Attitude: उम्मीदवार संजय सिंह किरौला नैनीताल जिले के 18 ब्लॉक में से दो ब्लॉकों में ही इनके समर्थक देखे गए हैं, बाकी के अन्य ब्लॉकों में इनका कोई वर्चस्व दिखाई नहीं दिया । जिले के ज्यादातर वरिष्ठ नेताओं का रुझान इनके प्रति दिखाई नहीं दिया । विगत 25 वर्षों से जिला कांग्रेस का नेतृत्व एक ही गुट विशेष के पास है, जिसे कार्यकर्ताओं का समर्थन भी हैं, यदि हाईकमान परिवर्तन करना चाहे तो संजय किरौला एक उचित विकल्प हो सकते हैं ।

Reason_for_Interest: He want to become District Congress President to strengthen the organization at the grassroots, connect youth with politics, and provide transparent, people-oriented leadership. My focus will be on taking the party’s ideology to the common people, increasing public trust, keeping the organization united, and working effectively on public interest issues.
Strengths: He is an ideologically strong and committed Congress worker who always prioritises the party over individual interests. Aggressive in approach, he can effectively counter BJP and RSS ideology. He has a dedicated team of youths in colleges across Uttarakhand, especially in Garhwal, and can devote full time to the organisation. Secular , he respects seniors, takes everyone along, and has both organisational as well as electoral experience.
Weaknesses: He needs to adopt a more systematic work culture. He had founded a youth organisation named ARYAN, from which he later resigned in December 2000. He has also provided related paper cuttings as reference.
General_Attitude:
Rakesh Negi, a Rajput from Garhwal, is academically qualified with B.Sc, M.A., LLM, and PGDCA. He began his political career as a student union leader, heading the ARYAN student union, and built a strong youth network in Dehradun district and Garhwal. He resigned from ARYAN in December 2020.

He has been in Congress for the past 27 years, is ideologically committed, loyal to the party, and known for his aggressive stand against BJP and RSS. He has held several organisational responsibilities, including DYC General Secretary, DCC General Secretary, and is presently PCC General Secretary. He also serves as PRO in IYC EA and has earlier worked as RGPRS State Coordinator.

Electoral experience includes being elected as ZP Member (2008) and later as DPC Member. His family also has a political base, with his sister-in-law elected as Block Development Committee Pramukh. He has been active in social service, during the Corona pandemic and he personally funded road construction and welfare initiatives for the needy.

After ex-DCC President Lakshmi Devi left the party and joined BJP, he was appointed Acting DCC President. However, within two months the appointment was stayed due to internal differences and lack of AICC approval, following intervention by senior leader Mr. Pritham Singh. The DCC President post in Pachawadoon remains vacant.

Confidential: In 2008, Mr. Pritham Singh asked him to vote for the BJP candidate in the ZP President election, which he refused. Since then, he has been politically opposed and targeted by Mr. Pritham Singh. This version has also been said by another ZP member from that election.

Reason_for_Interest: Mr Sanjay Kishore’s vision is to strengthen the Congress Party at the grassroots, enhance voter engagement, party performance, and ensure better candidate selection to improve representation. Having served the party from NSUI to Youth Congress and as former DCC President, he worked to build coordination across four Assembly constituencies, stood with workers, and contributed to increasing vote share in Lok Sabha and Vidhan Sabha elections. He now commits to continue with greater energy and dedication, under the guidance of Rahul Gandhi Ji, Mallikarjun Kharge Ji, and state leadership, to further strengthen the Congress in the district.
Strengths: Sanjay Kishore is a loyal Congress worker , Ideologically committed with a long political journey beginning in 1991 as an NSUI member. He has held various organizational roles including PYC Secretary, General Secretary, PCC Secretary, and currently serves as PCC Spokesperson. He also has electoral and organisational experience, being elected as ZP member in 2025, and previously served as Director of the Krishi Mandi Board (2013–15). As DCC President (2018–2022), he gained district-level organizational exposure. Closely associated with senior leader Shri Pritham Singh Ji, he is known for his good nature, active participation in training camps, and social service through Sarva Dharma Ekta Sansthan, which played a key role in providing food and medical aid during the Corona period.
Weaknesses:
Weaknesses of Sanjay Kishore:
Sanjay Kishore served as DCC President from 2018–2022, where his performance drew mixed opinions. While some found him active, leaders like Nav Prabath and Smt. Godavari Tapli felt he was not effective, with weak district performance in the 2022 Assembly elections. He was also linked with mining activities, creating perceptions of being soft towards BJP, though he clarified that he left the business 5 years ago. Additionally, some leaders say he is closely associated with Shri Pritham Singh Ji, raising concerns that he may not run DCC independently but under his influence.
General_Attitude:
There is a mixed opinion on Mr Sanjay Kishore, who has already served as DCC President for four and a half years. While some leaders and workers consider him active, others feel his tenure lacked effectiveness.

Sanjay Kishore is a loyal and ideologically committed Congress worker, with a long political journey beginning in 1991 as an NSUI member. He has held several organizational roles including PYC Secretary, General Secretary, PCC Secretary, and currently serves as PCC Spokesperson. He also has electoral and organizational experience, being elected as ZP member in 2025 and having served as Director of the Krishi Mandi Board (2013–15). As DCC President (2018–2022), he gained district-level organizational exposure.

He is closely associated with senior leader Shri Pritham Singh Ji. Known for his good nature, he actively participates in training camps and engages in social service through Sarva Dharma Ekta Sansthan, which notably provided food and medical aid during the Corona period.

Strengths:
वर्तमान जिला अध्यक्ष रहते हुए जिले के सामाजिक भौगोलिक एवं जनहित के मुद्दों का अच्छा अनुभव प्राप्त है वर्ष 1999 से वर्तमान तक पार्टी के सभी संगठनों पर कार्य का अनुभव है। तथा जनपद की सबसे ज्यादा जनसंख्या वाले राजपूत समाज से आते हैं तथा अन्य वर्गों से विशेष सहयोग प्राप्त है। 
श्री कुंवर सिंह सजवान भारतीय राष्ट्रीय छात्र संगठन NSUI से लेकर युवा कांग्रेस, जिला महामंत्री, उपाध्यक्ष युवा कल्याण से लेकर जिला अध्यक्ष तक का सफर पार्टी के लिए समर्पित रहा है छात्र संघ अध्यक्ष से लेकर उन्हें को आंदोलन में प्रतिभा किया जिससे नौजवान युवाओं के बीच अच्छी पकड़ है।
Weaknesses:
कांग्रेस के सभी समाज के नेताओं, कार्यकर्ताओं को और अधिक विश्वास में लेना होगा।
जिले में प्रत्येक ब्लॉक में कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ताओं के बीच समन्वय व संपर्क बढ़ाना होगा तथा समय-समय पर ब्लॉकों में बैठके कर कांग्रेस जनों का विश्वास जीतना होगा। और उन्हें जिम्मेदारियां देनी होगी।
General_Attitude:
श्री कुंवर सिंह साजवान के बारे में पार्टी नेताओं का दृष्टिकोण अच्छा है एक विधानसभा क्षेत्र में उत्साहित दिख तो अन्य विधानसभा में भी उनके समर्थन में सुझाव मिला है यद्यपि किसी ने भी इनका मुखर विरोध नहीं किया है। अधिकृत लोगों ने यह भी कहा कि पार्टी को देखना चाहिए कि इस बदलाव से पार्टी के अंदर कोई अलग ध्रुवी न बने इसलिए समाज से बिठाया जाना चाहिए। 
श्री कुंवर सिंह साजवान ने कांग्रेस की अभी की स्थिति जिले में संगठन और कार्यकर्ताओं को अच्छी तरीके से संभाल कर रखा है और सभी ब्लॉक के मीटिंग के बाद अधिकांश कार्यकर्ताओं ने जिला अध्यक्ष के लिए उनका नाम दिया है। 
संगठन में अभी आंतरिक गुदबाजी है वह गुदबाजी को दूर करने के लिए श्री कुंवर सिंह साजवान सही तरह से कार्य कर सकेंगे और जो कांग्रेस में थे वह निर्दलीय चुनाव लड़े हैं उनके कांग्रेस में जोड़ने के लिए सक्रिय कार्य कर सकेंगे। 
जिला अध्यक्ष के रूप में पार्टी द्वारा दिए गए सभी कार्यक्रमों को जिले में अच्छी तरह से संचालित किए हैं तथा वर्ष 2024 के लोकसभा चुनाव में केदारनाथ विधानसभा क्षेत्र की जिम्मेदारी सौंपने पर पिछले लोकसभा चुनाव से वर्ष 2024 में कांग्रेस प्रत्याशी को अच्छा समर्थन मिला है। 
लगातार दो बार छात्र संघ के अध्यक्ष रहकर एनएसयूआई के सदस्यों की संख्या में बढ़ोतरी की एवं अगस्तमुनि में अमर अनशन करके केंद्रीय विद्यालय की स्थापना करवाई। 
श्री कुंवर सिंह साजवान युवा नेता एवं उनकी आयु 44 वर्ष की है और कांग्रेस पार्टी के भरोसेमंद नेता के रूप में उनकी अच्छी छवि है और कभी पार्टी को छोड़ नहीं है

Observer_Name: SHRI HIMMAT SINGH PATEL, EX. MLA
Reason_for_Interest: जनपद में पुराने कांग्रेसी नेता है और कभी भी पार्टी नहीं छोड़ी है और परिस्थिति में पार्टी के साथ खड़े रहे हैं और युवा कांग्रेस से लेकर प्रदेश कांग्रेस मेंबर तक कार्य किया है और सदस्य जिला पंचायत रहे हैं अब जिला अध्यक्ष के रूप में पार्टी की सेवा करना चाहता है।
Strengths:
श्री कुलदीप कंडारी जी ने ब्लॉक जिले से लेकर प्रदेश तक काम किया है और जमीन स्तर के नेता है उनके पास कार्यक्रम की अच्छी खोज है। 
सदस्य जिला पंचायत निर्वाचित रहे हैं। 
युवा कांग्रेस से लेकर ब्लॉक अध्यक्ष अगस्तमुनि, जिला उपाध्यक्ष, जिला महामंत्री, प्रदेश कांग्रेस कमेटी के सदस्य रहे हैं। 
 कभी भी कांग्रेस पार्टी नहीं छोड़ी और परिस्थिति में पार्टी के साथ रहे हैं। 
जनपद की सर्वाधिक जनसंख्या राजपूत समाज से आते हैं।
Weaknesses:
जिले में पार्टी के अन्य नेताओं एवं कार्यकर्ताओं से संपर्क एवं सहयोग लेना होगा।
विधानसभा रुद्रप्रयाग के कांग्रेस नेताओं को भी विश्वास में लेना होगा। 
पार्टी के वरिष्ठ नेताओं को विश्वास में लेना होगा।
General_Attitude:
श्री कुलदीप कंडारी काफी सालों से कांग्रेस से जुड़े हुए हैं और वह अगस्तमुनि ब्लॉक अध्यक्ष रहे एवं जिला पंचायत के सदस्य भी रहे हैं। रुद्रप्रयाग जिले के सभी ब्लॉक के मीटिंग के समय सीनियर नेता का एवं काफी सारे कार्यकर्ता में श्री कुलदीप कंडारी के नाम पर भी अच्छा समर्थन मिला है।
श्री कुलदीप कंडारी की जिला अध्यक्ष पद के लिए स्वीकार्यता है। इन्हें सभी नेताओं को भरोसे में लेना होगा। श्री कुलदीप कंडारी सौम्य स्वभाव के है और जिला अध्यक्ष पद के दायित्व का निर्वहन कर सकते हैं।

Observer_Name: SHRI HIMMAT SINGH PATEL, EX. MLA
Reason_for_Interest:
-	जनपद रुद्रप्रयाग के समस्त कार्यकर्ताओ नेताओ के साथ मिलकर कांग्रेस की नीतिओ को आगे बढ़ाना
-	कांग्रेस संगठन को गाँव, पुलिंग, शहर एवं ब्लोक को मजबूत करना
-	जिले की जन समस्या के लिए कांग्रेस से काम करना
-	वर्ष 2027 में कांग्रेस को विजयी बनाने के लिए कार्य करना
Strengths:
-	श्री अर्जुन सिंह लंबे समय से कांग्रेस से जुड़े हुए हैं। उन्होंने युवक कांग्रेस में महत्वपूर्ण कार्य किया है। वे किसान नेता भी रह चुके हैं, इसलिए किसान भी उनसे मज़बूती से जुड़े हुए हैं।
- श्री अर्जुन सिंह गहरवार का समाज सेवा से लगाव है हर वर्ग से अच्छा संपर्क है प्रदेश की राजधानी देहरादून में निवास स्थान है वहां इनका परिवार क्षेत्र से आए हुए लोगों की सेवा करता है।
Weaknesses: श्री गहरवार को केदारनाथ विधानसभा क्षेत्र में संगठन रूप से और अधिक संपर्क करना होगा तथा जनपद के वरिष्ठ नेताओं को विश्वास में लेना होगा।
General_Attitude: श्री अर्जुन सिंह अहिरवार 56 वर्षीय संघर्षशील नेता है तथा जखोली ब्लॉक में इनका अच्छा जानदार है यदि इन्हें पार्टी का जिला अध्यक्ष बनाया जाता है तो इसमें जनपद के अन्य नेताओं की राय आवश्यक होगी यह जिला अध्यक्ष का पद कुशलता पूर्वक निभा सकते हैं।

Observer_Name: SHRI HIMMAT SINGH PATEL, EX. MLA
Reason_for_Interest: -	पार्टी को मजबूत करने के लिए सभी वर्गों में अच्छी पकड़ और में 2001 से 2012 तक गठवाल विश्वविद्यालय श्रीनगर रहा एवं शिक्षा के लिए रुद्रप्रयाग के हर गाँव के बच्चे श्रीनगर पढ़ते है उनमे उनकी अच्छी पकड़ है | और वर्ष 2027 की विधानसभा चुनाव में रुद्रप्रयाग जिले की दोनों सिट को जिताना है|
Strengths:
गढ़वाल विश्वविद्यालय श्रीनगर में राजनीति में रहकर छात्र संघ अध्यक्ष रहकर छात्रों के बीच अच्छी पकड़ है।
इनका एक एनजीओ एवं ग्रामीण विकास संस्था है जिससे इनका जनसंपर्क गांव गांव में है। 
पार्टी के विभिन्न पदों पर रहे है।
वर्ष 2022 में पार्टी से निष्काशित हुए मई 2024 में वापस पार्टी में सम्मिलित हुए।
Weaknesses: जनपद के वरिष्ठ नेताओं से संपर्क रखना होगा तथा जनहित के मुद्दों पर संघर्ष के साथ ही लगातार जनसंपर्क एवं पार्टी कार्यक्रमों में प्रतिभा कर दोनों विधानसभाओं में संपर्क जारी रखना होगा।
General_Attitude: श्री अंकुर रौथाण युवा नेता है NSUI से लेकर युवा कांग्रेस तक विभिन्न पदों पर रहे हैं किंतु वर्ष 2022 में पार्टी विरोधी गतिविधियों के कारण इन्हें निष्कासित कर दिया गया था किंतु लोकसभा चुनाव के दौरान 2024 में इन्हें पार्टी में ले लिया गया था स्वस्थ सभी के प्रखर वक्त है यदि जनपद के कांग्रेस जनों की 121 राय में उनके नाम भी कार्यकर्ताओं के द्वारा सहमति दी गई है ।
